name: Richard Carlbom
subject: Heartbroken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party
body:
Melissa Hortman represented the best of Minnesota. She was a tireless, devoted public servant who deeply loved our state and devoted her life to making it a better place. | | | ****
---
Peter, Melissa Hortman represented the best of Minnesota. She was a tireless, devoted public servant who deeply loved our state and devoted her life to making it a better place. The warmth and kindness she showed to her family and friends were matched only by her fierce commitment to improving the lives of those she had never even met. Last night, we lost her and her husband Mark to a horrifying and evil act of political violence. We are heartbroken. This loss will be felt across Minnesota, but especially by those who were lucky enough to count her as family, friends, and colleagues. Please hold her and Mark's loved ones close today. Senator Hoffman and his wife Yvette survived the attack on their lives. Please keep them and their loved ones in your thoughts. I am grateful they are alive and we wish them a speedy recovery. This evil act of violence is also an attack on our democracy itself. We must all recommit to a politics grounded in dignity and decency. Thank you, Richard Carlbom

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | Paid for by Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party
---

name: Crow HQ
subject: Hard work and determination
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team, Jason Crow’s story is one of hard work and determination.

Growing up in a working-class family, he worked minimum wage jobs starting at age 15 and put himself through college by working construction. That’s why he’s a Democrat — because Democrats are the party that fights for working people and a level playing field.

Jason believes the government doesn’t have to solve every problem, but it should guarantee all of us a fair shot and common rules to compete and live by.

Right now, he’s focused on electing servant leaders who share that vision — leaders who will help flip the House blue and build an economy that works for everyone, not just the richest few.

Meanwhile, Republicans are working overtime to win tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy by cutting Medicaid and nutrition assistance, making it harder for working families to get ahead.

That’s why it’s so important that we reach our mid-month fundraising goal. Every contribution helps us keep building the grassroots movement we need to win. Can you chip in before our deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025?amount=10&express_lane=true]

Thanks for standing with us.

— Team Crow

name: Sharice Davids
subject: I’m the first openly LGBTQ+ Native American woman ever elected to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I’ve seen firsthand the grit and determination of the LGBTQ+ community
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91172?t=6&akid=20215%2E878179%2EYvukXI) Happy Pride Month!

Sharice Davids here — the Voter Protection Project told me I could reach out with a special message for Pride.

Today, I couldn’t be more proud to serve as one of just a handful of openly LGBTQ+ voices in Congress.

Despite the obstacles we face, I’m fighting every day to build a world where everyone can live openly, where our differences are celebrated, and where every American is afforded equal protection under the law, no matter who you are or who you love.

**This is a fight I still believe we will win.** I’ve seen firsthand the grit and determination of the LGBTQ+ community, so I know we can keep pushing forward toward equality, despite all the forces that are trying to drag us backwards.

[If you’re with me in this fight, then I am humbly asking you to make a split donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project — because, truly, there is so much on the line in next year’s midterms, including our ability to stop every extremist attack on LGBTQ+ Americans.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91172?t=7&akid=20215%2E878179%2EYvukXI) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sharice Davids and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91173?t=8&akid=20215%2E878179%2EYvukXI)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91174?t=9&akid=20215%2E878179%2EYvukXI)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91175?t=10&akid=20215%2E878179%2EYvukXI)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91176?t=11&akid=20215%2E878179%2EYvukXI)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91172?t=12&akid=20215%2E878179%2EYvukXI)
I’m proud to be the first openly LGBTQ+ Native American woman ever elected to Congress.

I’m proud that I’ve broken the mold of what a typical background is for a member of Congress.

And I’m proud to work my heart out every single day to fight back against discrimination and injustice.

But for years, National Republicans have spent huge sums of money to kick me out of office and replace me with an anti-LGBTQ+ extremist. So I have to ask:

[If you believe that LGBTQ+ voices like mine belong in Congress, will you rush a split donation to help me keep fighting for equality?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91172?t=13&akid=20215%2E878179%2EYvukXI)

Thank you so much for your support, and happy Pride!

\- Sharice
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20215%2E878179%2EYvukXI). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20215%2E878179%2EYvukXI).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20215%2E878179%2EYvukXI) to request fewer emails. |

name: Dan Goldman
subject: NY Republicans bow down to a wannabe king
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Hey Peter, Earlier today, like so many around the country, I joined like-minded Americans deeply concerned about the future of our country to send this message loud and clear: **Donald Trump is not — and never will be — a king.** And in order to make sure the message was heard by those who need to hear it most — New York Republicans — **I travelled to Suffolk County in NY-1 to rally with fellow New Yorkers sick and tired of their representative choosing Donald Trump over them.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109602380/551655623/916437137?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250614_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzYyZmRlZi04MTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTcxUDSFEnkIwtEYrRFvS0hlD-QrxxYBoj-4uQE2jS4=) Our founders created our constitutional republic to be the opposite of the British monarchy they rebelled against. As a democracy, we don’t have dictators or kings who _rule_ us. We have presidents who _lead_ us. But that’s not how Donald Trump sees it. In fact, on the same day we rallied for democracy, **Trump spent $40 million of your taxpayer dollars to host a military parade — the type that dictators in North Korea put on.** As a wannabe king, Donald Trump has pardoned his violent insurrectionist militia, gutted any form of accountability, put political lackeys and loyalists in top positions, and — perhaps worst of all — submitted congressional Republicans to his every whim and lawless act. **From pushing for a budget that will enrich him and his billionaire allies at the expense of the American people to attempting to consolidate unlimited power, Donald Trump is only looking out for himself.** And sadly, New York Republicans haven’t stood up to him at all — either in opposition to his grifting and corruption, or in support of their own constituents. That’s why I was proud to go to NY-1 to tell Long Islanders that even if your own representative won’t put your interests first, I will! **These are not normal times and we cannot resort to normal strategies. That’s why I’m traveling around the state speaking to New Yorkers who don’t have a representative in Congress looking out for them.** **[If you support this important work, please pitch in today to help me continue speaking truth to power:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109602381/551655624/916437137?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250614_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzYyZmRlZi04MTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTcxUDSFEnkIwtEYrRFvS0hlD-QrxxYBoj-4uQE2jS4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109602382/551655625/916437137?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250614_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzYyZmRlZi04MTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTcxUDSFEnkIwtEYrRFvS0hlD-QrxxYBoj-4uQE2jS4=)

clean_body: | Hey Peter, Earlier today, like so many around the country, I joined like-minded Americans deeply concerned about the future of our country to send this message loud and clear: Donald Trump is not — and never will be — a king. And in order to make sure the message was heard by those who need to hear it most — New York Republicans — I travelled to Suffolk County in NY-1 to rally with fellow New Yorkers sick and tired of their representative choosing Donald Trump over them. = Our founders created our constitutional republic to be the opposite of the British monarchy they rebelled against. As a democracy, we don’t have dictators or kings who rule us. We have presidents who lead us. But that’s not how Donald Trump sees it. In fact, on the same day we rallied for democracy, Trump spent $40 million of your taxpayer dollars to host a military parade — the type that dictators in North Korea put on. As a wannabe king, Donald Trump has pardoned his violent insurrectionist militia, gutted any form of accountability, put political lackeys and loyalists in top positions, and — perhaps worst of all — submitted congressional Republicans to his every whim and lawless act. From pushing for a budget that will enrich him and his billionaire allies at the expense of the American people to attempting to consolidate unlimited power, Donald Trump is only looking out for himself. And sadly, New York Republicans haven’t stood up to him at all — either in opposition to his grifting and corruption, or in support of their own constituents. That’s why I was proud to go to NY-1 to tell Long Islanders that even if your own representative won’t put your interests first, I will! These are not normal times and we cannot resort to normal strategies. That’s why I’m traveling around the state speaking to New Yorkers who don’t have a representative in Congress looking out for them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

But hear me out: Peter, I know your inbox is full, and you’re hearing a lot about fundraising deadlines right now—**so I wanted to take a moment to explain why this one really matters.**

Since we last reached out, we've seen a massive uptick in donations from folks like you who want to make a difference, and I am deeply grateful and proud of this people-powered team. But, still, _we've got our work cut out for us._

At the end of every quarter, we have to file an official fundraising report with the FEC which is made public for the world to see. That means everyone— _including Republicans_ —will see exactly how much we raised, and how much support this campaign is getting.

And yes, **they do pay close attention.** National Republicans, big donors, and outside groups all look at our numbers to decide whether to invest against us. They look for signs of weakness, and we simply cannot give them one. This campaign is about showing up for our district, fighting for real progress, and working every day to make people’s lives better.

But we can only do that if we show we have the strength to win...and that starts with this FEC report, _and this grassroots team._ We’re halfway through June and we still have a big gap to close before the end of the month. That’s why my team set a mid-month goal of $15,000. If you’ve been thinking about donating, I hope you’ll consider pitching in today. Every single donation makes a difference. And I mean that.

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Trump’s military parade is authoritarianism in action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This is what creeping authoritarianism looks like — and we have to fight it.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250614-5148-footer&t=1&akid=5148%2E420207%2E8S24im)
Peter,
Today, Donald Trump is celebrating his birthday with a military parade through the streets of Washington, D.C. It’s a manufactured display of power straight out of the dictators’ playbook — and he’s threatening protestors with “very heavy force.”
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250614-2?refcode=em20250614-5148&amount=3&refcode2=5148_420207_8S24im&akid=5148%2E420207%2E8S24im)
Between this military parade and the crackdowns against protestors in Los Angeles, Trump has made it clear that he’ll do anything to stoke fear and division and bend our democracy to his will.
**But here’s the good news: We’re not backing down.**
Pramila’s building a bold, people-powered campaign to fight back and defend our democracy because she knows that grassroots movements have _always_ been the antidote to authoritarianism.
But if we’re going to keep training, organizing, and holding the line against Trump’s dangerous vision for America, we need your help. Pramila doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, and she doesn’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs.
**This movement is powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you.**
[**So Peter, with our mid-month deadline coming up tomorrow night, can we count on you to pitch in $3 and help us reach our $10,000 goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250614-2?refcode=em20250614-5148&amount=3&refcode2=5148_420207_8S24im&akid=5148%2E420207%2E8S24im)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250614-2?amount=3&refcode=em20250614-5148&refcode2=5148_420207_8S24im&akid=5148%2E420207%2E8S24im)**
In solidarity,
Jayapal HQ
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250614-5148-footer&t=2&refcode2=5148_420207_8S24im&akid=5148%2E420207%2E8S24im)**

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Meet the Man the Elites Fear
body:
I’ve seen what they’re capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I’m still standing because this matters—because you deserve to know how they’re gaming you.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7k3lmkbnl2af0pq21erulj4b3kani8dt7gl60n0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge8or1clh2bs)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6aggu00mge27p2a92ufvumo6t8pfmutqp8pj1p0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge8or1clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I founded OMG (O'Keefe Media Group) to do what the mainstream won't: expose the powerful with raw, unfiltered truth. We caught IRS officials on hidden cameras, bragging about their AI overreach--how they're building a surveillance net to track your every dollar. _The Post Millennial_ called it "chilling," and X users said it's "the kind of journalism we've been starving for." That's OMG: no fluff, just facts, straight from the source.

But this work comes at a cost. I've been jailed on trumped-up charges, had my home raided by the FBI over Ashley Biden's diary, and faced endless lawsuits from the left. Why?

Because I won't stop. I don't have a personal life--just a relentless drive to uncover corruption. I've built OMG from the ground up to fight for people like you, [**and now we need**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3rdeep0sd596url38jcuq8qdgrf2el1b61mu1c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge8or1clh2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq2iesrj89h784skvsdsvlu5dhu4ndea09nrljmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge8or1clh2bs)**[**to keep going. Will you join us?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zidkqc823v6uo8rd7onbcqfj2l4c0ghgr4gfqmr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge8or1clh2bs)

**People call OMG a "wrecking ball" against the establishment. **

When we dropped the IRS tapes, it wasn't just a story--it was a warning shot.

name: James O'Keefe
subject: The corrupt are suing me – help me fight back
body:
Imagine me walking down a city street, heart pounding, knowing I’m about to confront someone who’s been caught red-handed, in his own words, betraying the American people from a position of truth.

| [****](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgfbevnmnijtqu03927mpsdg9b5028qdeq5bsi60_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjgeaoj4clh2bs)

Imagine me walking down a city street, heart pounding, knowing I'm about to confront someone who's been caught red-handed, in his own words, betraying the American people from a position of truth.

**That 's what I did with Jamie Mannina, a former FBI agent I caught in a lie**. I had his words on tape, undeniable proof of his hypocrisy. When I faced him, he didn't explain--he exploded, yelling, "You're an a**hole! A fraudster!"

I kept my cool, because the truth doesn't need to shout. But now, **Mannina 's suing me for "assault" and "slander"**, trying to punish me for exposing him.

And that's not the only fight. Project Veritas, the organization I founded, is coming after me with another lawsuit, burying me in costs. Each deposition runs **over $12,000** , and I've got four left.

I owe **$29,000** in legal fees already, and I need **$17,000** more for a new attorney to take on Mannina's case. That's **$46,000** I don't have--[**and I 'm running out of time and need your help**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3736ec6n053fq0v7fsvnmhabegaha90d0u5vtf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjgeaoj4clh2bs).

Here's why this hits home: **I 'm the last investigative reporter going undercover**.

The mainstream media gave up on it--they'd rather cozy up to power than challenge it. But me and OMG? We're out there every day, shining a light on the dark corners no one else will touch. If these lawsuits shut me down, the corrupt win, and you lose your window into what's really happening.

**I need $46,000 to pay attorneys as soon as possible** , or I might not make it through this.

But if you [**donate now**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7h32j0477538qjjpdbscr0n6de23hr9sq24gbmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjgeaoj4clh2bs), you're not just helping me--you're claiming your stake in the truth.

It's a chance to be part of something bigger--a movement that refuses to let the truth die.

Patriot,

➡ And they’re embedding themselves deeper into our state’s economy.

And Hobbs just gave them the green light.

This isn’t leadership. This is a total failure of priorities.

Patriot—national security is **NON-NEGOTIABLE.**

Yet time after time, Hobbs chooses her radical donors, foreign interests, and D.C. elites over Arizona families.

Now, she’s paving the way for the CCP to seize Arizona land.

That’s why I’m running—to finally deliver **STRONG** leadership that puts Arizona **FIRST**.

But I cannot do this without YOU.

The Radical Left and their dark money allies have already poured **MILLIONS** into Arizona to keep Hobbs in power.

Now my primary is just around the corner, and the clock is ticking.

This is our moment to take Arizona back.

[**Will you stand with me and send a message that Arizona is NOT for sale?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2ro56dpmeu9h2j9daigt0v8vnf1ju08ukvsi778_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjgeaoj2c9h2bs)

Let’s show the Left that Arizona belongs to Arizonans, not the CCP.

For America & Arizona,
Karrin Taylor Robson

subject: Holding this reminds me of you

body:
Words can’t do it justice... I’m eternally grateful.

Friend,
---
When the Radical Democrats arrested me and forced me into bankruptcy, even my most cherished personal possessions were almost stripped from me.
---
A watch I was gifted as America’s Mayor from our overseas allies after the tragedy of 9/11 was nearly gone – nearly taken as a form of “collections” last year:

---
**Now, when I put on that watch, I’m reminded of _YOU_ and your generosity – _truly_!**
---
The Deep State and the leftist media labeled me a “DEAD MAN WALKING.” They pushed me to the point of bankruptcy. And they stripped me of my law license.

_I was without resources and left with no means to defend myself._
---
**But that’s when patriots like YOU came rushing to my defense.**
---
It’s all because of your support that I was able to assemble the legal defense team needed to win and remain a free man thus far.
---
_But I’ll be honest with you, my fight is far from over._
---
**I have _ONE_ _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ yet to face... **
---
**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**
---
And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a “DEAD MAN WALKING,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and forced me into BANKRUPTCY, the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**
---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757...**

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Suspect tied to Walz? Democrat governor may have appointed alleged Minnesota shooter to state board
body:
The main suspect in the horrific fatal shooting of Minnesota state Rep. Melissa Hortman and her husband may have played a role in state government after receiving an appointment from two Democrat governors, including Gov. Tim Walz, as first reported by Blaze News' Julio Rosas.According to a law enforcement source, police suspect that Vance Luther Boelter gunned down Rep. Hortman (DFL) and her husband, Mark, in Brooklyn Park as well as state Sen. John Hoffman (DFL) and his wife, Yvette, in nearby Champlin.Boelter appears to be the same individual who was first appointed to the Governor's Workforce Board in 2016 by then-Gov. Mark Dayton (DFL). He was then reappointed three years later by current Gov. Walz (DFL). | [](http://trk.libertyledger._NgmlDirORaUw)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._35fBki4-6y3idugPTjkw)

The main suspect in the horrific fatal shooting of Minnesota state Rep. Melissa Hortman and her husband may have played a role in state government after receiving an appointment from two Democrat governors, including Gov. Tim Walz, as first reported by Blaze News' Julio Rosas.According to a law enforcement source, police suspect that Vance Luther Boelter gunned down Rep. Hortman (DFL) and her husband, Mark, in Brooklyn Park as well as state Sen. John Hoffman (DFL) and his wife, Yvette, in nearby Champlin.Boelter appears to be the same individual who was first appointed to the Governor's Workforce Board in 2016 by then-Gov. Mark Dayton (DFL). He was then reappointed three years later by current Gov. Walz (DFL).

_Are you ready to send a message to Vice President JD Vance?_

This Father's Day, we're rallying supporters nationwide to help make it one JD Vance will never forget.

name: AMAC Action
subject: President Trump only has 18 months.
body:
My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4uga3g72c1t6ebee3ldvrmvqp279ok8rvt58418_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I’m writing to you today because I need your help to secure our elections once and for all and keep America on the path to greatness.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt3olo6ea67u5oe49k9dupkm9jub8iobleehpav0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)** My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. **That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate.** I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. **[That’s why our election integrity efforts must be a priority right now._election integrity efforts_ must be a priority right now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zajkf1kifg92flhm45ahq4bi1paj7b8ti2pbkmbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)**_If we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate...__ _ _If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation...__ __If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts..._ ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond.[**AMAC Action, will never give up. But my friend, as a strong conservative senior, we NEED you right there beside us.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsl0osqk4ngadu81j6e05p87tut3mtbt56kpgtp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs) My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action****is****the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** **We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.****Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the****is****sues.** Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to:
---
** Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. ** Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. ** Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections.** Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. ** And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes.
---
All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend.**[That’s why I hope you’ll click this link to support AMAC Action during this critical time for your sacred vote.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1gbldfck4dnvp4jggcjmodcmriiev92oqmf19k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)** We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from:
---
* voting in our elections
* taking benefits reserved for you
* being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives
* and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes.

---
Letting illegals change the balance of power in Congress and the electoral college means your vote may be fully **canceled out in all future elections**.The Left thinks they can pull a fast one on the American people.You, me and AMAC Action... we can’t let up for one minute. **[And that’s why I hope you’ll pledge your support for AMAC Action with your very best gift today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zii84km8hnnnhm51or04kjehl449j3t366k4o740_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)** AMAC Action is taking every step possible to secure our elections because no matter what issue you care about the most – inflation, crime, the 2nd Amendment, Social Security and Medicare solvency, even the right to life......if you and I don’t have a vote... none of it matters. **[That’s what makes your best gift to AMAC Action so important today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3h73fa0mjuespggl9f1mpndi482acv71tsjet80_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)** So whatever critical amount you decide to return to help us secure our elections and your vote, please respond as soon as possible. We have an ambitious battle plan for the rest of the year—but first I must know that we have the resources to make it happen.I look forward to your response.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9ma320qanokqrbgfivcoersn2ilmqjsaf5neltg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)
---
| | P.S. [**To secure our elections and your vote once and for all please click this link or the button below to make your critical gift today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmmcr2cf38pk9sl58656sok39t2m03b3afitdu38_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs) My friend, YOU are the difference between success and failure.
---
[ **SUPPORT AMAC ACTION** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgp2mnkn3snnj0smivk1n5o1inq6mm7bvafpdo4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zetq8pf3sjcj4gf1tg9der0ugrkoicf2kspphsv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)
---
_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0fkjfnv628c8799kkobd4nmeqg2rp2ji8ro3l2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjel6eo0lmoo5vt129c85hmpmrg1fvbs465a5usg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)
---
---
2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748
---
|
---

---

_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztb0prqkhg4qvln5u6gc74rijpn1jnq5gcr7hi78_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob5cthm0pb246h22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z416o6c040jtrfolgdu3950f224lj0snkiakgfco_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge1o70c5h2bs)_

name: James O'Keefe
subject: The corrupt are suing me – help me fight back
body:
Imagine me walking down a city street, heart pounding, knowing I’m about to confront someone who’s been caught red-handed, in his own words, betraying the American people from a position of truth.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1f03cs4mlpeg9bn3diqgegkrq4go55caes2eamo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge9pr6chh2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdflh0svgmp3nu3j9f3lvvb2larr9db7j90vjmu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge9pr6chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

Imagine me walking down a city street, heart pounding, knowing I'm about to confront someone who's been caught red-handed, in his own words, betraying the American people from a position of truth.

**That 's what I did with Jamie Mannina, a former FBI agent I caught in a lie**. I had his words on tape, undeniable proof of his hypocrisy. When I faced him, he didn't explain--he exploded, yelling, "You're an a**hole! A fraudster!"

I kept my cool, because the truth doesn't need to shout. But now, **Mannina 's suing me for "assault" and "slander"**, trying to punish me for exposing him.

And that's not the only fight. Project Veritas, the organization I founded, is coming after me with another lawsuit, burying me in costs. Each deposition runs **over $12,000** , and I've got four left.

I owe **$29,000** in legal fees already, and I need **$17,000** more for a new attorney to take on Mannina's case. That's **$46,000** I don't have--[**and I 'm running out of time and need your help**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu08jvmeemp0gn9epttljt0cic26dkg915h6g0o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge9pr6chh2bs).

Here's why this hits home: **I 'm the last investigative reporter going undercover**.

The mainstream media gave up on it--they'd rather cozy up to power than challenge it. But me and OMG? We're out there every day, shining a light on the dark corners no one else will touch. If these lawsuits shut me down, the corrupt win, and you lose your window into what's really happening.

**I need $46,000 to pay attorneys as soon as possible** , or I might not make it through this.

But if you [**donate now**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6tafch66gvlap6tma2hvsf7utmr9g487hbabvt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge9pr6chh2bs), you're not just helping me--you're claiming your stake in the truth.

You'll feel that fire of standing up to the powerful, that patriotic surge of knowing you're keeping our country honest. [**Your gift ensures I can keep exposing corruption**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zal4nmfffdsaph4jbmtgaag487aoth795304tag0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge9pr6chh2bs), so the elite can't hide from you.

It's a chance to be part of something bigger--a movement that refuses to let the truth die.

**[**Can you help me by donating today?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8vr0q7hvcvct39jf1gmrc1un5t3if90jkn0buco_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge9pr6chh2bs)**[

**Hit the link below to donate --it's fast, safe, and every bit pushes me closer to winning**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg4gct6dhu738odhslvmvvsg6o9jvp1q283g2r7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge9pr6chh2bs). I need **$46,000** , and I'm counting on you.

[**Donate Now to My Legal Defense Fund.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfhjp5hab20uro9iq0klf0fe56rh2rjs3f4d02o0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjge9pr6chh2bs)

Thank you. Let's keep the fight alive.

In Truth,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

It's a chance to be part of something bigger--a movement that refuses to let the truth die. . I need $46,000** , and I'm counting on you. Thank you. Let's keep the fight alive. subject: Gunman Targets Lawmakers, Army Turns 250, and a Puppy Cam
body:
Minnesota state representative Melissa Hortman and her husband were [shot and killed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u4zAQhJ9G6mRwKVKkChbXuPO1VwprcSXxwh-D3Njw2wdKkRdIORhgBt_377bcMMSQ97-YyPFWlkyvFomZ6rJ_5oSZse7ELeIr4QfVhjUtUkg9iGkAvXgM8b2o3ruNSNLYkwOj5tmChak_nEGEWWna0Ir5TsZa8EaCksJ4WtW9D-5cExNoEGIc1WUl1BsZ0ACkBKlOCfKBS738LyHzQVt8lyfVy1pSH93B_Gjd-KeT105e8XECnNUZKoc1UievKeRMrTAOPxxDOwoP3sx2JCC1ARptRlTWrHgHnO3qwci-Ov94hRhDm0ynxJ4wxO9n_pWup5NfAQAA__9ag34T) and a Minnesota state senator and his wife were shot and wounded at their homes around 2 a.m. on Saturday.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1yqzAQxfGngc6MVkh8FCpu4863TckssICSleSRNmb89hnyCin-5fkV5-MxPdCzj_t_DORkS1OkszCJUJ727xgwCuadpDCeAb8oF8xh0krbm-puYKcVPb8nU69uI9LU1uSgN-M4wABdfTjQM3arpcEOs-7RwHzVz7OZR7UA1d5dmurAglJta5qF0G7UgwUgo8hURtHqJeXmM_koB238Ti_KzZJCze4QeZaq_Vfpe6Xvz5yg4bT7BfkgZDmQhXJE8S8q16TS9yttzAgK6uzW5-mZfen6yqg9oOdfWf50x8vpnwAAAP__4E10Kg) | |
# Sunday, June 15, 2025
---|---
**Happy Father's Day!** On this day in 1847, [John Frémont set off from the Kansas River](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u2zAYAJ-G2mLwV5QGDnFdARmcFuiQuovwWfwo0SVFgWQsJE9fuK-Q_XA43Nt5PIMPfp1fIaKpLo0r7iVgrZjH-X2NsFbIM9YSYI_wF3OBHEdOuXqi7RNTowUfPkbZWOMQOYoGDdOy7zvWsbZZDLNwtZ3ugXVX3WGL2rXQ95Rp63oqr403DxttmWKUCiEPE4JyqJliDCVFSSRF62vKh1vya13QhY90x3yYUmyCWWrdChHPhA-ED-s-Qa5pzrAtfnoghA9bTvZ9qoXwgXGhKBFDySVUb4k4Pbt4_JG271Yt9NfwcmFu7vTvU88vP9_2-3U6fg708_byeta3kcbLcem_yT8cNsLbO2QPayXiJKnoBFeCdVJp0WRjt92H4EuriaRzBB_-59YvPb4b_i8AAP__Lp6NwA) on his first expedition of the Oregon Trail, with frontiersman Kit Carson as his guide. The expedition claimed the Rocky Mountains and the West for the United States. In honor of Father’s Day, reply to this email and share your favorite dad joke with us. We’ll go first: How many apples grow on trees? All of them! We're sponsored today by [Logical Health Alternatives.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1yqzAQxfGngc6MVkh8FCpu4863TckssICSleSRNmb89hnyCin-5fkV5-MxPdCzj_t_DORkS1OkszCJUJ727xgwCuadpDCeAb8oF8xh0krbm-puYKcVPb8nU69uI9LU1uSgN-M4wABdfTjQM3arpcEOs-7RwHzVz7OZR7UA1d5dmurAglJta5qF0G7UgwUgo8hURtHqJeXmM_koB238Ti_KzZJCze4QeZaq_Vfpe6Xvz5yg4bT7BfkgZDmQhXJE8S8q16TS9yttzAgK6uzW5-mZfen6yqg9oOdfWf50x8vpnwAAAP__4E10Kg) Be sure to check them out in today's edition.

## **Shooter kills Minnesota Lawmaker, Husband**
A manhunt is underway [for a suspect who posed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2K3DAURp9G7u4gybI9U6iYEBxSbJoUSypzx762lehnkO6s8NsHb5EXSPfBBwfOeX-b3tB5F7cfGMjymqZItXhipjxtrxgwMuaNuHisAf9QLpjDpKXuQPagumlB54_JNItdiTS1DVk1mNvtqq6qb3Z7HZSk69A_TEfSPBb9IEmrVPNNr71pH42zJ032qlNStq25zITdSoPqlCIjyQgjaXGc8uV3cpF3Wv2RPihf5hQab3fmZxHtXehR6LHWegklnp_QI0V4FaHHU0ro8XMjBBcjlcQIAY-UoeBRgGuCwsgE_0yhUiYoe2JwEXgnl2FPgQoQZn9AQX7lBY8TmuF-V9--b--_RDum2S2i_frl7Eq1_KT8bLJdntV570o_CCO3gM5_GvB_Zf-w-m8AAAD__78smc8) as a police officer and fatally shot Minnesota Rep. Melissa Hortman and her husband. He also wounded Sen. John Hoffman and his wife in targeted attacks Saturday. Rep. Hortman and her husband, Mark, were killed in their Brooklyn Park home, while Sen. Hoffman and his wife, Yvette, were shot five miles away in Champlin. Sen. [Hoffman is out of surgery](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3uozAQxJ8GOpBtDITCxTV0ufZKtDFr2MQfkb0XlLc_-V7h3_5GM5qZP_ftDuQpHr8hoGGXtohX8ciMeTv-xgCRIR_IxcMV4IW5QA6bEmrsxNTJcduB_HfT7W4cosKhRSNnvSw3eZNTe5plesyLhWGx1lmtnJ2E0w6UHcHuN3y0ZGqamOQohRgG3VuE0eEsRylRC9SNFrgTp9w_E0U-0flv-mDubQqtNyfzuzTDr0atjVqv6-rto9QVVW_UGihGLImhUWvFFaGnUqA7U-YAsXuR97h3z3TG7kzOVfZOnpgs-K6cKTHFozrbbPb3Rd5TmeZGiyMA-f9F-EfvfYz6FwAA___CRogD) and in stable condition, but his wife's condition remains unclear. Authorities identified the suspect as Vance Boelter, 57, a local businessman with an extensive [background in security and military](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0Mtu6yAYBOCnwTsswFycBYsjHXmXbqqqS-u3-e3QcomAxkqevkr7CF2PNJpv3s_zGXzwaX-BiLZteU541ICtYZn3rxQhNSg7thrgiPCJpUKJs2BCUaYpV7MDH-6z7JzdEAUOHVpu5Ok08pHr7mJPWptFmcUs2ihY-KL0usoFxkGNuMqt8_bZxjRXnLFhkP2KoDY0XHGOkqEkkqHzLZf-I_vULriFe75h6dccu2AvrV0rGf4RMRExwbI-Bf2enzER09srEdOeb_SA8KAFrzRHKNTlB6ZKo08Ja25AHca8FmiV_rIrEVNtudzJMHlHhv9ciFEaKUxXrLsePgRftSGS7RF8-BnT_vTgzYrvAAAA__-ol4XX) training, who exchanged gunfire with officers near the Hortman residence before fleeing the scene. Police recovered a list of potential targets from the suspect’s vehicle, naming dozens of Minnesota Democrats, including Gov. Tim Walz, Rep. Ilhan Omar, Sen. Tina Smith, and Attorney General Keith Ellison. Gov. Walz has [called the shootings](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQhZ8Gd1iA_5KCYht32XZLawyDzS4_EYxj5e1Xjq7uC9zuk0ZzdL7z57E8wAeftt8QUZPLS8KzBiTCsmxHipAIyoZUA5wR_mGpUOKihBq4GLkcFgs-vJe-sdohKuwa1HLq7_ebvMmx2bWbBLrJCoWrMbiiE92qBhytMtZNODVeX2lilIMUouv61iAMDic5SIm9wJ71Aq2nXNq_2Sfa0YV3fmFpTY5N0DvRs7LuF1MzU_N5nm1azWVx3ZmaL2RqPir_ouBfyNeQN6bm6FPCmgn4tx-ve87k08YjpP1IxD8Px9MCYeXFJFCyE3fRFG2fpw_B13Fivdgi-PApRT9a8qXV_wAAAP___oOLmA) "_an act of targeted political violence_."
## Trump Protests Don't Dampen Army Parade
The U.S. Army celebrated its 250th anniversary with [a military parade](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O5CAUhE-DM1qAAdsBwSZkvemGFgsPmxl-LKDb49uPPFeY6OmpSp-q6t9zfZoQQ97-mgSq-7JmOFuE3qGu2ysnk7upG_QWzZnMJ9RmaloZYQITialYnQnxWvnglAdgMA6g6MSXZaYzlcOujOXyv6XTwvzigY5-tm5mVgoxg3dSDkHdNCKpoISMI39YMMLDRAWlwAlwxAm40Et9fJSQ-w4-XuUN9WFLGqLaez8aGv8gphHT-TpK67eEmL7BiGkiEdOUI6ZfDd_9ENPnbjruBcPXAbbj-6mvdDTMBU4hxlDyfUM39cKHqcYBDhk7i5geqnLHeZuanBAnWzIh_qTpv5rwrdh3AAAA__9Gt4Ut) through Washington D.C. on Saturday, while activists held nationwide protests against the Trump administration’s immigration policies. Hundreds of thousands of spectators were expected for the parade, which included close to 6,600 soldiers and hundreds of vehicles and aircraft, Army officials said. The [“No Kings" protest website](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzz1uKyEUQOHVzHQeAQMMFBSvcefXpkTX5oKJ-bGAGHn3UbKFLOAc6fu42AvEFEv4DxnN8NUWnD3hGNhs-CoZyoAWcPQEM8MDW4eWLSNMnIg8UWEdxPS2fHXGIzLcVzT04Forqqhc78YJSpWX6LRzSotDKakdglZX4RVc2RrNz41IKigh-863G4LweFBBKXKCfOEEXRy1bZ81lnFHn971hW271bwmcx_j2Zf938LOCzvPObdSH7GEvtUWFnZem3HPGVOKXR4LJyFDTL_t-BP4Zdh3AAAA__8STWpK) included a reminder to protestors: _“We expect all participants to seek to de-escalate any confrontation with those who disagree with our values.”_ Activists [planned to protest](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQhp_GbET2YUMYPHRhS9eO6BIf5FobLPuSKG9f0Vfo_Ev_p-_7uswX5Mjb-omJvCz7vNGrRhKhMq-PLeEmWFaSGvGV8IdKxZJm0OBa3bfGzQE5vmfbBL8QAXUNeTPYcTybs-mbuye0gOA0LOeFbD-46zWMACOiIegpNOyPN90bZ7TuOnu6EbqFBuOMIavJKqspsOzl9L3zJnda4nt_Ujnd9tREfxfJVXUfCiYFE-ZD4JgUTJGfpGCS8ki5TRxZsLzbjAUDtbnsQlVq-8gBhWpTfMgvjpFrPyir14Qc_xjyrzBPD78BAAD__0fledA) in all 50 states and Washington, D.C.
## List: Ranking the Best School Districts
A report shows that Adlai E. Stevenson High School District No. 125, north of Chicago, is [the top school district in the U.S](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO6yAURVdjd1iAwcEFxW_S5bdTWi_4YTMBE8FLUHY_8mxh-qt7dM7XbblBiOHY_kNCSz4vB7YakQjLsr2OBAdB2ZBqhJbggaVCSYvkUjM-MaGXFUL8LKpfrUeUOPZoxUXNsxFGTP1uHdcglJHjOjt-18aDR303mmsntTa-D_Z845PQgvNxVIND0B4vQguBiqPqFMc1UC7Ddw4H7ejjJ7-xDC6nPtqd6Fm78V8nr528ttaGU6EhPs5BJ68JnswHTx92x0qsuj3nyNZQqQRHlb0qk9yM0zz3xa7PFmIMdbp0im8JQvzF0J_avK38CQAA___ur3kz). Niche evaluated over 11,000 districts to rank the nation’s top 50 schools, with many top performers located in New York, Illinois, California, the Upper Midwest, and the Northeast. Schools were evaluated for academic performance, teacher quality, availability of clubs and extracurricular activities, college preparation resources, and administrative effectiveness. Districts were also [ranked at the state and city](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFuwyAUgOHT4C0WDwNOBoYu3tK1I3oxD5sGcAQ0KLev0it0_qVP-r-u9oohhrx9YiLT_GEz9RqpNSp2-8kJc8OyUasRe8I7lYolWcGFOnF9AmUdhviycnDGEwmaBjIwy8vlDGfQw270pFZ_hpsD0nrWaiL0blY3f5vJaa-GYN4a16CA82mS40qoPM2gAEhykkxycqEdZfw-Qm47-fg6nlTG9UhDNHtrj8qmDyYWJpbe-5jDutO7MrHcQTCxFMz3kLfKxDIU4x49xBiqnpnkW8IQ_6j2r_-nEb8BAAD__0ugbv4) levels.

On this day in 1847, on his first expedition of the Oregon Trail, with frontiersman Kit Carson as his guide. The expedition claimed the Rocky Mountains and the West for the United States. In honor of Father’s Day, reply to this email and share your favorite dad joke with us. We’ll go first: How many apples grow on trees? All of them! We're sponsored today by Be sure to check them out in today's edition. | Shooter kills Minnesota Lawmaker, Husband A manhunt is underway as a police officer and fatally shot Minnesota Rep. Melissa Hortman and her husband. He also wounded Sen. John Hoffman and his wife in targeted attacks Saturday. Rep. Hortman and her husband, Mark, were killed in their Brooklyn Park home, while Sen. Hoffman and his wife, Yvette, were shot five miles away in Champlin. Sen. and in stable condition, but his wife's condition remains unclear. Authorities identified the suspect as Vance Boelter, 57, a local businessman with an extensive training, who exchanged gunfire with officers near the Hortman residence before fleeing the scene. Police recovered a list of potential targets from the suspect’s vehicle, naming dozens of Minnesota Democrats, including Gov. Tim Walz, Rep. Ilhan Omar, Sen. Tina Smith, and Attorney General Keith Ellison. Gov. Walz has "an act of targeted political violence." Trump Protests Don't Dampen Army Parade The U.S. Army celebrated its 250th anniversary with through Washington D.C. on Saturday, while activists held nationwide protests against the Trump administration’s immigration policies. Hundreds of thousands of spectators were expected for the parade, which included close to 6,600 soldiers and hundreds of vehicles and aircraft, Army officials said. The included a reminder to protestors: “We expect all participants to seek to de-escalate any confrontation with those who disagree with our values.” Activists in all 50 states and Washington, D.C. Schools were evaluated for academic performance, teacher quality, availability of clubs and extracurricular activities, college preparation resources, and administrative effectiveness. body:
#
Good morning and happy Father’s Day.
We want you to get back to spending time with loved ones, so we’ll keep this short.
Beto is hitting the road with Bernie Sanders for two town halls in Texas to call out corruption and the billionaire takeover of our government.
But they can’t keep up this fight alone. Town Halls like this take serious resources — from filling up the gas tank to putting organizers on the ground — and that’s where you come in.
[**Can you chip in $2.99 – the average cost of a morning coffee in Texas – to help power this work across Texas?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250615.4IZJyr&refcode=ema20250615-240152&t=1&akid=240152%2E444211%2EMBv3aq)
It might not seem like much, but when enough people pitch in just a few dollars at a time, we can fuel a movement that’s bigger than billionaires and stronger than corporate PACs.
Thank you for standing with us,
Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250615-240152-footer&t=2&refcode2=240152_444211_MBv3aq&akid=240152%2E444211%2EMBv3aq)**

body:

# Sunday, June 15, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1943, a two-day race riot [erupted in Beaumont](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDtywyAQQE-DOmlY9LEpKNKoc9qUGhCLxQSxGthY9u0z8RVygffevK_bcrMxxXz_tDsafgZaMp41ITOW5SjEWLnGzPi0lelINns686KkGls5tTAu3sb0WobGGye9hgYNXAatr6PS0GymX3EaEcK0jsF7J4N27mLdKkE7PXnZRPMHkxOMABLUtQM7yRAAsb-OEPQgBok-MpWON3yHhPSiB5Zupb1JZmM-qug_hJqFms_z7LhulnKKGTsqd6HmzWbviL6FmjFziViFmh3an50ytyUStxRa0EPfFOOPM6YU63QRg7zvNqa3iP-352HUbwAAAP__9n58AA) when a white woman accused a black man of assaulting her. Acting governor A. M. Aikin Jr. declared martial law, and two people were killed while 200 were arrested. What would you do if your flight was evacuated because a [drunk passenger refused to leave](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQRp8Gd0QwsbEpKLahu9tuaREzjlEIWMzk7-1Xzivc-pOOznf-_cw_IeVUrn_DHR2_1zoXfFFGZmzz3iojMaXC-A7Edc-hxPoqMygYpDJSD3MMKX_mvovuoqLVHTo99tZOA1jdbU7HM1hlQ8RlWswIplf6MqygbYyjiVOX3AFTRg9aKw3TSQej1lUjnqdBr7YXvcKYuLYTb_gVWfOnPrGdlnrvstuYdxLnPwK8AF8-eyU-JgH-IAvwygjwuhfgHySPfwJ8bI9ywyIjZg7yFhoW2ZASMcnQGhLLtbYFSVbesMk9EGG5YiPJVUa81NCiPIKgAN81F_dXyjmRGUWvrveQ8tePf1f16eB_AAAA__8ujY2R)? ## Statewide Protests Erupt
Multiple cities across Texas [were flooded with protesters](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunTAMhp8mbEGxCQGGDF2y3a4dUe6NOSdtSBBxD4e3r0DqE9zRsuX_-_5fH_OHjynmx0-_kuX3UuZMR03ETPu87YWpco2Z6e0rly35HMqRZ1TYS2Uk9HPwMZ2zboL9VGGChiwMeprGHidonlYHRDN8GkQcTNf1BL1CDINZBj12ODbRXs-UgR5AAY4teKOWBYi6sYdl0kIrCpHL3vKTbpAlneVFe_tV1ibZJ_NWRfdDoBPojuNoK3umuvp8XQh0lct-CnSX2j16JoHuyhXolBHooLv2Rf6J-VFl8Kf8Ly_vSJnKl-dYcpWr3-Tvv5kkaIFu1DB2CoxSg0DX7DZsR0wpVjMIrR6rj-nm5O-1-7L4LwAA__8M8IvR) as part of the nationwide "No Kings Day" protests aimed at President Trump. At least 15 protests were held [across North Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGurCAQhp8GOwwgohQUt7Hb297SsDKs3INgYHbdffsTTc4TnGqSmfyT7_v_3eabDTGkx1-7gcG3z3OCo0ZAhDLvJSNUrCEhvG3FvEebXD7SLJjoKVOU97OzIX5m2ThzZ07zBgwfpNZjLzRvVnMfmVQeRtUtgx4ESKtEt2jnJAPPtG-COZ8xxXvOGRdjy61i3nOAbuy515JIBi5gLi2ucIH4-MkvKO2StyaaFXGvpPtDxETEdBxHu9zraXHeiZiuCBHTuTpHpl8hPSq1CQPF8tx2-iNKUy640itB_z8TUC7piUfE1BTj9iPEGKoaiGSPzYZ4IeDvinsZ8R0AAP__42eD-g) as organizers urged peaceful, lawful demonstrations against the Trump administration’s immigration policy and what they called growing authoritarianism. Authorities evacuated the Texas Capitol and surrounding grounds after[ identifying a credible threat](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUj-vnD4Q_DSm8wmv_4ALip9-L3QvipRIKZHBy50Vg5G997j79hFckipdKo92xuMd735_H95diGG9fnYLdvSY07DiXiISYR62nAgLlbASPlyhtEW3-rSvA9SgeW240IN3IT4HVflurL0VFXaiUda2Gqyobl1j5WzsLBs_CtCmkcYK7eYRJ6Vqa2wVusOsNkILUQtoL8KZep4Fomy1mK1iqkYfKOUL3fBsZI7P9IH5MqWlit2NaCtM_segZ9A_jiqD_tvj7ctXBn0hR_fCoBdWSmtao7RphdJCC81kn3EeSp6YfKP9OEHrTzTvDHTzP-2TW7ZXaUckXEb0vxjCvJzM32xfkms-BeAmPyqr7Dyia8Z21DC2XgmNABpUK1tjnIDx95NpPa8VMTAwR3v3HJl8e6UEfeTUR1IN_b7vl3Wc_Ly_Qmvoj-mdIKbJxROdX8b_EGviP8J6LTy7GJ-8BELuiL9Uk9sCpcgJly1ll0N88immgp77O3JKnG4ZHZ1OsjXSivrEVe78tocYQzENU_V1cSGeA6J_W6uPDn4GAAD__1aH1p0) targeting state lawmakers scheduled to attend, prompting a temporary closure for public safety. Gov. Greg Abbott [deployed over 5,000 National Guard](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ_G7ogWAo4pKK5J9197pbUOi42EwYK9OHn7k_0K141mpE-f5s_P9IMxxbz8xo0cf0KZMh0tETPVaa-FqXGLmemDjcueMPty5EmBMgIGIc3kMabvpHvvZvBW9uTkQ1s7GmVlvzoCFeBhrLrbOVgYkMAgGpjDCKj90Ed3wmCQRkqQarxJHCAESXQfjQxWdxrIRy71xitdIiF9y5vq7VW2PrmVeW_d_Vennp16Hsdx21qeX-faqeeVzx75tXbqeQHEUt5iqbQInOfCLDztqXybOLHCCAAQGTmWjEksf7F6wbWUvQmlpR7kqOyooa_O70dMKbbh0WlYNozpkuL_u_Lt1L8AAAD__6NniQU) troops and 2,000 state police ahead of the protests, though officials withheld the specific deployment locations.
## Church Founder Sued
A woman has sued [Gateway Church founder Robert Morris](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O5CAQhuHT4KxaQPunHTjYxNlsuqFVmKJBwmBBeey-_cpzhYlLevXU9-9r-cIQQ3r_xY0mvlxeEp01EjOVZS-ZqXINienCynmPmGw-06Kl7kD2oLrFYoifpW3sZKQdVUOTGtpxfHV6VI2fnDLt6KRzrh-NGcyKQ2s63VOrnp0ZbBOmOyZ71SkllX49FPbSOUX0fHXKja1oJdnAuTzY0w_ExU_-pvJY89bEyTPvVTz_CD0LPafPnivfJ6Hnuyz0LHuhZ_UUej4q3P8JPdMFG71x9UdZPbh8JEsFfGA4A3tQG0Q86xEY1ohhC-kNla4DI6A5KgEmCxTR5IJMsN4eOHaoq6eNhJ6bMtn9DDGG2g-ile8NQ_wR8-92_p70_wAAAP__GnKUgA), alleging that the former Texas megachurch pastor sexually assaulted and abused her when she was 12 years old. Cindy Clemishire alleges Morris sexually abused her in 1982 while he stayed at her family’s home, according to the lawsuit. Morris [previously acknowledged](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOrCAUhJ9GOwygoBYUt7Hb297SHOW4kotg4Ljsvv0f9xX-diaZ-Wb-PeYHOO_C8y8caOi9xTlgyR6JMM1nioSZsguEb8gUTw_BxhJmyaViXDOhZgvOf-autmbhdhQ1GtF34zgoOYp6Ny1wzXFZNq600qBHiRIVLnKQPYqW187cYVwLJQQXcmgEaL5tArEdlNjGruo4WkcxNbTjF2Tzn_jC1KzxqL3Zic5ctX8qOVVyKqU0Llg8MVgM1Kyxuf5Xcrpn3XZM3lZyggOTW-GWUlwwETtiSi6zJxAW-LB1v9K6MwveQ2bfWgbLlZF5KPlyxBbZ67EXbbPT4etk7Fmc9y7rvur48wDnv4D0u1tfRv4EAAD__yqfj3A) inappropriate conduct with a minor during that time. Clemishire is seeking $1M in damages. You can[ read the full lawsuit here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOgyAYhJ8GbzX8CCIHDptNbNpN99qjoeXHklAwSNW-_ca-wp5n8s3ku16Gi_HBx_HXPFGXzaUh4joHLAXzMOVUcC6zjwU3M5c0BRNtWuPAKBMH2h5ADNb48B54ZfWNWgUVapBcqU4wBdVDcy5B3ZjswAhzbxugDNBI0TGFTt545fUOoy0IAAqsq8G01DlAbDoBTnHCKVpfUq7LAz9HXHinBXN9T88q6Ecp00yaL8J6wnqb_YL1mNIYcC8Q1jsfcE8I6yHKl8pha44vfp7SyR5PP0Ve4-HVnO2373fI4nGtsrbT6kPwcysJp-PT-PDZK_-ztGj2FwAA___Y-Xsg).
## List: Shops at La Cantera Voted No. 1
San Antonio’s Shops at La Cantera topped [a national list](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOgzAQBNCvMR3I62DAhYtr6HLtlWiJl2DJsS17LyR_fyK_cPWMnkbzc12u6IOP9298kOXXlpZIRw3ETGXJJTFVrj4yvbByygGjS0dclFS6lUMLenHow3vpG2dX6Qw0ZGHsjZm0MtDs1jhUUg24yhHcNmpjCEaSdDNGT-tgGm9PTA6gASSoqQMc5LYB0WXSsJle9JKc51Q63ukzZAvv9KTS3dKjCXZnzlVcvoSahZpBrlS5-63IyeH77Ag144HFVaHmM2zrnnL28d7eKDIVoeamWJcPH4Kvwyh6eX-gDx-f__fK06q_AAAA__-NYHe5) of the 10 best shopping centers for its outstanding retail experience. Stefanik invoked an executive order on immigration signed by Hochul, along with a number of recent crimes committed by those who were in the country without authorization, The name, on its face, is unobjectionable, even vaguely noble: “No Kings.” Americans, after all, did declare independence from one. But the historical overtones here mask something more recent and considerably less authentic. For all its revolutionary rhetoric, the ‘No Kings’ protest movement is not a spontaneous uprising of civic-minded dissidents. It is a coordinated, By F Riehl AmmoLand The Democrat’s gun owner entrapment bill, SB 243, which passed in the Senate with the tacit approval of Republicans, is now scheduled for a hearing in the House Rules Committee tomorrow at 2:30 PM in Hearing Room D. As you know, this bill makes instant criminals out of Oregonians who lawfully obtained and lawfully used certain devices such as forced reset By Sheri Walsh Space War President Donald Trump announced Tuesday that Army bases, which honored Confederate leaders before 2023, will have their original names reinstated. Trump said, “it’s no time to change.” Trump made the announcement during a speech at Fort Bragg to celebrate the Army’s 250th birthday, which will also be celebrated this weekend PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178

name: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Should we send more troops to Los Angeles?
body:
Foreign nationals and communist anarchists have declared war on our government and are violently attacking, burning, and rioting in one of the largest cities in America.

| | | | |
---
Fellow patriot, foreign nationals and communist anarchists have declared war on our government and are violently attacking, burning, and rioting in one of the largest cities in America.
The pictures and videos from the illegal immigrant invasion riots in Los Angeles are shocking. Just look at what is happening in what used to be one of the most beautiful cities in the world.
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aDv9/?__vbtrk=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
To put it clearly, military age men from foreign countries are unleashing chaos on an American city and committing violence against federal agents who are carrying out lawful orders.
**_[Friend, I need to know right now if you think we need to send in more troops to stop these insurrectionists and detain and deport every illegal alien invader in the city](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aDv9/?__vbtrk=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
[TAKE THE POLL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aDv9/?__vbtrk=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The Democrats brought in over 30,000 National guard troops after a 3 hour mostly peaceful protest at the Capitol on Jan 6, 2021. Now, their illegal alien invaders are taking over a major American city while Democrat leaders are condemning President Trump’s decision to send in the National Guard.
**_[I urgently need to know if America First patriots agree that we need to deploy tens of thousands of National Guard troops to quell this insurrection and restore law and order to California](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aDv9/?__vbtrk=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
[TAKE THE POLL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aDv9/?__vbtrk=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
United under our sovereign flag,
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aDv9/?__vbtrk=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aDv9/?__vbtrk=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

### **_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aDuZ/?__vbtrk=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2NDY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=296467&trkid=742616037&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Riots rage over ICE: Philly's perspective
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=57d6f301a2&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Northampton County’s ‘full cooperation’ claim clashes with ICE courthouse restrictions](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=910817bce4&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
After the Department of Homeland Security kicked up controversy by publishing a list of “sanctuary” governments, Northampton County Executive Lamont McClure (D) reacted with indignation at his county’s inclusion. **“** We fully cooperate with ICE,” McClure said in a video aired by a local television station, referring to U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement. Even though DHS would later take down its list, McClure’s statement — full cooperation — is directly contradicted, however, by previous reporting. **Why It Matters.** “We believe that undocumented individuals who commit crimes should be deported. That is why we go well beyond what most jurisdictions do: Northampton County honors I.C.E. immigration detainers for up to 48 hours. This is a significant and proactive measure, underscoring our commitment to both public safety and lawful cooperation,” McClure said in his statement. But Berger did not respond to follow-up questions about the 2020 executive order, and the AP’s description of that order as a “restriction.” She also did not respond to questions as to whether she or McClure ever approached the AP to dispute the “restrictions” characterization. Berger had well over a day to respond to the follow-up questions. The AP said the executive order at issue “prohibits Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents from arresting people at the county courthouse or jail unless they have provided county officials with a detainer request and then show up with a warrant signed by a federal judge.” ICE has maintained that a signed federal warrant has never been legally required. The matter takes additional significance given that McClure, a Democrat,[ is a candidate](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=513570e871&e=b7b3eddce2) for Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District, a seat currently occupied by Republican Rep. Ryan Mackenzie. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0d828722d9&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[It’s getting easier to separate the good guys from the bad guys](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3b1ec10d50&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
President Trump has directed the National Guard to protect Los Angeles and its residents. After days of violence, riots and police cars burning — rioters waving flags for Mexico and Palestine, and burning American flags — Trump stepped-in to bring calm because their Mayor and Governor had been silent or, worse, explaining the rioters’ case.

Governor Gavin Newsom went from absent and silent to trying to explain that all was well. Then, he had a plan. Now, he’s suing Trump in court to block the National Guard — while the cars are still smoldering, and more savagery is being threatened.

How the two parties responded to the riots tells us everything about where we are as a nation. Remembering why we have twelve million illegal immigrants — far too many with criminal records — also tells us so much. Those lessons are as important as what is happening in LA.
The politicians are making it easy for us to choose sides.

**Why It Matters**. The politicians on the side of the illegal immigrants, professional agitators, and even ordinary Americans who are wearing masks, burning police cars, and throwing rocks at police officers — and waving the flags of foreign governments — are not the good guys. No, it’s not at all acceptable just because they were “provoked” by what Trump did or might do.

Trump, police officers, ICE, and National Guard stopping the rioters — and the politicians defending them — are the good guys.

We have to choose. There’s too much at stake. There are existential threats to America. Not the childish, ideologically driven chants of the Left; there are actual threats to our safety, our children, our quality of life, our nation.

**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7bea0e0170&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Dan Bartkowiak: Don’t let them in — Pennsylvania must not lose to the marijuana industry](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d67ce688b7&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Sell the mansions, but keep the beauty of the church](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=acd6b30dc4&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Court delivers key transparency victories in Shapiro records fight](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d8a760cd13&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: ICE arrests local Russian national accused of al Qaeda membership](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=075bd26ad1&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[John Rossi: Philly sports writers, a biased opinion](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b9a3143785&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[David Reel: Too little, too late](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f49b9fe356&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Bolno + Gambescia: On Biden, aging, candor, and public responsibility](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=54b7b9a760&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ae4256b042&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
By the time you read this, the “No Kings” protests around the country will have ended. According to [Kim Strassel of the _Wall Street Journal_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=758f0695e4&e=b7b3eddce2), none of this street theater is likely to change much. “Political memories are short, but none more fleeting than that of the Democratic collective. We’ve been doing this for nearly a decade, and always to the left’s detriment.” Our First Amendment protects “the right of the people peaceably to assemble, and to petition the Government for a redress of grievances,” and Americans should not hesitate to exercise that natural right when they believe it is necessary. But President Trump won an election just seven months ago, and nearly all of those assembled Saturday voted against him (or would have, if they were citizens). Little has changed since then in voter sentiments, and this protest is not likely to shift anyone’s thinking. And when such protests turn violent, as they often do, it only turns people away from their cause.

It’s a free country, and those who enjoy protesting should do so — peacefully. But don’t expect the rest of the country to follow.
---
|

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

body:

| If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/k2wI51AaiosTO29sp8892g892w)** to be removed.

First, I want to say **thank you**. You've stood by me through every battle, every expose, every late-night dig for the truth. Because of your support, I've been able to expose the corruption and betrayal that the mainstream media refuses to touch.

**You 've fueled this fight, and I'm beyond grateful for your trust and loyalty.**

But here's the truth: the swamp is fighting back harder than ever, and I need your help to keep pushing forward. My bills are piling up, and the deep state is doing everything it can to silence me. They've censored me, smeared me, and tried to bury me--[**but with you by my side, they 've failed every time.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PByx4E74mBvSkyn4S6J892ng/k2wI51AaiosTO29sp8892g892w)

Let me catch you up on what we've accomplished together in recent weeks--and [**why I need your continued support to keep the momentum going.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PByx4E74mBvSkyn4S6J892ng/k2wI51AaiosTO29sp8892g892w)

**The Recent Stories We 've Broken Together**

* **Summits of the Americas:** Thanks to your support, I was able to travel and expose how Biden holdovers like Jennifer Showell and Thomas Hastings are turning this critical event into a woke, pro-China disaster. They're undermining Trump's America First policies, but because of you, their betrayal is out in the open.

* **Obama Holdover in the State Department:** I uncovered Nathanael Swanson, an Obama loyalist still sabotaging Trump's Iran strategy from inside the State Department. Your donations funded the research and legwork that brought this traitor into the light.

* **Dan Goldman 's Democrat Cover-Up Machine:** With your help, I've been tracking Rep. Dan Goldman's efforts to shield violent Democrats like LaMonica McIver while waging lawfare against Trump. We're holding them accountable, one story at a time.

* **Democrats Ignoring Pro-Hamas Violence:** When two Israeli diplomats were murdered in D.C. by a pro-Hamas terrorist, Democrats like Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib stayed silent. But you and I didn't--we called them out, and we're still demanding answers.

* **DEI Judge Blocking Trump 's Vision:** I exposed how Biden-appointed Judge Myong J. Joun, whose family profits from DEI consulting, blocked Trump's order to dismantle the Department of Education. Your support keeps me digging into these judicial conflicts of interest that the media ignores.

**Why I Need You Now**

These wins are just the beginning, but the fight is far from over. The deep state is relentless, and so are their attacks on me. My travel costs, research expenses, and basic survival bills are stacking up fast. I'm not backing down--I'm doubling down--[**but I can 't do it without you.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PByx4E74mBvSkyn4S6J892ng/k2wI51AaiosTO29sp8892g892w)

[**Your donation today isn 't just a contribution; it's a lifeline**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PByx4E74mBvSkyn4S6J892ng/k2wI51AaiosTO29sp8892g892w). It keeps me on the road, in the field, and breaking the stories that protect Trump's America First agenda.

[**Every dollar you give is a direct blow to the corrupt elite trying to silence us. And right now, I need you to step up again.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PByx4E74mBvSkyn4S6J892ng/k2wI51AaiosTO29sp8892g892w)

**Stand With Me --Again**

You've been with me from the start, and [**I 'm asking you to stand with me once more. **](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PByx4E74mBvSkyn4S6J892ng/k2wI51AaiosTO29sp8892g892w)

**[**Donate now**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PByx4E74mBvSkyn4S6J892ng/k2wI51AaiosTO29sp8892g892w)**[**and let 's keep exposing the traitors, the liars, and the sellouts**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PByx4E74mBvSkyn4S6J892ng/k2wI51AaiosTO29sp8892g892w). Together, we're unstoppable. **Let 's make sure they never forget that.**

With Vigilance,
Laura Loomer

**P.S.** As a thank you for [**your continued support**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PByx4E74mBvSkyn4S6J892ng/k2wI51AaiosTO29sp8892g892w), I'll be sharing exclusive updates and behind-the-scenes insights with my top donors. **You 're not just a supporter--you're a partner in this fight. Let's keep winning together.**

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Was it worth it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Was it worth it? For the TRUTH - you bet!
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=be27609d7d0c4d8c8a2fce7d29917c05&_e=yAPv_zcfHpabqafrvznvn3Li7OTkFdRla1lgqWbdLkR8npWb8TZj_HUkaKym13YKt9pSBozvGj_bwle-dQffS2YMRNbwWhnVxwuRvyjabwfY0wmPAWbvfaWm1vMVC7urvua9IjQZTJ7u4reXD4LNkUNSqvq2KSsx-iS-eOkJMzZKa7J_GJ9lJdEK74eLw4UWJz5GYwUf19pfuDPmO2zv3ElHeAo2JyY1C5mkrXoiBgGvissaltLUDVYdYOB4EWwUgJ_U_pCBMa4BSvTcrX-aEu54ZRIISyh_DX9_FyInHUlMyP7XYaBIK5x9jUc7nNSwlNOC_SBSvehmIqwl2GbI4Ak9pzU-_Iiqn3lxdCH2BedaGDNEDJxX_lYGg1SCVF8c)
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
Over the course of the last two years, many friends and kind souls have asked me if it was worth it.
---
Was it worth it to be relentlessly targeted by the Democrats’ Deep State all because I defended our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump – from unimaginable and vicious witch hunts and refused to disavow the truth?
---
These rabid leftists have labeled me a “ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me into BANKRUPTCY, and even now, are _still_ attempting to throw me in PRISON for the rest of my life, but the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=be27609d7d0c4d8c8a2fce7d29917c05&_e=yAPv_zcfHpabqafrvznvn3Li7OTkFdRla1lgqWbdLkR8npWb8TZj_HUkaKym13YKt9pSBozvGj_bwle-dQffS2YMRNbwWhnVxwuRvyjabwfY0wmPAWbvfaWm1vMVC7urvua9IjQZTJ7u4reXD4LNkUNSqvq2KSsx-iS-eOkJMzZKa7J_GJ9lJdEK74eLw4UWJz5GYwUf19pfuDPmO2zv3DxmX1qV2dCTa7Nr_qr64DjqaRCvxC_1GoX4e3WGUwRwR5r8tHh2EZHldeIJ6IIgMLoeE4f5Z6QelUcPZEOCM1lBVztvq22QArrHcD-rqMFW-TMSAvAzUmJqdCuC9s0YJqE8Se9En27TZzaqpJtuK5O8SS_gDm_fcHnVWV-jS5Wn)
__
---
...Being an _enemy_ of the Deep State like President Trump is not something to fear, _it’s a badge of honor – a sign that you were willing to take the arrows for what you know is RIGHT!_
---
**_So yes, Fellow Patriot. For the truth, liberty, and justice – you bet it was worth it._**
---
When I look back at the past few years and all that the Radical Democrats and the Biden-Harris _regime_ did to try and make an example out of me, I have ZERO REGRETS.
---
My resolve _NEVER_ wavered, and that’s all thanks to you!
---
_Every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like _YOU_._
---
**But there is one thing I must confess: through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts.**
---
And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own.
---
Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along...
---
_This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry._
---
**That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $100,000 this month for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a _FREE_ man.**
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---

clean_body: Was it worth it? For the TRUTH - you bet! | Fellow Patriot, Over the course of the last two years, many friends and kind souls have asked me if it was worth it. Was it worth it to be relentlessly targeted by the Democrats’ Deep State all because I defended our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump – from unimaginable and vicious witch hunts and refused to disavow the truth? These rabid leftists have labeled me a “ DEAD MAN WALKING ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me into BANKRUPTCY, and even now, are still attempting to throw me in PRISON for the rest of my life, but the TRUTH remains... ...Being an enemy of the Deep State like President Trump is not something to fear, it’s a badge of honor – a sign that you were willing to take the arrows for what you know is RIGHT! So yes, Fellow Patriot. For the truth, liberty, and justice – you bet it was worth it. When I look back at the past few years and all that the Radical Democrats and the Biden-Harris regime did to try and make an example out of me, I have ZERO REGRETS. My resolve NEVER wavered, and that’s all thanks to you! Every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like YOU. But there is one thing I must confess: through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts. And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own. Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along... This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry. That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $100,000 this month for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man. I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in your hands. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

humbly asking for your help

Fellow Patriot, my name is Ashley Moody.

name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: please don't click away from this important message.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

🌤️ To all of Jon Ossoff's supporters, please don't click away from this important message. 🇺🇸
We know it’s early on a Sunday, so we'll get right to the point: _we're asking you to make a contribution to Jon Ossoff's re-election campaign before our midnight fundraising deadline._

If everyone reading this donated just $10, we would not only be able to demonstrate to the media and our opponents a MASSIVE number of donations, but we’d also have the resources we need to build a strong foundation for Jon’s campaign.
And that’s especially important now, because after this month’s FEC deadline, our fundraising numbers will be public for everyone to see.

Unfortunately, not everyone gives. And the fact that this seat is Republicans’ TOP target is not going to make things easier. So Jon is counting on people who understand how important these early donations are to chip in to his campaign today.
Our team has set a one-day contribution goal of _5,000 individual contributions_ before midnight to hit our mid month fundraising goal. And whether you can chip in $1 or $100, _the most important thing is that you’re choosing to be a part of this campaign._

[**If re-electing Jon Ossoff and keeping this seat out of MAGA hands is your goal, then making a contribution today — ahead of Jon’s midnight deadline — is the single best thing you can do to make it happen. You can chip in here:**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250615-1-full&t=1&akid=479%2E5691347%2Eo0JRfs)

Friend —
Today, we’re only asking you to chip in $3 to make sure Jay Jones wins the Democratic Primary this Tuesday. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-final-week-fund_em_q22025?amount=3]
That’s not a typo, team — just $3 to help elect a champion for Virginia families who will never bow to Trump or wealthy special interests.
You might think your three dollars won’t make an impact — after all, corporate special interests are spending nearly $1 million to defeat our grassroots campaign.
But it’s not just your $3, friend.
It’s $3 from a teacher in Norfolk. $3 from a social worker in Charlottesville. $3 from a bus driver in Falls Church—along with thousands of others. Because of supporters like you, friend, this is a grassroots campaign that can compete with the outrageous special interest spending pouring into this race.
And with you on our side, we’ll win.
