name: Zoe Bunnell
subject: Help me wish Chris a happy Father’s Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Derek — it’s Zoe, Chris’s wife, and mom to our four amazing children here! [**Since it’s Father’s Day, I wanted to surprise Chris with a card signed by his top supporters—and I’d love if you’d add your name:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109627920/551715821/-1045546376?refcode=email_061525_fathersday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGVmYjgwZS1mMTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8iCtrfeVz_anArk51TwJLobSF8-diAiD1aJbiPVip_s=&emci=c5e53347-b647-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=44efb80e-f149-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894) | | [Sign the card →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109627923/551715832/-1045546376?refcode=email_061525_fathersday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGVmYjgwZS1mMTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8iCtrfeVz_anArk51TwJLobSF8-diAiD1aJbiPVip_s=&emci=c5e53347-b647-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=44efb80e-f149-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894)
---
I first met Chris over a decade ago when we were in law school, and I could never have imagined the future we’d have together from there.

In addition to watching Chris grow as a father to all our kids, I’ve also watched him grow as a devoted leader and public servant. I’ve seen how he’s been able to balance our busy lives, family life, and his career, while always remaining steadfast in his commitment to serving others.

In everything he does, Chris demonstrates compassion, dedication, and honesty. And he’s brought these values with him to Congress, where he’s working to build a better future for our family and all the other families here in Western Pennsylvania.

I’ve also seen how much _your_ support means to him. He’s determined to fight for you, and I know that he appreciates your support in return.
[**So Derek, if you have a moment today, please sign Chris’s Father’s Day card. I know how much it would mean to him to see your name →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109627926/551715842/-1045546376?refcode=email_061525_fathersday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGVmYjgwZS1mMTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8iCtrfeVz_anArk51TwJLobSF8-diAiD1aJbiPVip_s=&emci=c5e53347-b647-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=44efb80e-f149-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894)
| [Sign the card →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109627929/551715845/-1045546376?refcode=email_061525_fathersday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGVmYjgwZS1mMTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8iCtrfeVz_anArk51TwJLobSF8-diAiD1aJbiPVip_s=&emci=c5e53347-b647-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=44efb80e-f149-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894)
---
Thank you and happy Father’s Day!

The great Mark Twain once said, "When I was a boy of 14, my father was so ignorant I could hardly stand to have the old man around. But when I got to be 21, I was astonished at how much the old man had learned in seven years."
I remember reading this quote to my father when I had just turned 14. He laughed so hard he had to sit down. I'd never seen him laugh like that--and I never forgot it. Now, as a father myself, I laugh too. Because Twain was right. And my father was far wiser than I ever gave him credit for at the time.

---|---|---
Me and my greatest joys inside the top of the St. Louis Arch earlier this week
This Father's Day, I'm filled with gratitude for the joy of being a father, and with grief in losing mine a few months ago. He would've been 75 on June 19. I carry him with me every day--in how I raise my children, how I love my family, how I try to live with principle, patience, and prayer. His lessons were never loud, but always loud enough to hear when I needed them most.
To every father and father figure--thank you. And to every single mom out there doing double duty, I see you and celebrate you too. This day belongs to you as well.
If you'd like to support _this_ father and my work as a writer and advocate, I invite you to join _Let 's Address This_ as a free or paid subscriber. Your support means everything.
Happy Father's Day,
Qasim

When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! | | | Jun 15 | | | | | | | | | | | | The great Mark Twain once said, "When I was a boy of 14, my father was so ignorant I could hardly stand to have the old man around. But when I got to be 21, I was astonished at how much the old man had learned in seven years." I remember reading this quote to my father when I had just turned 14. He laughed so hard he had to sit down. I'd never seen him laugh like that--and I never forgot it. Now, as a father myself, I laugh too. Because Twain was right. And my father was far wiser than I ever gave him credit for at the time. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. He would've been 75 on June 19. I carry him with me every day--in how I raise my children, how I love my family, how I try to live with principle, patience, and prayer. His lessons were never loud, but always loud enough to hear when I needed them most. To every father and father figure--thank you. And to every single mom out there doing double duty, I see you and celebrate you too. This day belongs to you as well. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: They couldn’t cancel this...
body:
One more reason to believe America’s not done yet
\- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

| | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=142378f6e8eb47c68d0177fd86da1746&_e=G_qM5xuQWn2gGZMHKfngicXWtnLmsyjNm46H3e3d6Y7DY9cgYIn6l7rJGO5zdvxUULMVdUFReaAgR9ONtQ2A5dO___OJ-q8-xzzbh5l6YNHOusbNwok1X7cBbT5OBaY4H3MZ5LaN1uaMEFOdLANFFhm4iL47INZkVLFJxDYPz96WJOvTnI7WYo2jNtoVsulc4dCN1ygl-4b9l6rcVRLSF02bmZLZhBF-bTAJJ1evySBSB4AA3oa-jFaFcOqvYbyK4FaI4js2RAaDFFCKINT8cub3_OGL_jAc38uwOPhZhB5xWFZnLrOB1T6MefgGimlY)
---
Fellow Patriot, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this.Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: **THANK YOU.** I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._ while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour?**I did.** And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside...You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=142378f6e8eb47c68d0177fd86da1746&_e=G_qM5xuQWn2gGZMHKfngicXWtnLmsyjNm46H3e3d6Y7DY9cgYIn6l7rJGO5zdvxUULMVdUFReaAgR9ONtQ2A5dO___OJ-q8-xzzbh5l6YNHOusbNwok1X7cBbT5OBaY4H3MZ5LaN1uaMEFOdLANFFojgWAvx_QolBpLQSzWUHvCXUVeTJ7NQV8_UG_k-elw7f7DdtE75xzBcdc4CmJNiQ014FRsIsGK0E-syeIMwgRgyjrAfHhW9nZIbmuC4hawK4UKprB-Rai7IAvHy9pTftp6BEbguQULvEfR6EpFa17jZOeJu3mxQZdyJGMV2AKh2)
---
You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students...But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring:**Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history.** It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end.**And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California.** The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._ And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside.Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth.And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...”They ERUPTED.
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=142378f6e8eb47c68d0177fd86da1746&_e=G_qM5xuQWn2gGZMHKfngicXWtnLmsyjNm46H3e3d6Y7DY9cgYIn6l7rJGO5zdvxUULMVdUFReaAgR9ONtQ2A5dO___OJ-q8-xzzbh5l6YNHOusbNwok1X7cBbT5OBaY4H3MZ5LaN1uaMEFOdLANFFm7eQB7GZTcWQEVg2onwqiRq3_ULUl39ysmISbzOx9IM3d5UtiUS9ipSI68fMKD313mA8KHk32axoFac2Af0HnEdo_MwUNnJZu3z2Dt4FTqfQqaRuqCU5sSaL-9DnA9Yy-RYABC3JFYF-fMFGp2lMbiguiCc2b-xMeT1_M2q_W-J)
---
It wasn’t just another great tour stop... **It was a BREAKTHROUGH.** Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour.And each one was just as powerful...This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._ And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down...The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before._But let’s back up for a moment..._ Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago.**Back in January, when we were laying out the calendar... These were the goals: Go BIGGER. Go BOLDER. Go DEEPER into Leftist territory.** We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... _But the ones the Left claimed as their own._ And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did.**Let me give you the big picture:** ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... _wholesale._ Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... _finally heard one._ Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... _were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._ Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined._ There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message...**But just look at what we're accomplishing:**
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=142378f6e8eb47c68d0177fd86da1746&_e=G_qM5xuQWn2gGZMHKfngicXWtnLmsyjNm46H3e3d6Y7DY9cgYIn6l7rJGO5zdvxUULMVdUFReaAgR9ONtQ2A5dO___OJ-q8-xzzbh5l6YNHOusbNwok1X7cBbT5OBaY4H3MZ5LaN1uaMEFOdLANFFp9Q0u9O8VXWVpcApCd5PsFyX4ljD4HQJzjQ8EmT3NvEqO1GRgNlqIB0mZstgX28dWv72X3ncsSnRn8LYcjCpNo7twCfZQN7Bya6ExGpHverR8HM2KwXPO5ImjVq6YbJc4ifrFoTe5GV5M07CHmiHnod_lX8QwEYKT-ALDs1-N75)
---
_Fellow Patriot, this is why we fight..._ Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students.**But for a generation-wide cultural reset — playing out in real time, in real places, in the hearts of real students.** This is why the American Comeback Tour matters.And I hope you know:**It wouldn’t exist without patriots like****YOU****.** Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible.Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most.**You weren’t just watching this tour... You were powering it.** Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._ The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring...But this summer?We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through.We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour.To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. **And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country. **_I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Fellow Patriot._ Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible...We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._ Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING.The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong.**I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today.****Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time.**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=142378f6e8eb47c68d0177fd86da1746&_e=G_qM5xuQWn2gGZMHKfngicXWtnLmsyjNm46H3e3d6Y7DY9cgYIn6l7rJGO5zdvxUULMVdUFReaAgR9ONtQ2A5dO___OJ-q8-xzzbh5l6YNHOusbNwok1X7cBbT5OBaY4H3MZ5LaN1uaMEFOdLANFFtFw6apTU5Wggqs3DwWWz7952Awkz4Y_tsFFgAiXgLZpNB_aipm8zR2uDMg8YsAjtwEVmKlXpJLy6VO3DziDRQw2oEa1G6adSUnJJRc81w-qZk19JK3M2gRdM0QqJwewJOAbk1BKqHkw9hCGSksQ92m0YesWKwin4rwEm4v2s3LR)
---
**P.S.** I’ve been doing this for over a decade now, Fellow Patriot... **_But I’ve never seen momentum like THIS._** These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our ideas.This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL.**And the Left is terrified.** You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our students... But it’s not working anymore.**Because you and I are reaching the next generation — campus by campus, state by state, student by student.** **And that’s why I’m asking you to stand with us again today. Because every dollar you give today will be MATCHED.** That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And your impact? DOUBLED. _So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall..._ Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next.Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this country when it returns this fall... Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement...And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of America’s young people again. **[We’re not done. Let’s go DEFEAT the Left once and for all. Make your gift to Turning Point USA today and have your impact immediately DOUBLED.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=142378f6e8eb47c68d0177fd86da1746&_e=G_qM5xuQWn2gGZMHKfngicXWtnLmsyjNm46H3e3d6Y7DY9cgYIn6l7rJGO5zdvxUULMVdUFReaAgR9ONtQ2A5dO___OJ-q8-xzzbh5l6YNHOusbNwok1X7cBbT5OBaY4H3MZ5LaN1uaMEFOdLANFFsRIqiTPa795ZZ0bv8T2b56DgiZimOZMXsvcHQDP7xP7rI-NuTLe4hGTRBMv5ycGLVz6DdM8PgAescnil5nc5nfrndsVoXEOf6Fm34-Q1vaTCpT3C2twsK1E66qeafJJQiu0XEbJFJvFH-ZPupQHiG22yc7RnTXCe0h4t2GWB9d6)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA &**
**DOUBLE Your Impact**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=142378f6e8eb47c68d0177fd86da1746&_e=G_qM5xuQWn2gGZMHKfngicXWtnLmsyjNm46H3e3d6Y7DY9cgYIn6l7rJGO5zdvxUULMVdUFReaAgR9ONtQ2A5dO___OJ-q8-xzzbh5l6YNHOusbNwok1X7cBbT5OBaY4H3MZ5LaN1uaMEFOdLANFFtSV7VYi0YZH_o_fxMV577dPsFAMjvfHVQj0hM84DDt0hsKXWLrt3vdMSUvzvRA9dNr7eHByvKpsDjMvI_J7GawykdjQk6r8f7JUwamCjx9CZTjfVRlTPf7_K1zyapa2hX2tmaSb3iNTwyq46Hy68H_xICl-OtYRvzXX5e4CkxNo)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
[Unsubscribe](http://links.justandfreegop.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_s=142378f6e8eb47c68d0177fd86da1746&_t=clvhILjb5A5q8WSb10Kdh-jtw7pEKERMGTgwMlAhAtgGtwPafg0JHcjfeFRaUzQZ3u-OeWEPfNXq1oSWKI2Iv4NpNTSLjniXANP04nE6c4P-DKU6tetBIhl3jhKEwU3x)

---

## _**[50 MORE RESPONSES NEEDED FROM YOUR STATE BEFORE MY DEADLINE](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kV2PnCAUhn8N3mHw4OeFF9M6Jts0m23apElvDAPHlVlAKuh0--sb7ezcPjzn8L4grDd6fG9J9YkATFoFAkD4iQCcvsHP7z_wjBXNToug4oxfnvdT-HxXN3jIToqF23B1p6e3IBrxd2yez1-37OHHd48P-35rilZos9OqS1QLsgYpE2yzKm-apuRQJ1PLs0sjRTU2vChKViuUombjpcjrjDUsrxLdAoOClVmR5ayAPC1QQq0UiLqqmVQXkrObdqmanTDqGpfV-lTONjHtFKMPR6SeQB9QrgumN-0WVLtBoD9s6kTU-zSVs7U6RkR6HSWB3ng6jfSoQf-rfjaGblnBaOCE92u0g0WlV0t4d69b7jDM6yKR8M74wfhhGu9cCuuFfnWEdx-1hujkcGx_LB8CH9SBBuM_JmcX0UXCu71pRALl4IxWhHcvUtq3P1j-Ph_w-Gbe_SqWyxO-PG_J0ip_08boUFYkZ697zuOJthb-BQAA__9iZK1d)**_

Friend, I asked my team to flag your response.
Before we submit my mandatory mid-month report, I need to know:

name: David Hogg
subject: This Father’s Day is different for me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Today is my first Father’s Day without my dad.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250615-1&t=1&akid=2258%2E587540%2E_R39D-)
Peter, today is my first Father’s Day without my dad.
He was a helicopter pilot, an FBI agent, a teacher, and above all, a father who never stopped showing up for his family — even after he was diagnosed with early-onset Parkinson’s.
In the years before he passed, I watched him fight every day — for his health, for his dignity, and for the VA benefits he had earned. I also watched my mom fight alongside him, and I saw how hard this country makes it for veterans to get the care they need.
I think about that a lot now. About the America my dad believed in — the one he served, and the one he raised me to believe was possible. One where he even inspired new Americans to believe what was possible. My dad’s office at LAX was next to a currency exchange where many new Americans would wait with their family. Once my sister and I were old enough, my dad took our stuffed animals (with our permission) and would give them to child immigrants who just arrived in America often with little more than a backpack and their parents and say welcome to America. As my dad did this, word spread and fellow agents started giving him hundreds of their older kids' stuffed animals to give away.
To me, my father was the embodiment of a patriot. A man that at every turn no matter how late the call, no matter how tired he was, no matter who it was, was there to help. No matter if it was search and rescue for the Navy as a helicopter pilot, teaching kids how to read, saving lives of many who never knew how close they were to danger, or simply welcoming new Americans with a gesture of kindness.
What is remarkable about my family is just how unremarkable we are in our country. There are millions of other families, dads and moms in this country with stories similar to my father's. Most of whom we will never know but will feel the effects of for years to come. We owe them much more than a thank you. We owe them a government that serves them anywhere close to as much as they have served us.
That’s what Leaders We Deserve is all about. We’re fighting to elect a new generation of young, unapologetically progressive leaders who know what’s at stake — because they’ve lived it. Leaders who will fight like hell for families, for veterans, for a future where care and compassion aren’t partisan.
Thank you for being a part of this fight. For people like my dad, and for all of us.
Thank you — and Happy Father’s Day, Peter.
David
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250615-1&t=2&refcode2=2258_587540__R39D-&akid=2258%2E587540%2E_R39D-)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2258%2E587540%2E_R39D-)

From one major showdown to the next, Peter. Earlier this year, this team helped secure victories in two critical state supreme court races, electing strong Democracy Defenders in Wisconsin and North Carolina. It might feel like these races just ended, but the truth is, we’re already gearing up for what’s next in these battleground states. State supreme courts play an outsized role in protecting voting rights, fair maps, abortion rights, and other critical issues. With increased attacks on our democracy nationwide, the outcome of these races will have serious implications across the country. [**In a moment, we’ll explain more about what’s at stake in these races. Rather than concede after multiple recounts, the Republican candidate sued to try and overturn a free and fair election. It took too long, but Justice Allison Riggs is now rightfully in her seat on the court.
As we look ahead to next year’s race, it’s hard to ignore what’s at stake. A conservative challenger who’s also the architect behind the state's 12-week abortion ban, has pledged to be a “conservative voice” on the bench. **Since statewide elections in North Carolina are almost always won in the margins, we can expect this to come down to the wire. And Republicans seem willing to do _anything_ to win.**
**Wisconsin’s own supreme court race** became a fixture in the news cycle this year when Elon Musk spent nearly $25 million trying to elect the Trump-endorsed candidate. Thankfully, grassroots efforts, including ours, were enough to overcome the world’s richest man putting his thumb on the scale.
But it’s clearer than ever: We need to be prepared to hold our own against whatever they throw our way in 2026. **Winning this seat would expand our pro-democracy majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court — and prevent conservatives from gaining a path back to the majority in 2028. **
Wisconsin and North Carolina are just two of the battlegrounds where the fight for fair maps and fair representation is happening right now. We’re also gearing up for a big state supreme court race this fall in another key battleground in Pennsylvania, where Republicans have plans to spend seven figures to try to win a seat.
We know it takes real grassroots support to win these critical state-level elections — and we’re counting on supporters like you more than ever!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1011&refcode=email-20230615_v&akid=8810%2E5885482%2ELybWwr ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

🚨🚨 This is URGENT: the House just passed an extreme request from Trump to
strip $1.1 billion from public media – money Congress already pledged to
keep NPR, PBS, and local stations broadcasting. 🚨🚨

Now, the bill must pass the Senate. And we are NOT going to let it happen.
Some Republican Senators like Maine's Susan Collins have already raised
doubts about their support for this reckless attempt to clawback funding:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29455?source=email-20230615&t=1061&akid=8810%2E5885482%2ELybWwr ]Headline:Sen. Collins signals oppostition to Trump administration for
cuts

Our Revolution has been preparing for exactly this scenario – scaling up
our grassroots presence and mobilization in key states like Maine, where
Senator Collins could cast a decisive vote.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20230615nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8810%2E5885482%2ELybWwr ]We're pressuring Senators and mounting a massive push to save public
media. But this effort hinges entirely on support from grassroots donors –
will you step up today and chip in a contribution to fuel Our Revolution's
urgent work to protect public media?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

This quest to kill public media is straight out of Trump's authoritarian
playbook: limit independent journalism, restrict the flow of accurate
information, and weaken our democracy. Which is why Trump has tried again
and again to defund NPR and PBS – because the truth is inconvenient to his
dangerous agenda.

Let's be clear about what's at stake: the heads of PBS and NPR have warned
that defunding public media will force stations off the air.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29455?source=email-20230615&t=1060&akid=8810%2E5885482%2ELybWwr ]Headline:PBS head warns 'stations will be gone' if defunded'

Outlets like PBS and NPR aren't luxuries – they're lifelines, especially
in rural areas and underserved communities. Which is why Our Revolution is
urgently scaling up right now, unleashing tactics like targeted campaigns
in critical battlegrounds, flooding Senators' offices with letters from
constituents, and showing up in the Hill to put lawmakers on the spot
face-to-face.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20230615nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8810%2E5885482%2ELybWwr ]The clock is ticking on this Senate vote. used immediately to scale up our work in key states like Maine that will
decide whether we win or lose this battle. Can we count on you to stand
with us today to keep public media alive?

_This week 's Father's Day Substack is brought to you by two former prosecutors, proud sons of law enforcement, and past and present members of Congress:_
_\- Patrick J. Murphy & Eric Swalwell_ (D-Calif.)
Thanks for reading From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wYXRyaWNrbXVycGh5cGEuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FjY291bnQiLCJwIjoxNjU5OTczMzUsInMiOjQzOTkxMzMsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDk5OTc0ODUsImV4cCI6MTc1MjU4OTQ4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.E5oI5HxDKn0fD3PzoCc1G9c4ZOIQGxf8QEhfwrqGkew?)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/87cc6f09-2fc7-475c-bf5d-77fac0e1f8a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dressing up like Dad/Sgt Jack Murphy
If you've ever been raised by a parent who served in law enforcement or the military, you know every time they walk out the door could be their last.
Every day, my mom would tell us Murphy kids, "always kiss your father goodbye before he leaves for work because you never know if that's the last time you're gonna see him."
That was her rule. And in our house, rules were sacred.
She'd say it every night as my dad laced up his boots, clipped on his badge, and headed out for another overnight shift with the Philadelphia Police Department. Then she'd make herself a cup of instant coffee, sit at the kitchen table in our row house in Northeast Philly, and turn on the police scanner to listen to what calls he was responding to.
That's what it meant to grow up in a law enforcement family. And it's what inspired my brother, sister, and me to go into public service. Both my brother and I became officers deployed overseas twice after 9/11, while our sister is in her second decade making a difference as a public school teacher. When I later served two terms in Congress, it was especially important to be a voice for the people who serve others. Who proudly wear the cloth of our country or community, and run toward the danger when most shy away from it.
Now, allow me to pass the mic to a current member of Congress raised by a father not so different from mine.
## **Words from Rep. Eric Swalwell**
> I write this in honor of my dad, Eric Nelson Swalwell. He was a police officer, a great husband, and the best father anyone could ask for. My earliest memory was learning to distinguish between right and wrong; he was the chief of police of a small town in Iowa. A good old boys' network, which included the mayor and a few council members, tried to corrupt him. When he refused to dismiss cases against them, they called him to the carpet and a city council meeting and told him if he didn't dismiss the cases, he would be fired. He agonized over it for weeks. But he ultimately concluded that nobody is above the law. And he was fired. That's how we ended up out west. He was willing to lose his job to do what's right. I was six years old when he did that. And I'll never forget it.
***
Like Rep Swalwell, I write this on Father's Day, not just to honor my dad, Sergeant Jack Murphy, but to reflect on the legacy he and so many others like him leave behind.
My father served three years in the U.S. Navy during the Vietnam War. Most in our family served in the military for a few years. Then he came home and put in 22 honorable years with the Philadelphia Police Department. His brother-in-law, my Uncle Joe, was an Army paratrooper and then came home, rising through the ranks to become a Philadelphia Police Inspector, while his son, my cousin, just retired as a Philadelphia Police Sergeant. And even now, we have a cousin serving on the Philly Highway Patrol. In our family, service isn't a slogan, it's just what you do.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/59ac2636-8791-4e65-a729-59099f00470c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My father, Navy Sgt Jack Murphy
You could say we were born on third base when it comes to understanding what public service means. We didn't have to read a book or watch a movie to learn about duty or sacrifice; we just had to look across the dinner table. Or, in my mom's case, across the police scanner.
That's why I was moved to see my fellow veterans in Congress, Reps. Pat Ryan and Chris Deluzio, handing out American flags on Capitol Hill this week with a simple [letter](https://substack.com/redirect/4d654f58-c7d0-4e7b-abad-fa5dad929b4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> _Patriotism does not belong to one party. The flag, and the values it stands for, belong to every single American._
They're right.
The flag doesn't belong to one party or politician. It belongs to _the people_ , especially to those who serve.
I saw that kind of patriotism in my father. I see it in veterans like Pat Ryan and Chris Deluzio, who are reminding America that service is bigger than politics. And I try to carry that spirit into how I raise my own kids.
There's a lot of talk these days about toxic masculinity. And don't get me wrong, some of it's warranted. But I wish more people also talked about kind of masculinity that shows up and works the overnight shift. That puts food on the table. That coaches Little League after pulling a double shift. That prays with his wife and children before his shift starts. That doesn't need a thank-you but damn well deserves one.
I saw it in my father. And now I try to live it for my kids.
Father's Day isn't just a day for neckties and grill tools. It's a day to remember the example set by so many men like my dad whose names aren't in the paper, who don't ask for credit, and who keep going anyway. The type of men who walk out the door every night not knowing if they'll make it back.
And who always get kissed goodbye, just in case.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/95919096-3e0d-46bd-88cc-ae45b47e4bc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My father, a proud Navy veteran, met his first admiral this past November on the set of Yahoo Finance's _Warrior Money_ , where we had the honor of hosting retired Admiral William McRaven.
-Patrick
_The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter._

Hi Peter, I wanted to take a minute to reintroduce myself and explain why this fight is so important to me. | **[SKIP THE EXPLANATION: CHIP IN $3 TO SUPPORT RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109629935/551723358/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250615_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzNhOTQzZi1mNTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AL07dH9TayL9TykBOm6BXh7cE76PtXwCzFP7k8SfOLQ=)**
---
I’m a gay Afro-Latino man and a proud product of the Bronx, _born and bred._

I was raised by a single mother who kept my family afloat on a $4.25 minimum wage. I grew up in public housing ridden with mold, leaks, vermin, and without consistent heat or water.

I don’t have a college degree or the fancy connections that come with one.

**But Peter, what I lack in credentials, I make up for in lived experience.**

Peter, because of my upbringing, I know what it’s like to be left behind by political leaders who pledged to serve you.

I know what it’s like to fight with everything you’ve got to make your voice heard.

And I know what it’s like to have to hide who you are for fear of violence.

So in 2020, I ran for Congress to deliver real and meaningful change for the hardworking people of the Bronx – _**the people who raised me.**_

**We’ve achieved so much together, but there is still so much work to do.**

[That’s why I have to ask: Before our mid-month deadline hits, will you chip in $3 to support this people-powered movement so I can continue fighting for you for years to come? We need to raise $25,000 this month through emails like this. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109629936/551723359/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250615_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzNhOTQzZi1mNTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AL07dH9TayL9TykBOm6BXh7cE76PtXwCzFP7k8SfOLQ=)

www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

I was raised by a single mother who kept my family afloat on a $4.25 minimum wage. I grew up in public housing ridden with mold, leaks, vermin, and without consistent heat or water. I don’t have a college degree or the fancy connections that come with one. But Peter, what I lack in credentials, I make up for in lived experience. Peter, because of my upbringing, I know what it’s like to be left behind by political leaders who pledged to serve you. I know what it’s like to fight with everything you’ve got to make your voice heard. And I know what it’s like to have to hide who you are for fear of violence. So in 2020, I ran for Congress to deliver real and meaningful change for the hardworking people of the Bronx – the people who raised me. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: This is the most important email I've sent yet. –

body:
| | |
Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. This is one of the longest emails I've sent as DSCC Chair -- **but it's also the most important.**

**I hope you'll read every word, but if you can't, here's the top-line info:** [**The DSCC has their mid-month deadline coming up -- and without your help, we could fall _short_ of the $125,000 goal we need to raise to flip the Senate. Will you chip in $5 to make sure we hit it? Your gift will be tripled, but only until the deadline.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21784?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250615-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250615-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20483%2E9716520%2EO_xCWZ)

| | [DONATE $5 (BECOMES $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/21784?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250615-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250615-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20483%2E9716520%2EO_xCWZ)
---

Here are three things you need to know right now:

**DONALD TRUMP IS HURTING -- NOT HELPING -- HARDWORKING AMERICANS.**

Trump's second term is already as bad as we've feared. Worse, even. He's packing our government with MAGA loyalists, undermining our democracy, and grabbing unprecedented power and wealth for himself -- but he's done _nothing_ to tackle the issues that matter most, like lowering costs and protecting Social Security.

**SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE PUSHING TRUMP'S DANGEROUS AGENDA.**

On issue after issue, the Republican majority has moved in lockstep with Trump -- no matter how far he pushes our country in the wrong direction. They're rubber-stamping his radical, unqualified nominees and actually defending his pardoning of hundreds of January 6th insurrectionists!

Fortunately, we have an alternative path forward:

**DEMOCRATS HAVE A _REAL CHANCE_ TO TAKE BACK THE SENATE.**

With multiple special elections in key battlegrounds on the map and some of the most vulnerable Republicans up for reelection, we have no shortage of chances to flip seats blue. But to win back a majority and deliver on the issues that matter most, I'll need Democrats like you on my side.

[**So today, with our critical mid-month deadline approaching, I'm asking you to make a difference. Will you chip in $5 (becomes $15) to fight for a Democratic Senate majority that will fight for you?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21784?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250615-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250615-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20483%2E9716520%2EO_xCWZ)

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

With gratitude,

Kirsten

# [United Nations Ocean Week](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=166001651&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2MDAxNjUxLCJpYXQiOjE3NDk5OTg1ODQsImV4cCI6MTc1MjU5MDU4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.NLdgSdughM3zS9pu4PK9fU-rUKowo8N3pALSALb5g_w)

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=166001651&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2MDAxNjUxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0OTk5ODU4NCwiZXhwIjoxNzUyNTkwNTg0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjgzNDQ5Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.mIWw0W_mEVj0PUxozJvlWf45tBP1JP8-NNnOzxWU6nI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

**ONLY FIVE DAYS LEFT** to upgrade to a paid subscription for $1.75 a month, or $17.50 per year. That's 80% cheaper than the average Substack subscription for one of Substacks' _**best-selling newsletters.**_
* * *
**A few words about the honor of the experience in Nice, France:**
Spending time around incredible artists, rock stars, and diplomats during the last week, I felt acutely aware of my improbable arc as a girl from south Mississippi, where hunger gnawed as fiercely as the humidity, to famous whistleblower, and now to global advocate for the seas.
In the pine and cypress-shadowed wetlands of my youth, housing was never a guarantee for my large family, and a college education the sole goal for escaping our childhood.
Yet, all the while, I dreamed in hues of turquoise, matching the coastal waters just down the road from us, with visions of a future too vast for my broken and impoverished small-town.
I fell in love with the ocean at first sight, and that affair has driven the direction of my life ever since.
Standing among artists with their [exquisite renderings of the ocean crisis](https://substack.com/redirect/62f51ebf-4fd6-4a71-a350-de1df18eb29d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), rock stars lending their anthems to the cause, and diplomats wielding policy like a sextant, I also felt the surreal weight of my own audacity. To save the ocean--this was no mere ambition but a child's reverie spun into reality, a delicate reef of purpose built against the tide of doubt.
I owe my journey principally to the founder and CEO of Project Zero, Michele Clarke, who, upon hearing of the demise of my climate program in April, scooped me up and brought me on board.
I also want to thank those who helped me finance the trip, especially Donald and Penny Pray, longtime Florida supporters of mine, and Jack Hopkins, another Florida firebrand fighting fascism.
To live a dream is to believe in the boundless possibilities of people and this planet. I am eternally grateful for the opportunities given to me.
* * *
_I interviewed more than 30 participants at UNOC, ranging from scientists to heads of state, and will be putting together several pieces this week about our conversations._
_This article is free, but to access all my work, please subscribe today!_
* * *
### FIRST REPORT: UNOC 2025
The United Nations' third ocean conference ([UNOC](https://substack.com/redirect/cc4abfe3-5a95-4ac3-a2af-b81253ff18fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) in Nice, France last week was a convergence of science, data, and determination, at a time when questions about the world's ability to combat shared threats loom across political frontiers.
More than 16,000 organizations were authorized to attend UNOC, with more than 12,000 delegates from 175 nations in attendance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e75e92fc-30d4-4b9a-ac41-2c137599cfb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Spread across the two sites, aptly named the Blue Zone and Green Zone, laptops aglow with new models and even newer metrics, experts charted coral decline with the precision of a surgeon's blade.
The air carried the weight of 348,000 square kilometers of reef at risk, yet here, in this hot, crowded, fluorescent-lit hall, the latest imaging and tools promised a fragile hope, syncing disparate experts into a singular pulse of progress.
"The window is closing, but it's not yet shut," said [Thomas Dallison](https://substack.com/redirect/7ed6064e-9c44-43eb-9e7d-4f47672ecc47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the International Coral Reef Initiative.
Unlike the [gimmick and business-focused US Capitol Hill Ocean Week (CHOW)](https://substack.com/redirect/4861a12b-dd84-4edf-9547-91328f44ea8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) just days prior, there was no muzzling scientists or platforming bored billionaire sea explorers at UNOC.
The science propelled the mission forward, and at the end of the conference, a new priority set for nations across the globe.
"Ships in the port of Nice sounded their fog-horns on Friday, a brassy crescendo to a rare moment of global unity as the Third UN Ocean Conference drew to a close," per the [official closing report ](https://substack.com/redirect/cd70231d-33fe-47a1-bb60-ffda7724311d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)from the UN. "Moments earlier, more than 170 countries had adopted by consensus a sweeping political declaration promising urgent action to protect the ocean."
**Comradery in conservation:**
Scientists found each other in rumpled blazers, the signs of Nice's unusually high June temperatures seeping through their pressed shirts.
Their voices were urgent, swapping stories of bleached reefs off Palau or the quiet surrender of a rare species to climate change.
One oceanographer, Dr. Elena Marquez, leaned over a coffee-stained table in the Green Zone, her eyes alight as she described a new biofilm that might bolster coral resilience.
The company behind the breakthrough, [Hybrid Reefs](https://substack.com/redirect/f22a77ba-b9c8-4d96-a0d7-5b7a5f5d68de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), pitched their new product to an overfilled room on the last day of the conference. The presentation excited the scientists in attendance, who quickly saw the value in the use of natural chemicals derived from algae to help baby corals attach and grow, while also stopping other algae that compete with the corals.
Led by Dr. Daniel Wangpraseurt and Alex Ferre, the two showcased their product in the Startup Room, where potential funders lined up to find their next investment.
Across from the startup room, a postdoc from Brisbane scribbled notes while listening to one of his idols explain advances in spectral mapping of coral bleaching, his pen racing to capture the alchemy of science and possibility.
The conference held in the Green Zone was less a meeting than a collision--of people, breakthroughs, and the unspoken fear that time was slipping away like sand through a sieve.
"Vision without action is just a hallucination," said the host of a high-level climate champions panel Wednesday night.
At the same event, Princess Eugenie of York spoke about the importance of our first memory of the ocean, and keeping that intimidate connection with us as we continue working.
* * *
_I'll be posting more content about UNOC in the coming days. To unlock access, subscribe today!_

A few words about the honor of the experience in Nice, France: Spending time around incredible artists, rock stars, and diplomats during the last week, I felt acutely aware of my improbable arc as a girl from south Mississippi, where hunger gnawed as fiercely as the humidity, to famous whistleblower, and now to global advocate for the seas. In the pine and cypress-shadowed wetlands of my youth, housing was never a guarantee for my large family, and a college education the sole goal for escaping our childhood. Yet, all the while, I dreamed in hues of turquoise, matching the coastal waters just down the road from us, with visions of a future too vast for my broken and impoverished small-town. I fell in love with the ocean at first sight, and that affair has driven the direction of my life ever since. Standing among artists with their , rock stars lending their anthems to the cause, and diplomats wielding policy like a sextant, I also felt the surreal weight of my own audacity. To save the ocean--this was no mere ambition but a child's reverie spun into reality, a delicate reef of purpose built against the tide of doubt. I owe my journey principally to the founder and CEO of Project Zero, Michele Clarke, who, upon hearing of the demise of my climate program in April, scooped me up and brought me on board. I also want to thank those who helped me finance the trip, especially Donald and Penny Pray, longtime Florida supporters of mine, and Jack Hopkins, another Florida firebrand fighting fascism. To live a dream is to believe in the boundless possibilities of people and this planet. I am eternally grateful for the opportunities given to me. I interviewed more than 30 participants at UNOC, ranging from scientists to heads of state, and will be putting together several pieces this week about our conversations. This article is free, but to access all my work, please subscribe today! The air carried the weight of 348,000 square kilometers of reef at risk, yet here, in this hot, crowded, fluorescent-lit hall, the latest imaging and tools promised a fragile hope, syncing disparate experts into a singular pulse of progress. name: Lateefah Simon
subject: Honoring fathers—and the strength they inspire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah Simon for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com/ [https://www.lateefahsimon.com/] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-mike-schlossberg-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-mike-schlossberg-1] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-website]
Wishing you a Happy Father’s Day, Friend!

Every year on Father’s Day, I find myself reflecting on both deep loss and profound gratitude.

In 2014, I lost my husband, Kevin, to a rare form of leukemia on this very day. Kevin was more than a devoted husband and loving father to our children; he was a passionate journalist, a leader and a mentor, and a relentless advocate for young people and communities often overlooked by mainstream media. Together, we launched a nationwide campaign to increase the number of African American bone marrow donors, striving to save not only his life but the lives of countless others in need.

(Hold for Photo)

Kevin's unwavering commitment to justice and his deep love for our family continue to inspire me daily. I promised him that I would never stop telling his story, and that’s why I am an unyielding fighter for scientific research and innovation that could save lives. His legacy lives on in our daughter’s eyes and in the work I carry forward in Congress.

Today, I honor all fathers and father figures—those present and those we hold in memory. Their love, sacrifices, and teachings shape us in enduring ways.

May we all take a moment to reflect on and celebrate the fathers who have touched our lives.

With heartfelt gratitude,
Lateefah
https://www.facebook.com/lateefah.simon [https://www.facebook.com/lateefah.simon] https://www.instagram.com/lateefahforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/lateefahforcongress/] https://x.com/lateefahsimon [https://x.com/lateefahsimon]
Lateefah Simon for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438
Oakland, CA 94612
info@LateefahSimon.com [info@lateefahsimon.com]
https://www.lateefahsimon.com/ [https://www.lateefahsimon.com/]Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion. To learn more about Lateefah, visit: LateefahSimon.com Emails like this are the most effective way to grow our campaign and reach supporters like you. name: Katie Porter
subject: The biggest moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Everyone will be combing through these filings to size up all the candidates.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39808%2E3422442%2EfQ-YmE)
Derek,
I want to tell you about the biggest moment our campaign for governor has had yet.
At the end of this month, we’ll hit our first public fundraising filing deadline–when everyone, including pundits and political insiders will be able to see exactly how much we’ve raised. To stay on track, we’ve set a $35,000 mid-month fundraising goal. **[Can you chip in $5 before midnight to help us get there?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250615_1_ak?refcode=em20250615-39808&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39808_3422442_fQ-YmE&akid=39808%2E3422442%2EfQ-YmE)**
This is a make-or-break moment. _Everyone_ will be combing through these filings to size up all the candidates. A strong report will build real momentum for our campaign. But if we fall short, super PACs could start lining up behind our opponents.
You need to have a good plan to get anything done. That's why my team set this $35,000 goal–as a benchmark to make sure we’re where we need to be.
Derek, all the wins we’ve celebrated together–holding the Trump administration accountable, calling out corporate BS, and delivering for working families–have only been possible because I’ve had grassroots supporters like you standing with me.
**[Now, I’m counting on you again. Can you donate $5 to our campaign to help us reach our $35,000 mid-month fundraising goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250615_1_ak?refcode=em20250615-39808&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39808_3422442_fQ-YmE&akid=39808%2E3422442%2EfQ-YmE)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250615_1_ak?refcode=em20250615-39808&refcode2=39808_3422442_fQ-YmE&akid=39808%2E3422442%2EfQ-YmE)
Thank you so much,
– Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250615-39808&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39808_3422442_fQ-YmE&akid=39808%2E3422442%2EfQ-YmE)**

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Going dark again to honor victims of political violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project https://voteractionproject.org/
Folks,
Again, to make it abundantly clear, since this is sadly not the first time we've had to say this: We condemn political violence in any form .
We know the people receiving this email likely know that and agree, but we're stating it again for the record. The recent attempted and successful assassinations in Minnesota by a man masquerading as a police officer are chilling. Our hearts go out to the families of the victims, and we hope they can find some solace in the coming days.
Like we've said before, when this has happened -- despite whatever legitimate political or policy differences any of us might have with any elected official, candidate, or advocacy group -- violence, like what happened in Minnesota, is never the answer .
Voter Action Project is going dark today out of respect for the victims of this weekend's terrible act. Our work to defend the right to vote will of course continue, but for now, please take the time to think about those lost, those clinging to life with critical injuries, and their family members.
Onward,
The Voter Action Project Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=uTt9NPn4RkPoi3Ge112L8a4Zw99F21WeIGLiFLt0Iy8r%2BdTeWVwzGqXQdUWF57%2BClfbkNVX30Nchp3xzmVgPkW%2BMqmC7Cm0189M8%2F0A183w8ZCy6y674WNL96h1gxbKJfpTU%2FS9TUrjfJn5awuonT3LPGsnrODiMH6NlSWf3zeMl%2FjWtnc7%2BXyzvRRX%2FJQqesv9SIdz7DacV23mXENplna9XKIlZfKY3iyJ90S%2B7Ppi8fvQrWZWsN67Yz8GrSKgkORiUlRkwWWJMcqdQbiKn2UGxK97Cr2Urydd89FJWnApodqs0Ir7jr5XOkwmrTUBNm8SIqXdXzSLnG%2F3bui5PCPXYA51bEk0kr75byP1%2B9MtmfXFT0ZsyQ8NysNUCoUQkYnYcU%2BYYiX2%2BFKM%2FlIA62un3WotAmYJ7yencL112g%2Bc%3D .

It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. name: Andy Kim
subject: This Father’s Day, I’m thinking about my two boys
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Every decision I make, every vote I cast, and every fight I take on in the Senate is with them in mind.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109632028/551729937/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U3Zjk5MC1mOTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qFL8l7VGbctoUVQDK8nVkF0c-E4cCKiLlzKCWeIVpgM=&emci=dd3658fc-7748-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=77e7f990-f949-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Father's Day always gives me a moment to reflect – not just on the dad I strive to be today, but on the future I want for my kids. People always ask me why I ran for office. The truth is, it always comes back to two Jersey kids – my two boys. Every decision I make, every vote I cast, and every fight I take on in the Senate is with them in mind. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109632029/551729938/-1197072038?refcode=2025-06-15-father&recurring=&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=77e7f990-f949-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U3Zjk5MC1mOTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qFL8l7VGbctoUVQDK8nVkF0c-E4cCKiLlzKCWeIVpgM=) Back in 2018, I ran for Congress because Republicans were threatening to rip away health care from families like mine. I couldn't stand by. I jumped in to serve, not because I wanted a title, but because I wanted to protect my kids' future. **Now I'm in the Senate, and the threats we face are even more urgent.** Donald Trump and his allies are marching this country toward extremism. The stakes for our democracy, for our values, and for our children's future couldn't be higher. I want my boys, and all kids across our country, to grow up in a country where leaders serve with integrity, where public office is a responsibility, not a privilege, and where government actually works for the people. We need to rebuild trust. We need to show what public service looks like when it's grounded in honesty, compassion, and courage. I believe we can give our kids a better future – one where health care is affordable, where our democracy is protected, where families feel secure, and where climate action is real and urgent. **That's what I'm fighting for.** I won't pretend I can fix everything. But I can promise you this: I will never stop fighting for a country that promises our children a better future. Let's keep showing up for them. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:
| [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109632031/551729939/-1197072038?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2025-06-15-father&refcode2=77e7f990-f949-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U3Zjk5MC1mOTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qFL8l7VGbctoUVQDK8nVkF0c-E4cCKiLlzKCWeIVpgM=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109632032/551729940/-1197072038?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2025-06-15-father&refcode2=77e7f990-f949-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U3Zjk5MC1mOTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qFL8l7VGbctoUVQDK8nVkF0c-E4cCKiLlzKCWeIVpgM=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109632033/551729941/-1197072038?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2025-06-15-father&refcode2=77e7f990-f949-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U3Zjk5MC1mOTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qFL8l7VGbctoUVQDK8nVkF0c-E4cCKiLlzKCWeIVpgM=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109632034/551729942/-1197072038?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2025-06-15-father&refcode2=77e7f990-f949-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U3Zjk5MC1mOTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qFL8l7VGbctoUVQDK8nVkF0c-E4cCKiLlzKCWeIVpgM=)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m often asked this one question:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Was it worth it? For the TRUTH - you bet!
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d560a652f0e64a13ba3e56b5e35d0545&_e=oU--u1nwKxriRvA6g_WTNwKeTqjNtdhN_HPtLKdyqMyH-RU1nO4cc7DTezSt-NGYUIF3BkjO6KuOM4ih1nrSiTVBl1A9BymONIXfnsy7RM85rFa92Qo12wpsfABcU9Uw8PZDLeCdG4oJZYjNs5AHn7gvjYZC8rM__EnPABJVBkLG7oBQP4abzHJM2xIz_Gm1mW_tVCzpZLg6pxTC1wyZjluBiwUxqnNH5k8Ax1hRcwY7ydXov5EFfIlEVwdiBteTt9jFM1LoO-GK5_bpzbU0LDSdtCnLdQTpmRtzsUCXJqpAVuDTu8YU3A4t57NExwE5CF0xL-wktIOdntnv1y31S-aXGaDi4Vv26hb__TAtFJQfl0N85N6Qf_9icYdWdiCn)
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
Over the course of the last two years, many friends and kind souls have asked me if it was worth it.
---
Was it worth it to be relentlessly targeted by the Democrats’ Deep State all because I defended our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump – from unimaginable and vicious witch hunts and refused to disavow the truth?
---
These rabid leftists have labeled me a “ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me into BANKRUPTCY, and even now, are _still_ attempting to throw me in PRISON for the rest of my life, but the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d560a652f0e64a13ba3e56b5e35d0545&_e=oU--u1nwKxriRvA6g_WTNwKeTqjNtdhN_HPtLKdyqMyH-RU1nO4cc7DTezSt-NGYUIF3BkjO6KuOM4ih1nrSiTVBl1A9BymONIXfnsy7RM85rFa92Qo12wpsfABcU9Uw8PZDLeCdG4oJZYjNs5AHn7gvjYZC8rM__EnPABJVBkLG7oBQP4abzHJM2xIz_Gm1mW_tVCzpZLg6pxTC1wyZjrT6bxChsrDZi8V9vmeKWq70BNJu7ashFEwYfAfTnHNsHUasIIDy0mtfYJdIdZVdSrLWWpw5FSPxAQ7tuuZTDTs0Iz2YneXbZlLK-d9_iS1KVhUsru1-p7Y79gOY3mlMPFa4OkefQ4EBwLyx_O5LCJWguZ4h0fZ2th4D5f0-8dx1)
__
---
...Being an _enemy_ of the Deep State like President Trump is not something to fear, _it’s a badge of honor – a sign that you were willing to take the arrows for what you know is RIGHT!_
---
**_So yes, Fellow Patriot. For the truth, liberty, and justice – you bet it was worth it._**
---
When I look back at the past few years and all that the Radical Democrats and the Biden-Harris _regime_ did to try and make an example out of me, I have ZERO REGRETS.
---
My resolve _NEVER_ wavered, and that’s all thanks to you!
---
_Every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like _YOU_._
---
**But there is one thing I must confess: through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts.**
---
And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own.
---
Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along...
---
_This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry._
---
**That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $100,000 this month for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a _FREE_ man.**
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---

clean_body: Was it worth it? For the TRUTH - you bet! | Fellow Patriot, Over the course of the last two years, many friends and kind souls have asked me if it was worth it. Was it worth it to be relentlessly targeted by the Democrats’ Deep State all because I defended our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump – from unimaginable and vicious witch hunts and refused to disavow the truth? These rabid leftists have labeled me a “ DEAD MAN WALKING ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me into BANKRUPTCY, and even now, are still attempting to throw me in PRISON for the rest of my life, but the TRUTH remains... ...Being an enemy of the Deep State like President Trump is not something to fear, it’s a badge of honor – a sign that you were willing to take the arrows for what you know is RIGHT! So yes, Fellow Patriot. For the truth, liberty, and justice – you bet it was worth it. When I look back at the past few years and all that the Radical Democrats and the Biden-Harris regime did to try and make an example out of me, I have ZERO REGRETS. My resolve NEVER wavered, and that’s all thanks to you! Every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like YOU. But there is one thing I must confess: through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts. And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own. Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along... This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry. That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $100,000 this month for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man. I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in your hands. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Heather Williams (via DLCC.org)
subject: My statement in response to the devastating shooting in Minnesota
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
| | |
---
| |
---|---
I was horrified to hear about the shooting of two champions for Minnesota families, and am absolutely devastated about the passing of DLCC Board Member and Speaker Emerita Melissa Hortman and her husband Mark. Speaker Emerita Melissa Hortman was an outspoken advocate for her community who never tired in her fight to deliver for Minnesota’s working families. As a DLCC board member, Speaker Emerita Hortman was an invaluable leader helping to empower and build the next generation of Democratic state legislative leaders. Minnesota lost the most effective House Speaker in a generation who delivered on paid family medical leave, protected their rights to make their own decisions, expanded opportunities for every Minnesota child, and fought for the well-being of every working family across the state. Her community lost a neighbor, a friend, and a trusted colleague. And her two children lost their mother and their father. There are no words to express how much our community will miss her leadership, her unfailing kindness, and her relentless optimism for everything that her state and our country could be. She will be remembered as a tireless public servant, a mother, and a dear friend. Political violence is never the answer. The assassination of Speaker Emerita Hortman and her husband Mark, and the attempted assassination of State Senator John Hoffman and his wife Yvette have rocked our community to the core. These attacks are both a frightening reflection of the political reality in our country right now and a critical reminder that we must work together to lower the temperature and bring our country back together. Speaker Emerita Hortman was the embodiment of the spirit of collaboration, putting her state’s needs before herself. We must follow her example and come together as a community and as a country to end political violence. We are praying for the full recovery of Senator Hoffman and his wife and are keeping the Speaker Emerita’s and Senator’s friends, families, and colleagues in our thoughts. In solidarity, Heather Heather Williams
President
Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee

|
|
---
Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Not authorized by any candidate.
|

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: $3 per month would make an enormous impact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Plus, a note about the word “patriot”
#
Peter — **[today, I’m asking you to start a monthly recurring donation of $3 or more to Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89768?refcode=em20250615-9010&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=3&t=1&akid=9010%2E614464%2EUa3VLh)** Will you please give me a moment to explain why?
**Before I go on, I want to acknowledge that the idea of giving to an organization containing the word “Patriot” might make some of you uncomfortable right now.**
I know our country feels chaotic and uncertain. The corrupt politicians and billionaires ruling over us are literally stripping our communities for parts to make themselves richer — attacking workers, destroying our climate, and slashing funds for critical services. They’re even threatening some of the founding principles of our nation.
For too long, those out-of-touch elites have gotten away with calling themselves “Patriots.” I want you to know that they are not.
**Last year, my team and I founded Heartland Patriots to help real patriots — pro-worker, pro-freedom candidates running grassroots campaigns up and down the ballot — compete against the corrupt politicians, corporate PACs, and billionaire elites corrupting our government.**
The candidates we support are everyday people who believe in the promise of our country, not blind supporters of whatever’s going on in DC right now. They’re ready to fight like hell to make our country better for people like you, not the insiders and elites exploiting our resources and our communities for their own personal profit. **And right now, as billionaires spend huge sums of money to influence elections at every level of government, it has never been more important to lift up these kinds of people-powered candidates.**
That’s why a new monthly recurring donation of $3 or more could make a big impact today. Not only will you give us the ability to amplify candidates and mobilize voters in the moments it matters most. You will support our year-round grassroots movement to take back power for working people across the Heartland and across the country — in 2025, 2026, and beyond.
**[So if you can — and only if you can — will you please consider starting a new monthly recurring donation of $3 or more to Heartland Patriots today, Peter? Recurring donations in ActBlue are flexible, so you can cancel any time if your budget changes!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89768?refcode=em20250615-9010&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=3&t=2&akid=9010%2E614464%2EUa3VLh)**
**[CLICK HERE TO START YOUR MONTHLY DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89768?refcode=em20250615-9010&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=3&t=3&akid=9010%2E614464%2EUa3VLh)**
I’ve been grateful for supporters like you in every campaign I’ve ever run. Now, I’m excited to share that with candidates running in important races up and down the ballot.
More from me soon.
— Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hp-email-footer?refcode=em20250615-9010-footer&t=4&refcode2=9010_614464_Ua3VLh&akid=9010%2E614464%2EUa3VLh)**

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Trump’s parade
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
I went a huge No Kings rally to stand up to Trump and the GOP’s radical agenda – and I had to reach out right away.

Yesterday I went to a huge rally to stand up to Trump and the GOP’s radical agenda – and I had to reach out right away. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109633636/551734505/-629675555?refcode=email_061525_trump-parade&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDM1MjE4ZjItZmI0OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VubtZYpq0-vLpb4q7aq5Ot0vREeHqYqH45ThebDDmIY=) Donald Trump’s military parade celebrating the 250th year of the U.S. Army was yesterday — _and it also conveniently happened to fall on his birthday!_ More than 7,000 military members and about 130 vehicles were expected to be involved, **and reports estimated it would cost $45 million in taxpayer dollars.** Seems to me he wants people like you to foot the bill for his over-the-top birthday party... For a president whose main goal has been to cut “wasteful” government spending, Trump seems to have no issue with the $45 MILLION price tag — even calling it “peanuts compared to the value of doing it.” So where _does_ Donald Trump draw the line for government spending? Apparently, it’s at the cost of benefits for millions of Americans. His “Big, Beautiful Bill” cuts funding for Medicaid and SNAP, threatening millions of Americans’ access to healthcare and food assistance programs. **I refuse to stand by while Trump throws a lavish birthday celebration but ignores the needs of working families.** **[Please, if you’re with me in my fight to stand up to Trump and protect benefits for hardworking Americans, will you donate $5 or whatever amount you can to help me hit my $5,000 fundraising goal before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109633637/551734506/-629675555?refcode=email_061525_trump-parade&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDM1MjE4ZjItZmI0OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VubtZYpq0-vLpb4q7aq5Ot0vREeHqYqH45ThebDDmIY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109633638/551734507/-629675555?refcode=email_061525_trump-parade&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDM1MjE4ZjItZmI0OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VubtZYpq0-vLpb4q7aq5Ot0vREeHqYqH45ThebDDmIY=)

Peter,
---
Before you dread the idea of reading another political email, I want you to know this one’s different.
---
No doom and gloom, no panic. What I’m about to share with you is PROOF that when we step up and answer the call, we BEAT the Left and WIN.
---
When I last reached out, I unfortunately had troubling news to share...
---
**_At the time, polling from Fox News showed Democrats with a _7-point lead_ on the generic congressional ballot._**
---
But just one month later, after following up with countless Republican voters to verify their voter profiles to give me and President Trump the _TRUTH_ about where voters stand in 2025, I couldn’t be more pleased with the results.
---
**_In fact, Rasmussen just released a poll showing the Democrats’ lead has been CUT DOWN to just 1 POINT... well within the _margin_ _of_ _error_!_**
---
We are closing the gap to not only defend but EXPAND President Trump’s majority – and the Left is terrified.
---
Peter, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker.
---
**That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats.**
---
[**Please complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile. >>**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/b6dGZp0RM2ulRH6ezQErbuIE1cNpZCpLI_OFrrzprlQjxJ2uBVNXB366kV9ny_aih9eNQBAxldfmM7vv8SA6nTZIjukfymLOT75Ejq2hFIkU0UiVQkZAugEAVHdHKHy6IrrAfYZYgsYtl5zF5jB_jKlwlc3U5CmHmLJtxxyE5Oj1jbQWUQkaD4FQ6IzOZ_JevDEnaqmlw26lDbm6Uj4O7K3M1WcaGjLoq4UwhNf63G03jSXzq0FYVfwq_SWtOszBD30qDKn_9simHD0fVeOae2jXvwlSfHYjaHOP7Z0sVerkqQVODQJB6RvkBk_p3JUJG1nTo0Z3nY-qsshqXccVSvRq5Olejw_7M9VauJc8FeKv3GWWi0FSx-vge5ubjbuccni7M2C6ljEwGLTXdjI3BiLZuiaZZBK2mMeX61UaCXuem6h8HuzQ8NSVgh9tGXeNOjv-qmGGYFhdsq2mwiGJXS7h2GdfJ59_NSa3oqElknot4pFEWMF6lnCTQXbtu6iUJuLHujOtBYbLnt4gp0fDhX2z51axuIrkIYMgoP4OQXnKQpBVVDoeDV9ek39Hs3XFV11gIYZlewGMo30TJg01FVGjJr6_XmtR90tB6zXpZFH4g_j0X9R7tdNVd6VEq28TxHc5il8LFte5EsCbJLjHEet8mgyV85rU2K09QM3B-Uug5YOZLhf8kdrJFbiI1BzkxRqWAYFajzqcReAdV54VSHmBkESHgMZ_t8VMux88tUnWdxCcef6QJDUp1QnYWDBRGMPu64adtgeFwpiJ5vqiuVHj0Q/Ju0XC5QnndH9eh_T7288_rXzjwXfUQUM/9)

clean_body: I’m counting on you to help close the gap. | Peter, Before you dread the idea of reading another political email, I want you to know this one’s different. No doom and gloom, no panic. What I’m about to share with you is PROOF that when we step up and answer the call, we BEAT the Left and WIN. When I last reached out, I unfortunately had troubling news to share... At the time, polling from Fox News showed Democrats with a 7-point lead on the generic congressional ballot. But just one month later, after following up with countless Republican voters to verify their voter profiles to give me and President Trump the TRUTH about where voters stand in 2025, I couldn’t be more pleased with the results. In fact, Rasmussen just released a poll showing the Democrats’ lead has been CUT DOWN to just 1 POINT... well within the margin of error! We are closing the gap to not only defend but EXPAND President Trump’s majority – and the Left is terrified. Peter, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker. That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats. Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040 |
