body:
All hell is breaking loose around the country and as local law enforcement struggles to contain radical agitators, the question is: should President Trump send in the big guns?

| |

# [Should Trump send in the troops?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=165997032&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1OTk3MDMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTAwMDI0MTgsImV4cCI6MTc1MjU5NDQxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6-gz1lNItHSlwuWdvpaBoeNvcBig9UGnCxz9Iwg62ZY)
### All hell is breaking loose around the country and as local law enforcement struggles to contain radical agitators, the question is: should President Trump send in the big guns?
| | [Richie McGinniss](https://substack.com/@richiemcginniss)
---
| Jun 15| | | ∙| | Guest post
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/@richiemcginniss)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=165997032&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1OTk3MDMyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MDAwMjQxOCwiZXhwIjoxNzUyNTk0NDE4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YqxW15ytIUolE-Dbt_vsoEEEpZqx7WJzkh2yuGsholY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

At this moment it appears that entropic momentum is accelerating along with the predictable summer heat. Pockets on the West Coast erupted into riots last week, what appear to be cold-blooded political assassinations committed against elected officials in middle-America Minnesota, and bombs and rockets are going back and forth between Israel and Iran in the Middle East. Not to mention a series of "NO KINGS" protests in dozens of major cities across the country centered around the Army's 250th anniversary parade here in DC.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cec7c3af-45bf-4e04-8236-63fa00bcbbaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As political violence and global conflict simmer to a boil, the imperative question remains if the partisan gamesmanship that cleared the way for so much chaos in 2020 will be repeated yet again.
Take, for example, the recent back and forth between Trump and the Governor of California and the Mayor of LA. The Democratic leaders view it as their moment in the limelight, their big chance to spar with the Orange Man Bad. Gavin Newsom is clearly making a Presidential bid, and is **[giving Trump his best "don't mess with my state, tough guy" bit](https://substack.com/redirect/3d5003e6-8a58-46b1-a12b-ad7e23998af1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[,](https://substack.com/redirect/3d5003e6-8a58-46b1-a12b-ad7e23998af1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) but as we saw in 2020 in places like Seattle, Portland, and Kenosha, these petty quarrels on twitter created power vacuums that resulted in Americans dying in real life.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Strand](https://substack.com/redirect/ea0ae68a-8092-45eb-a845-0793bfe0cd9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Have you seen what castor oil does to your liver?
Watch the shocking video below:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ea0ae68a-8092-45eb-a845-0793bfe0cd9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you're over 40 and struggle with...
Stubborn weight gain, digestive issues, low energy - then you need to[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/ea0ae68a-8092-45eb-a845-0793bfe0cd9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[watch this video](https://substack.com/redirect/ea0ae68a-8092-45eb-a845-0793bfe0cd9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** right now.
You're likely suffering from the same thing that 98+ million other Americans are, and that's a clogged liver that is stopping your body from breaking down fat.
But when you use castor oil in[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/ea0ae68a-8092-45eb-a845-0793bfe0cd9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[this weird way](https://substack.com/redirect/ea0ae68a-8092-45eb-a845-0793bfe0cd9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** each morning (not by drinking it)... Your liver becomes up to 80% more efficient - burning your stores of stubborn fat like jet fuel.
**[>> Do THIS with castor oil to flush out your liver clog and drop stubborn fat](https://substack.com/redirect/ea0ae68a-8092-45eb-a845-0793bfe0cd9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Click To Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/ea0ae68a-8092-45eb-a845-0793bfe0cd9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
Whether it's immigration, or Israel, or attempts to commit violence against public officials, our elected leaders and our thought leaders should take heed from what happened in 2020. With all the modern technology, it is easy to become lulled into a false sense of security, to think that we have advanced beyond our primal nature that can make a man grow bloodthirsty in the blink of an eye.
I have seen what happens to the human brain when its senses are overwhelmed by copious pepper spray, tear gas, or the hard whack of a billy club: the frontal cortex--the part of the brain above the eyes that does the heavy thinking--goes silent and the more basic instincts centered in the brainstem take hold.
In these situations, it's always the strongest or the most well armed that prevail. Concepts like compassion or empathy melt away and only the burning passion of blind rage remain. When this occurs in a densely populated urban environment, the most common outcome is bedlam, destruction, and death.
My own experience with the National Guard is that they are young men and women from across the 50 states, albeit green and less experienced in riot control than say, a seasoned DC Metro cop. But the presence of rifles and Humvees have a tendency to make protesters and potential rioters think twice.
While there was a National Guard presence in Kenosha, it was too little and too late. They numbered only a few hundred and focused their efforts in protecting the courthouse while the nearby commercial district burned and gunshots rang out.
[Read About It In Riot Diet](https://substack.com/redirect/0ecb60b0-6201-4311-8a85-0aaa69af5c05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5d13717b-7c48-4e6d-97ed-4537f65be0d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
National Guard in front of Kenosha Courthouse. August, 2020
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2559c26c-1761-4840-bf81-56aafb6a6b06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Vehicle fires in Kenosha just a few blocks from the Kenosha Courthouse. August, 2020.
In Seattle's CHAZ the city's elected leaders simply allowed for protesters to create their own anarchic fiefdom until two black teens were shot dead at the "security" checkpoints set up on the perimeter of the zone.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f03e5d81-1a82-4a3d-90b8-97bd28dc8b95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Armed "security" guards in Seattle's CHAZ. June, 2020.
In Portland, months of sustained riots finally brought forth the targeted killing of Patriot Prayer member Aaron Danielson. His killer, self-proclaimed anti-fascist Michael Reinoehl, was gunned down by federal officers as the so-called "summer of love" drew to a close.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7cc3e648-8898-47a2-9367-29cf3a23440d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Portland Federal Courthouse. July, 2020
It only takes one agitator or one match to turn a protest into a riot, and after the chaos takes hold all concepts of law and order cease to exist. These are the times when it is important to have armed boots on the ground because the modern man can turn to a bloodthirsty savage with the flash of a bang.
* * *
| | POLL
---
Should Trump continue to deploy military personnel to riot zones?
| [Yes](https://substack..mya-gL54gDSVEDoUjZWbudX_--pf4-c78BPNXCjr8Yc?)
---
[No](https://substack..YBWjglGnDXGkrSdbgd29Dh8Lxt9JDspU8cerFHvUYTQ?)

They numbered only a few hundred and focused their efforts in protecting the courthouse while the nearby commercial district burned and gunshots rang out. | | ---|---|--- National Guard in front of Kenosha Courthouse. August, 2020 | | ---|---|--- Vehicle fires in Kenosha just a few blocks from the Kenosha Courthouse. August, 2020. In Seattle's CHAZ the city's elected leaders simply allowed for protesters to create their own anarchic fiefdom until two black teens were shot dead at the "security" checkpoints set up on the perimeter of the zone. | | ---|---|--- Armed "security" guards in Seattle's CHAZ. June, 2020. In Portland, months of sustained riots finally brought forth the targeted killing of Patriot Prayer member Aaron Danielson. His killer, self-proclaimed anti-fascist Michael Reinoehl, was gunned down by federal officers as the so-called "summer of love" drew to a close. | | ---|---|--- Portland Federal Courthouse. July, 2020 It only takes one agitator or one match to turn a protest into a riot, and after the chaos takes hold all concepts of law and order cease to exist. These are the times when it is important to have armed boots on the ground because the modern man can turn to a bloodthirsty savage with the flash of a bang. | | POLL Should Trump continue to deploy military personnel to riot zones? | ? ? PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | A guest post by| McGinniss is a DC-based independent journalist with over 12 years of experience working for media outlets across the political spectrum. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Happy Father’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250615-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250615-email]
Peter,
Happy Father’s Day!
This year, our family is celebrating a very special Father’s Day—my husband’s first as a dad to our baby boy.
Watching him step into fatherhood has been a beautiful experience. From the quiet moments to the joyful chaos, he’s embraced every part of it with love and patience. Seeing our son look up at him with wide eyes and a big smile reminds me of how lucky we are to have strong, caring fathers in our lives.
Today, we celebrate all the dads, stepdads, grandfathers, father figures, and caregivers who show up daily with love and dedication. Your guidance, support, and strength shape the lives of those around you in ways that words can’t fully capture.
From our family to yours—wishing you a joyful and love-filled Father’s Day.
Warmly,
Jena Griswold

_Begin Forwarded Message from George Latimer:_

Peter,

As we near mid-June, we’re also closing in on the end of the second fiscal quarter of the year, and our next FEC deadline. All campaigns submit fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission at the end of each fiscal quarter — and _the numbers go public._
Why is this so important? When these numbers go public, the GOP will use them to start planning to retain their congressional majority next year.
In short: if they think they have a chance at keeping their majority, they’ll continue to push their extremist agenda (despite its unpopularity) to the detriment of all of us. If we want to flip the House _and_ the Senate, we have to start gaining momentum early, and we need _YOUR_ help!
We’re just a few days from our mid-month fundraising deadline, and have set an ambitious goal to raise $5,000 to keep us on track to our end-of-month goal. **[Will you chip in $10 or any amount today to help us send a message to the GOP that we are prepared for a fight in 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109634774/551737375/1711749452?amount=10&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_061525_MM_120DO_D3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RjZmEwMGMtZmU0OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cAlMEYhoWv1eHRKXlHwvTSxAo0YvCQqJk5d1PUapYDM=)**

For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

clean_body: George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, did you see this message from George? Despite the constant chaos, George and his Democratic colleagues have been working across the aisle to deliver for the American people, but House Republicans would rather play partisan politics than work together to find solutions. Remember Peter, Republicans’ budget bill, which will kick millions off of affordable healthcare and food relief, passed the House by just one vote. That means winning close toss-up races can make the difference in flipping the House to undo this mess. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you again, Peter. Begin Forwarded Message from George Latimer: Peter, As we near mid-June, we’re also closing in on the end of the second fiscal quarter of the year, and our next FEC deadline. All campaigns submit fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission at the end of each fiscal quarter — and the numbers go public. Why is this so important? When these numbers go public, the GOP will use them to start planning to retain their congressional majority next year. In short: if they think they have a chance at keeping their majority, they’ll continue to push their extremist agenda (despite its unpopularity) to the detriment of all of us. If we want to flip the House and the Senate, we have to start gaining momentum early, and we need YOUR help! We’re just a few days from our mid-month fundraising deadline, and have set an ambitious goal to raise $5,000 to keep us on track to our end-of-month goal. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = As always, thank you for your continued support, George | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: My husband, Jonnie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109635148/551738434/1276597034?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.15_Fathers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2E1MWYwMy1mZjQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZGBI25OhQeum6mxDWf7NHQ2E1ltPsjNWRg6W7C0mdA=) When I was a little girl, I looked up to my dad as someone who always cared for me and my brother and sister. He helped us learn how to be strong, smart and kind. So when I got married, it was my hope that Jonathan would be a great dad too. Our goal was to raise our boys, Theo and Henry, into adults with strong character and good integrity. I’d like to think we succeeded at that as a team. When I was considering running for office, Jonnie told me: “As long as you’re making a difference, as long as you’re helping people, this is something we’re going to do.” He uses that same mindset when it comes to our sons taking risks and overcoming fears. **Because of dads like Jonnie, moms like me can have successful careers — and even get elected to the U.S. Senate.** But we need to make it possible for more families to succeed, and that's what my work in the Senate is all about. So, happy Father’s Day to my husband Jonnie, and to all the supportive and hardworking dads out there. With love and gratitude, Kirsten | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109635149/551738435/1276597034?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.15_Fathers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2E1MWYwMy1mZjQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZGBI25OhQeum6mxDWf7NHQ2E1ltPsjNWRg6W7C0mdA=)

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23141%2E4449941%2EkvPXhn) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23141%2E4449941%2EkvPXhn) We didn't want to write to you today.

BUT, Donald Trump is threatening to CUT Social Security because of DOGE: | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62399?t=3&akid=23141%2E4449941%2EkvPXhn) | [**Breaking from _The Washington Post:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62399?t=4&akid=23141%2E4449941%2EkvPXhn)

[**" Supreme Court lets DOGE access Social Security data of millions of Americans"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62399?t=5&akid=23141%2E4449941%2EkvPXhn)
---|---
But, the deadline to sign our petition to SAVE Social Security from Trump's tyranny came and went... **_but we never saw your signature._**

**Too much is at stake for America 's seniors who have paid into Social Security their entire lives if the GOP slashes this crucial program, so we're reactivating our petition until the end of the day to give you a chance to sign it.**

It will only be open for another 12 hours.
[**_Please do not squander this opportunity! Just sign your name:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62399?t=6&akid=23141%2E4449941%2EkvPXhn)

_Fight for Reform_

\---- FORWARDED MESSAGE ----
[**DISGUSTING: Elon Musk Calls Social Security "The Biggest Ponzi Scheme Of All Time"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62399?t=8&akid=23141%2E4449941%2EkvPXhn)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61168?t=9&akid=23141%2E4449941%2EkvPXhn)
The MAGA billionaire's latest attack on Social Security is appalling.

And remember: Elon Musk's DOGE could really cut Social Security!!

**That 's why Congress HAS to protect Social Security and safeguard it from Elon and MAGA Republican destruction!!**

[**Be one of the emergency 6O,OOO signatures we need today to demand Congress save Social Security ->**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62399?t=10&akid=23141%2E4449941%2EkvPXhn)
[SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY: SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62399?t=11&akid=23141%2E4449941%2EkvPXhn)
---
Elon Musk said the social safety net that benefits 68 million Americans is a pyramid scheme and repeated claims that millions of dead Americans are receiving Social Security payouts.

**WE KNOW** this is just not true!

**WE KNOW** that Social Security benefits are essential to Americans' livelihoods.

**WE KNOW** millions of folks would be living out on the streets without their Social Security.

**AND WE KNOW** that Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and his fake DOGE agency are looking for **ANY** reason to gut and privatize Social Security.

Bernie Sanders was right all along:
[**Please sign your name to tell Congress to SAVE Social Security before it 's too late! Our petition requires 60,000 signatures by 11:59 PM ->**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62399?t=12&akid=23141%2E4449941%2EkvPXhn)

# [An American Hero](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=165997538&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1OTk3NTM4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTAwMDI0NzUsImV4cCI6MTc1MjU5NDQ3NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.osRNo6Vz6HBTauIe8SMiSHg53AEh1Z2wDVITZIaru_k)
### An immigrant's tale for father's day
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| Jun 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=165997538&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1OTk3NTM4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MDAwMjQ3NSwiZXhwIjoxNzUyNTk0NDc1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AnpOxaRKGSnua3FX3zGvgVbGXe0IhhmXyx09Y6F23BI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

Today, as Father's Day arrives in the midst of turmoil around immigration, I want to share the story of my best friend's dad growing up. A refugee from Eritrea (one of the most repressive countries on earth), he barely escaped with his life, built a family in America, and shows more strength, character, and greatness below than any self-proclaimed Christian-values politician ever has.
I've told this story before, but with many thousands of new subscribers, it's worth telling again, particularly today. If you didn't have time to read it last time, it's about everything America could and should be for the world, and what we are losing if we aren't.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.CauMGxtNjaJg4tbbJMU8J7n19FwcYimwqvWH3oP93o8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165997538)
* * *
Growing up, my mom had to get creative looking for cheap or free ways to keep us kids entertained during the summers. The standard strategy included: swimming lessons at the public pool, long hours at the public library, and attending every single vacation bible school in town.
And when I say every single one, I mean... Every. Single. One. Catholic, Lutheran, Episcopalian, Disciples of Christ, Southern Baptist, you name it...
You'd think this diversity of faiths and locations would have kept things interesting. However, the truth is that you did basically the same thing at all of them. The same coloring sheets. The same songs. The same parachute games. The same ten stories.
Once a summer, however, we got to do something special. Lincoln University, right down the street from our house, hosted a program called Learning Unlimited, where you got to do all sorts of cool stuff. Write plays, make pottery, cook exotic food, play red rover, learn integers.
Well, ok, maybe it wasn't ALL cool, but it sure beat coloring in a cutout of Daniel in the Lion's Den and pasting it onto a popsicle stick for the tenth week in a row.
Learning Unlimited is also where I first met my friend for life and future best man, Benyam (whose Washington Post op-ed about running black in America I [featured in a previous substack](https://substack.com/redirect/2b0b999d-737b-4628-bb89-044db1ca9f13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). His parents, refugees of the Eritrean war of Independence against Ethiopia, were drawn to mid-Missouri because they had family here and because Lincoln University, as an HBCU, was a welcoming environment for them. Benyam's mom graduated from Lincoln and his parents worked there until their retirement.
In all the years growing up learning how to eat injera and dance like a habesha at his house, Benyam's dad was quietly in the background. Always supportive and entirely encouraging, sometimes funny, but never standing out in any way. Certainly not as your macho-masculine tough guy.
To be real about it, Benyam's mom, Turu, seemed like the badass of the house. I mean, she smashed spiders with her bare feet and ate ground beef raw out of the package! The hardest thing we ever saw Benyam's old man do was gargle rubbing alcohol. Which is admittedly pretty fierce, but not exactly worth any street cred with the other kids. And the most interesting thing about the collected old man was probably that his toes were kind of crooked.
Well, that or maybe his weird name: Tesfai (which is pronounced tess-fi, with the fi like the fi in wifi).
Benyam and I are still friends, and a few years ago, when I was stationed at the Pentagon, Benyam called me upset. One of his uncles had gotten agitated at a family gathering and told Benyam that a man who had tortured his dad years ago in the home country was now a cab driver here in the US.
Tortured?! I asked, incredulous.
Yeah, man, it's nuts. I had no idea, said Benyam. Absolutely crazy. Apparently Pops was thrown in a black hole and nearly tortured to death for who knows how long back in the day. And now we know that the guy who did it is here, just living the good life, like it's nothing. I can't just sit here. I gotta go after this guy. Expose him. He's a damn war criminal. I've at least gotta confront him. How can I be a man knowing that this guy is out there just living free in America after what he's done?
Benyam obsessed over the idea of confronting the man who had tortured his father. He dug into whatever details he could find. He interrogated relatives in pursuit of more information on what had happened. He talked to just about everyone he could. Well except, his dad, of course.
Time went by. Benyam and I mulled over ways to approach the man who had tortured Tesfai. Get into his cab. Ambush him on a podcast. Report him as a war criminal. But first we needed to know more.
Then, in 2021, we were at Benyam's parents' house in Jefferson City for the Fourth of July. Sitting in their living room, with Benyam's two little girls and his parents, someone asked Benyam's parents to tell us how they came to America, thinking it would be a fun all-American immigration story for the Fourth.
His parents talked about growing up in then-Ethiopia in the 50's and 60's. Benyam's mom showed us a picture of her being honored by the Emperor of Ethiopia at her high school graduation and another photo of Tesfai with a live lion. She talked about how her family and Tesfai, who she was only dating at the time, had encouraged her to escape seek a better life during the wars. How a relative of Tesfai's in Missouri had eventually gotten Turu to Jefferson City, where she attended Lincoln and worked at the Hotel DeVille's restaurant to make ends meet. At the time, Tesfai worked for Ethiopian Airlines, and was able to get to Kansas City through work, so they could still occasionally see each other.
Ultimately, as the conflict in Eritrea intensified, Tesfai decided to give up his job and come to America to be with Turu. But he needed to take one last trip back to Eritrea to get everything in order. It was a classic love story intertwined with the American Dream. From the way they spoke, you could feel the light that America held for the rest of the world during those years.
Back home, however, the story took a dark turn. Before Tesfai could depart, he was snatched for questioning by local police. If not for a family member seeing it happen, he would have simply disappeared and no one would have known.
As Tesfai spoke, Benyam was riveted to his seat. This is what he had been wanting to hear for years but never knew how to ask for. He wanted all the details. We quietly bribed his little girls to go to the other room with their tablets while Tesfai continued.
It was a common story in Eritrean Ethiopia at the time. Tesfai had just been unlucky. In the wrong place at the wrong time.
He was taken into captivity and accused of political crimes he didn't even know had happened and wasn't in the country to commit. They accused him of being a revolutionary. They locked him away, hidden from the world, and without communication. They tortured him to get a confession. He described some of the terrible things they did. One relentless man in particular. We learned how he had gotten his crooked toes. We heard what it was like to break, to get to the point where you would say anything or do anything to make the pain stop.
Turu talked about how her dreams disappeared when Tesfai did. About what it was like, being in America, such a safe place, surrounded by prosperity, while Tesfai was locked away. She didn't know what he was going through, she wouldn't have even known why he hadn't come and why he wasn't writing her if that relative hadn't been lucky enough to see him taken and let everyone know. She talked about how overwhelming it was not knowing if he was alive or dead, or if she would ever know.
One day, Tesfai said, nearly a year later, he was simply set free. With no explanation, no direction, no nothing. Just dumped back on the street. He made his way back to family and tried to put his life back together.
From then on, everywhere he went he was terrified. Looking over his shoulder, waiting to be taken again. Travel out of the country was restricted, yet his old boss at the airline secured him a flight to America, an incredibly risky thing for him to do. Tesfai couldn't leave, however, unless someone was willing to sign an attestation and vouch that he would return. He couldn't ask someone to do that, because he knew what would happen to them when he didn't come back.
An older gentleman, barely an acquaintance, a friend of a friend, heard about Tesfai's plight when they were all at a bar commiserating about what life had become. The old man approached Tesfai and calmly and simply told him that he would vouch for him.
Tesfai, in shock, refused. He couldn't put this man at risk. But the man, who was ready to risk his life for a stranger and a love story, insisted. Tesfai asked him to sleep on it.
The next day the man signed the papers.
Tesfai was too afraid to call Turu and tell her, in case someone was listening. His anxiety grew as the day of his flight came closer. Tesfai had second thoughts. Perhaps it was a set-up and the man was a government agent. But Tesfai wouldn't have another chance and, as he had learned, danger lurked around every corner.
When the day arrived, Tesfai made his way to the airport. He was sure he wouldn't make it onto the plane and expected that tap on his shoulder at any moment. In his mind, every sound was the sound of armed guards pushing through the crowd to carry him off. Once airborne, every shift in the sky was the plane turning back to take him back in. The delay during his connection was because security was coming to grab him.
But, then, just like that, he landed in America. And he was free.
The rest, as they say, is history. His grandchildren were called back into the room. Benyam's parents told us about re-uniting, marrying, and having their two boys. How they raised them as Missourians, and worked full productive careers in America before finally retiring a few years ago.
Benyam was speechless. This was his moment to dig, but he was frozen. I stepped in and told Tesfai what we had heard. That the man who tortured him was living in America. That he would likely never answer for what he had done. I asked him what he thought about that.
Tesfai looked at us like we were two schoolchildren.
"Let him have peace," Tesfai said calmly and without hesitation. "I made peace with it a long time ago. If I had chosen hate, or resentment, or dwelled on what he had done, it would have ruined this beautiful life we made here in America. I would have lost even more than he had taken. Jesus showed us the power to forgive. I follow his example."
He took Turu's hand and they smiled at us, the sound of their grandchildren playing in the background, gearing up to watch the fireworks over the Missouri River that night and celebrate 245 years of American freedom with their grandpa, an American hero.

Lucas

The delay during his connection was because security was coming to grab him. But, then, just like that, he landed in America. And he was free. The rest, as they say, is history. His grandchildren were called back into the room. Benyam's parents told us about re-uniting, marrying, and having their two boys. How they raised them as Missourians, and worked full productive careers in America before finally retiring a few years ago. Benyam was speechless. This was his moment to dig, but he was frozen. I stepped in and told Tesfai what we had heard. That the man who tortured him was living in America. That he would likely never answer for what he had done. I asked him what he thought about that. Tesfai looked at us like we were two schoolchildren. "Let him have peace," Tesfai said calmly and without hesitation. "I made peace with it a long time ago. If I had chosen hate, or resentment, or dwelled on what he had done, it would have ruined this beautiful life we made here in America. I would have lost even more than he had taken. Jesus showed us the power to forgive. I follow his example." He took Turu's hand and they smiled at us, the sound of their grandchildren playing in the background, gearing up to watch the fireworks over the Missouri River that night and celebrate 245 years of American freedom with their grandpa, an American hero. Peter, if you're feeling overwhelmed by all of the chaos and confusion in the news, I want you to know that I completely understand.
**Donald Trump and his allies are flooding us with fear, disinformation, and division – all in an effort to distract us from what they're really doing: **
* Attacking immigrant communities en masse
* Slashing Medicaid through the GOP's so-called "Big, Beautiful Bill"
* Gutting emergency preparedness, scientific research, and disaster relief
* Harming working families with reckless tariffs
* And so much more...

It's not just chaos – it's a calculated strategy to wear us down and force us to give up.

_But I'm not giving up and I know you aren't either._
**Together, we can rise above this noise and meet this moment with action.

But in order for me to be able to keep fighting for The People, we need to hit every goal we set, including tonight's $20,000 mid-month goal. That's why he and his allies have been so relentless in their attacks against me. They think they can just silence elected officials who stand up to these unconstitutional policies.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: This is what resistance looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We must reject ideologies and policies that seek to divide us. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW5NNowvmUhAygfwXKwjfimXZ9BHQo19rZVl0aYzVpn4cJtOEAw_cXT7FJBfM4ER7Dy4IenC-upgNiYp1uhWlXy6dyGIqewug5X9iVz5DbDN9bEUrcZcfHGXr3g_UCNjUZ-tyovJ7KmSQvpnmJgwdiXyeSUwuPjt-ATPmwJ6rq_Tw/4hd/nOtE8wnWT-KGU-HR14qFyA/h0/h001.4kmOBigBSgig0ltbfK7iaqAjShQMpAMpXAfQxijIIiM)
---
Friend, Dissent is patriotic and this weekend we showed the strength of our resistance movement. In large and small cities and towns, the American people stood up at more than 2,000 rallies across the country to fight fascism and demand the multiracial democracy our Constitution promises. **[Every day I’m in Congress, I am using the power of my office to fight for you and hold this authoritarian administration accountable.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxewXXSWu898dZ-6Pr1Y9JTo79ADpDV0uZ6XlPaSdk3CiJ9BlkBAhlFIc1_QHdmti0IKFddnjaUGbxzAVtU01FyhZeRchzj4_BOQl-LUiRiWOUa_EJwIgZDWihm7RxnGJyawpwEaDj2itqoSSAN5WQwhA21mAku1Q0vsGanosXLeZV4dbYZ-lbbb1MsSuhTPerV9CPfp9xA92ALHoBNkfrR9lKh3v0hEEXDY9JU61iVZgUKYbWvccDz_QBL0DdlVues54WufoezY2Q8mo135fqO85MUSIHo-GhJ-u1XP8MkrZLI9hzbVq23IFGEEj6DP3iUU1qghzdvMcU2oBxusaP/4hd/nOtE8wnWT-KGU-HR14qFyA/h1/h001.8armh-3gZ7SaG5EAvlCbIE1ow9uToI4akkQO1IMGjRU) ** Please see my email below for more details about how we’re resisting Trump together. Then, if you can, donate today to power our resistance movement and stand up to this wannabe dictator. Thank you for always being by my side, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Jun 14, 2025
Subject: This is what resistance looks like
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Today, I will be joining people in my district to protest Trump’s fascist attacks on our communities. He’s trying to silence dissent, but we will not be silenced. **[It’s not too late to find a No Kings rally near you today. Click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxewXXSWu898dZ-6Pr1Y9JTo79ADpDV0uZ6XlPaSdk3DatW_iggQ8zauEBndhFlZh3qnNqULpFIzmffFzCdR5B6madaB6MGnxKlfHU3p8Ak3HoNVhmxN5dB51fThEdrrkqqlIydazcOe8rTby6coEsi3uyo0wXpL3A_bLp7-CUpqMBgSBz7yp7cho0Rcxa98-7U4E7TaJsEFw76CewLrYI98UCqvgWbRu86EMutOY6U-f6L_2LY3J2IashqVQWc-g-v6WVyipQDA9qhkTd6jJ9KT2k-YtOgAfzHf1h5lXNdkf43DAlv05DLIwN8FfEEZDempgnGfskuTn59wxwULDi/4hd/nOtE8wnWT-KGU-HR14qFyA/h2/h001.t02hykD3XwpUn28XIcNeNXaOqmZp8trdokk0P40vicU)** I’m doing what I was sent to Congress to do: stand up to billionaire bullies and enact policies that uplift working people and vulnerable communities. Here are some ways I’m resisting Trump in Congress: **When Trump froze and delayed funding for Head Start programs, he jeopardized crucial support for 800,000 children under the age of 5—including meals, healthcare, and childcare.** I led the Mamas’ Caucus and 23 of my colleagues in sending him a letter demanding he restore funding. We then saw immediate improvements to help over 50 Head Start centers access their funding. But the threat continues, and I promise to continue defending these vital programs from Trump’s attacks. **When the administration suddenly closed Job Corps centers around the country, leaving thousands of students devastated and unhoused, some Michigan Congressmembers and I sent a letter to the Trump administration demanding that they immediately reverse this reckless decision.** In Michigan alone, more than 700 students were relying on Job Corps for housing, meals, stability, and opportunities to get out of poverty. Following our pressure, a U.S. judge temporarily blocked the elimination of Job Corps, noting that presidential administrations aren’t allowed to end programs that are set up and funded by Congress. But the Trump administration has been ignoring court orders, so we need to keep the pressure on. **Last week, Trump’s shameful expansion of his first term’s Muslim and African ban went into effect―now targeting people from 19 countries.** Rooted in white nationalism, this policy will separate families and put people’s lives in danger. We must reject ideologies and policies that seek to divide us. All humans have equal rights and worth, and we will keep pushing back against the ongoing dehumanization of our communities.**I’m co-leading legislation to block presidents from issuing these travel bans.** And this month, in a Financial Services Committee hearing, **I made sure everyone knew how Trump is using his office to further enrich himself.** Just since taking office in January, Trump’s personal fortune increased by $2.9 billion—through shameless abuses of power and corrupt cryptocurrency schemes. **These are just a few examples of how we’re resisting this administration’s attacks on our communities. clean_body: We must reject ideologies and policies that seek to divide us. | | | Friend, Dissent is patriotic and this weekend we showed the strength of our resistance movement. In large and small cities and towns, the American people stood up at more than 2,000 rallies across the country to fight fascism and demand the multiracial democracy our Constitution promises. Please see my email below for more details about how we’re resisting Trump together. Then, if you can, donate today to power our resistance movement and stand up to this wannabe dictator. Thank you for always being by my side, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Jun 14, 2025 Subject: This is what resistance looks like To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Today, I will be joining people in my district to protest Trump’s fascist attacks on our communities. He’s trying to silence dissent, but we will not be silenced. I’m doing what I was sent to Congress to do: stand up to billionaire bullies and enact policies that uplift working people and vulnerable communities. Here are some ways I’m resisting Trump in Congress: When Trump froze and delayed funding for Head Start programs, he jeopardized crucial support for 800,000 children under the age of 5—including meals, healthcare, and childcare. I led the Mamas’ Caucus and 23 of my colleagues in sending him a letter demanding he restore funding. We then saw immediate improvements to help over 50 Head Start centers access their funding. But the threat continues, and I promise to continue defending these vital programs from Trump’s attacks. When the administration suddenly closed Job Corps centers around the country, leaving thousands of students devastated and unhoused, some Michigan Congressmembers and I sent a letter to the Trump administration demanding that they immediately reverse this reckless decision. In Michigan alone, more than 700 students were relying on Job Corps for housing, meals, stability, and opportunities to get out of poverty. Following our pressure, a U.S. judge temporarily blocked the elimination of Job Corps, noting that presidential administrations aren’t allowed to end programs that are set up and funded by Congress. But the Trump administration has been ignoring court orders, so we need to keep the pressure on. Last week, Trump’s shameful expansion of his first term’s Muslim and African ban went into effect―now targeting people from 19 countries. Rooted in white nationalism, this policy will separate families and put people’s lives in danger. We must reject ideologies and policies that seek to divide us. All humans have equal rights and worth, and we will keep pushing back against the ongoing dehumanization of our communities.I’m co-leading legislation to block presidents from issuing these travel bans. And this month, in a Financial Services Committee hearing, I made sure everyone knew how Trump is using his office to further enrich himself. Just since taking office in January, Trump’s personal fortune increased by $2.9 billion—through shameless abuses of power and corrupt cryptocurrency schemes. These are just a few examples of how we’re resisting this administration’s attacks on our communities. I know you’re with me in this fight. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Watch. Listen to these stories. Do not click away.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Lost in the theatrical displays of toughness from an increasingly unhinged president, are some of the stories of his indiscriminate raids.

Friends -
Lost in the theatrical displays of toughness from an increasingly unhinged president are some of the stories of his indiscriminate raids.
I am not talking about violent criminals targeted by ICE. We have cooperated with ICE when it comes to targeting criminals.
I’m talking about people like the 12-year old boy I met in Oxnard, California, who was weeping - crying - because his mother and father were both detained ... disappeared. He has no brothers, sisters or family. His parents have worked more than two decades in the same fields. No criminal records. Disappeared. Gone.
I am talking about the single mother swept off the streets at 5:45 AM -- again, no criminal record -- agents driving her around, interrogating her for hours until she finally convinced them to let her call her three children.
**[Watch. Listen to these stories. Do not click away.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4373?t=1&akid=2357%2E4767699%2ETJorGr)**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4373?t=2&akid=2357%2E4767699%2ETJorGr)
And here is the kicker. Trump's politicization of our military is pulling these brave Americans off of critical missions in California -- not for public safety, but only to further his agenda.
I'm talking about how five of California’s 14 National Guard fire crews are understaffed ... including crews that "rake the forest" as Trump likes to say ... all because Trump deployed them for a political stunt in LA.
I'm talking about the National Guard I placed at the border to stop fentanyl smuggling sent to LA.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4374?t=3&akid=2357%2E4767699%2ETJorGr)
What Trump is doing is not just illegal -- it's also dangerous.
Gavin Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
As you've seen in recent days, California is under attack from the Trump administration: from deploying the military in LA to escalate tensions and provoke violence, talking about defunding our state, and even threatening to arrest Gavin Newsom.
If standing up to Trump matters to you, please donate to my Campaign for Democracy PAC today. [**We’ll put your contribution to work taking the fight to red state authoritarian leaders.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-25?refcode=em250612-1&refcode2=2357_4767699_TJorGr&akid=2357%2E4767699%2ETJorGr)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-25?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em250612-1&refcode2=2357_4767699_TJorGr&akid=2357%2E4767699%2ETJorGr)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-25?express_lane=true&refcode=em250612-1&refcode2=2357_4767699_TJorGr&akid=2357%2E4767699%2ETJorGr)**

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb2f4ef8466b4765b301ed34981af77b&_e=oMHo-_6zffxvKUO3Hms3AlZViRQW7AmZREq4qL_0g0i7C7sgPuLQ0OKyqi0aI4Wdavaqz0fAsS3CHsnjKD2rvSbDf3LGLH8DqFTnSYBBieUWeu_Nt_aB-5Ans2BJ7FhmnEJZiqlNAr7ZN06q-dHfh63SXDHjaN4jJ7Hnvdw8SYNXxBXIRKGYUXmBV1R4w_u6wihpdav_s1Ieo2ik38CmvqnmVy30JlZt7x-dJRFlkO7Nr7ANTzi1ZFdeP6-HqwOz1rHIOpyWDKzZxVviwhJT1HokWznoYe3UyjyhgAMrELcTkNKMLRTKZ1euaag6gRf8QugDj_M-hdO-hQ00hm6It9cib-Wus2S8LiuUicD14lIKj2nSLeCAnts_dcjGr9J6NwOv36ILdC5k3oveV8c9C6NaRuQFFKIyhWuI96_cyIspwqwpFQSIhZu0X0A2YVsSj6Nr0ZEofq2yJNG2Rv5iDg%3D%3D) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

name: DASS Legal
subject: BREAKING: States sue to block Trump’s federal election takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109636610/551742770/-729519538?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2NDVkMS0wMTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eCjAU5hKUoSNevsjoGNhLKOXu2LqllRqNwJZqVusWF4=)
**➤➤ BREAKING: States file lawsuit to stop Trump’s election power grab** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109636612/551742772/-1878656517?refcode=em-6.15.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2NDVkMS0wMTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eCjAU5hKUoSNevsjoGNhLKOXu2LqllRqNwJZqVusWF4=)
* * *
This is huge, friend. A coalition of state Attorneys General is suing to block Donald Trump’s sweeping executive order on elections that would give the federal government unprecedented control over how elections are run across the country. The lawsuit argues what we already know: **this order is unconstitutional**. It’s a blatant attempt to strip states of their authority to run elections. This is power that the Constitution explicitly gives to the states and Congress, **not the President**. Let’s be clear about what’s happening here. **Trump is trying to rewrite election law by executive order.** He’s bypassing Congress, undermining state election officials, and creating a blueprint for rigging the rules in his favor. This lawsuit is a crucial first step in fighting back, but legal battles like this don’t come cheap. The stakes couldn’t be higher, and we don’t have time to wait and see what their next move will be. At DASS, we’re building the infrastructure to support the officials and legal teams who will be on the front lines of this fight. **Our Legal Fund is how we respond** — fast, forcefully, and with the resources it takes to win. [**Can you rush a donation of $3 or whatever you can to help us stop Trump’s illegal power grab and protect free, fair elections in every state?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109636614/551742774/-1751156451?refcode=em-6.15.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2NDVkMS0wMTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eCjAU5hKUoSNevsjoGNhLKOXu2LqllRqNwJZqVusWF4=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109636615/551742776/-1751156451?refcode=em-6.15.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2NDVkMS0wMTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eCjAU5hKUoSNevsjoGNhLKOXu2LqllRqNwJZqVusWF4=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ BREAKING: States file lawsuit to stop Trump’s election power grab = This is huge, friend. A coalition of state Attorneys General is suing to block Donald Trump’s sweeping executive order on elections that would give the federal government unprecedented control over how elections are run across the country. The lawsuit argues what we already know: this order is unconstitutional. It’s a blatant attempt to strip states of their authority to run elections. This is power that the Constitution explicitly gives to the states and Congress, not the President. Let’s be clear about what’s happening here. Trump is trying to rewrite election law by executive order. He’s bypassing Congress, undermining state election officials, and creating a blueprint for rigging the rules in his favor. This lawsuit is a crucial first step in fighting back, but legal battles like this don’t come cheap. The stakes couldn’t be higher, and we don’t have time to wait and see what their next move will be. At DASS, we’re building the infrastructure to support the officials and legal teams who will be on the front lines of this fight. Our Legal Fund is how we respond — fast, forcefully, and with the resources it takes to win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thanks for standing with us. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: 🖼️ Here's a photo of me and my dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Just as my father has never stopped showing up for me, I'll never stop showing up for our Commonwealth.

| _"There is no greater vocation than service to your country."_

Peter, my dad told me that years ago. A veteran and career law enforcement officer, he raised me to believe, deep in my bones, that doing the right thing is worth the effort.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109637452/551745341/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDJmNDMzM2ItMDI0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6yxftL-3wNeF6UIYvXxJWLupuU1wEBvLu3gNO-9IPBM=)
I'll never forget him handing me my badge and credentials after I took my first oath to uphold the Constitution. And I'll never forget the _confidence_ he had in my ability to win my race for Congress in a district that hadn't elected a Democrat in 50 years.

_Just as my father has never stopped showing up for me, I'll never stop showing up for our Commonwealth._

No matter the challenge, I will stand strong, work to make life more affordable for families, and protect our hard-won freedoms from far-right attacks.

[_**So, in honor of my dad and all the inspirational fathers throughout Virginia, I hope I can earn your support by our mid-month deadline at midnight. Whatever the amount, your donation will power our work to win the Virginia Governor's race.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109637453/551745343/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDJmNDMzM2ItMDI0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6yxftL-3wNeF6UIYvXxJWLupuU1wEBvLu3gNO-9IPBM=)

name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: Thousands of people are united for democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The American people just told Trump loud and clear that he doesn’t own our democracy—we do. | |
---
Peter, It’s true. Trump has unprecedented power. He has the White House, the Senate, and the House of Representatives. He has ICE detaining and deporting legal residents. He has the Department of Justice prosecuting his enemies. **And thanks to the Supreme Court, he has sweeping immunity for any illegal action he takes while in office.** But there’s one thing that Trump doesn’t have—and we all witnessed it yesterday. The power of the people. **Thousands of people showed up for the No Kings protests yesterday, including many of you, your friends and family, and United for Democracy!** We attended in the DC area, Los Angeles, and even Louisiana. United for Democracy’s message is that our democracy doesn’t belong to Trump. Our constitution doesn’t belong to wannabe dictators. Our rights don’t belong to the MAGA court. **They belong to us.** [**Trump and his MAGA cronies are doing everything in their power to take control of our democracy, our constitution, and our rights. But We the People have the power to stand up and fight back. clean_body: The American people just told Trump loud and clear that he doesn’t own our democracy—we do. | | Peter, It’s true. Trump has unprecedented power. He has the White House, the Senate, and the House of Representatives. He has ICE detaining and deporting legal residents. He has the Department of Justice prosecuting his enemies. And thanks to the Supreme Court, he has sweeping immunity for any illegal action he takes while in office. But there’s one thing that Trump doesn’t have—and we all witnessed it yesterday. The power of the people. Thousands of people showed up for the No Kings protests yesterday, including many of you, your friends and family, and United for Democracy! We attended in the DC area, Los Angeles, and even Louisiana. United for Democracy’s message is that our democracy doesn’t belong to Trump. Our constitution doesn’t belong to wannabe dictators. Our rights don’t belong to the MAGA court. They belong to us. The Trump administration is acting in an incredibly arrogant manner. They know they have presidential immunity thanks to the Supreme Court. And they know their billionaire friends have packed the Supreme Court in their favor. But the constitution doesn’t support a wannabe dictator. It’s a document by and for the people, and many public officials in our lower courts are doing their jobs and enforcing the constitution. This is what United for Democracy is all about. We’re creating the groundswell of support for our democracy in the face of Trump’s attacks—coordinating messaging, action, and rapid response with allies across the country. We the People can keep our democracy alive, but only if we fight for it. body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109639457/551751989/846650059?refcode=em-6.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjc2MTEwMS0wNjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ya-hkT1ySE1xjiCo7h_GCAyqn0lENjJNmXRfho1sZwI=) Hi there, Joseph Rivet here – Kristen’s husband, and proud dad of six. Father’s Day always makes me pause and appreciate how lucky I am – for our kids, our dads, for Kristen, and for the life we’ve built together, with a lot of love and even more laughter. It’s one of those days where I can sit back for a moment, take it all in, and feel truly thankful for the family we’ve raised and the values we’ve passed on: kindness, hard work, and showing up for one another. And that’s exactly what Kristen’s doing in Congress – showing up every day for families like ours, and families like yours. Whether it’s fighting for healthcare, or against cuts to SNAP, I see how deeply committed she is to this work. **This is Kristen’s first year in Congress, and there’s not a doubt in my mind that she’s the best person to represent our communities.** But she won’t be able to keep working for you if she doesn’t have the resources she needs to spread her message. I know, not your usual Father’s Day message. But our children deserve leaders like Kristen, who fight... [**So please: Will you chip in $3 to Kristen’s campaign today? clean_body: | = Hi there, Joseph Rivet here – Kristen’s husband, and proud dad of six. Father’s Day always makes me pause and appreciate how lucky I am – for our kids, our dads, for Kristen, and for the life we’ve built together, with a lot of love and even more laughter. It’s one of those days where I can sit back for a moment, take it all in, and feel truly thankful for the family we’ve raised and the values we’ve passed on: kindness, hard work, and showing up for one another. And that’s exactly what Kristen’s doing in Congress – showing up every day for families like ours, and families like yours. Whether it’s fighting for healthcare, or against cuts to SNAP, I see how deeply committed she is to this work. This is Kristen’s first year in Congress, and there’s not a doubt in my mind that she’s the best person to represent our communities. But she won’t be able to keep working for you if she doesn’t have the resources she needs to spread her message. I know, not your usual Father’s Day message. But our children deserve leaders like Kristen, who fight... = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thank you, Joseph | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: here's the thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |

[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51346?refcode=jtk128-fr-fl&t=1&akid=10146%2E434096%2EVAa0K3)
Hi there, Derek, it’s John.

I just talked to my team, and they said we’re still short of where we need to be to hit our $15,000 mid-month goal. [**Will you chip in $5 now to help close the gap and then let me explain?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50993?refcode=jtk128-fr-fl&t=2&akid=10146%2E434096%2EVAa0K3)
Republicans have put in writing a budget that rips health care away from nearly 300,000 Pennsylvanians.

It is absolutely beyond me how they sleep at night knowing they're evicting seniors from nursing homes and kicking kids off their health insurance just so they can hand out *more* tax breaks to rich guys.

**But here's the thing:** As you read this, the GOP budget is still sitting before the Senate.

There is still time to show Trump and Senate Republicans that we're FED UP with them selling us out to the highest bidder.

So I want our fundraising numbers to send the LOUDEST message possible: **Do NOT mess with Medicaid.**
**I’m voting NO on this budget. But it's up to us to make enough noise that other senators take one look at this bill and declare it dead on arrival. I'm doing everything I can to stop this bill, but I need you with me.[Will you pitch in now to help me hit our $15,000 mid-month goal and stop these Medicaid cuts from hitting President Trump's desk?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk128-fr-fl&t=3&akid=10146%2E434096%2EVAa0K3)**

name: Team AOC
subject: ¡Puerto Rico no se vende!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Last Sunday was the 68th annual National Puerto Rican Day Parade, and Alexandria marched alongside thousands standing together to tell developers and those who seek to privatize every aspect of our lives: **Puerto Rico no se vende**.
[We're celebrating the creativity, resilience & power of the people of Puerto Rico. Get your poster today and say it with us: Puerto Rico is not for sale!](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/32901?utm_source=em20250615-9089-P_MER_MER_MER&t=1&akid=9089%2E2526796%2EsHpFod)

Team AOC

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: It’s been an eventful week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Yesterday was an inspiring day of protests, and now we’re counting on your support to keep the momentum going.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250615-5143-footer&t=1&akid=5143%2E420207%2EA5Gmyq)
Peter, it's been an eventful week!
**FIRST Pramila spoke out** against the violent ICE raids and National Guard deployment in Los Angeles. **THEN Stephen Miller went after Pramila**, claiming Democrats are “in open rebellion” against the country. **AND Republican Senator John Kennedy attacked Democrats** speaking out against the raids, saying they need to “pop a Zoloft.” **NOW** thousands just took to the streets across the country to make it clear that **we will not be ruled by wannabe kings** — not now, not ever.
---
Yesterday was an inspiring day of protests, and now we’re counting on your support to keep the momentum going.
[**Will you pitch in $3 before tonight’s midnight deadline to help us reach our $10,000 mid-month goal and support Pramila’s work for our progressive movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250615-1?refcode=em20250615-5143&amount=3&refcode2=5143_420207_A5Gmyq&akid=5143%2E420207%2EA5Gmyq)

In solidarity,
Jayapal HQ

name: Andrea Dill
subject: Christian summer camp targeted by state policy
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2053qdn49ub17gf6wr5w5p2oaz2dkzh9lkv97zizw1bxm9ljnphbvv7evdbua2izdu7jjfbzrh8eso4225u&__stmp=sxwpyh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxwpyh&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf85y37mroth1q33kg4t1djmhhl3rhect6ngjc7evkmfbtmsmicblfujuq2uqj6lbebg8zfovzlvk8mcza67p56eef08f3etjlcn13u3v73kn8k3ubyi1171agagaybmddn92onyvpprbd5f1f97&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxwpyh&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxwpyh&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxwpyh&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxwpyh&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf85y37mroth1q33kg4t1djn5v1vzzcx93vmyixrcmiave0q14pi6olraj67huy1xbe69797ynfhmo0xsfm2ldsvtbf7c23tgcx5hxubhz5sy6zmwycua0fnpdke5s8h410xgekyqr357s93ltbj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxwpyh&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxwpyh&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: My thoughts on fatherhood and the future we owe our kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITMeVE1mDhhFN6bOnjnG04Yl5DXDk-XDAAZFwRfzdX1D4g-KvbI7tYZlsSVK-YThOH9ApG1Tdn4FajjUbZT1Fi0P_-0MiKLsCt7QZGKPCLbo38vzDq8NDB3ZJI3YcMj6fQL3uglNGmhLpMEAvcMIre98jeqi3AmZpwgifeX6rpMaLlKoI0gShcpvanpWv656hXJbx6q5grD9nsJMZLt-XIoRgtAQalGWgMxekVKZf07SI/4hd/_iIVGM77Tbi5zyGm888XtA/h0/h001.yhMhrdW6EBSx0sKIDvtwuukbUDYUqj4Wx0PQRsbzync)
---
Peter,
Father's Day always gives me time to reflect on how lucky I am. I get to be home with my kids. I get to be present for the big milestones, the scraped knees, the late-night worries, and the early morning cartoons. I wouldn't trade this time for anything.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAMxPNY8bBtRmuju7X9tfJouxHHYwfqLiXTc8ztPOFF8Ab_u0KxlHaVOTXze68774Lt-hSrl0yBNZIhUlgZkxYBukcV1Rs1hgeoGxt2GH_SwFX7943OdOM7rFfqhj4RTHoZvEJRNXhh45MwHk_UDg-ytlJml3iW8Ix4KlT4E7qovf7t4OqndeXKZBDoLouK8bGR0_VsclCvs7mE5YgdHldfBzBgggpsVK2_KLBIGfkIGwtnQhR14CEWI2Vy5YAG5x_4gZI0UjHkrtx-VBSg1rMzyOZEgkpFGn013zmC3RFFAqBG0Z4R5Y7MavIVJkN5rHA/4hd/_iIVGM77Tbi5zyGm888XtA/h1/h001.WSlqH9mQQqCjX5-Xg689h_ygYgT-ich-i2MljCQIGM4)
---
But I also know I'm one of the lucky ones. The path I took to build a life for my family -- working my way up from a movie theater cleaner all the way to a cinema industry executive before becoming a stay-at-home dad to support my wife's career -- isn't a path that leads to the middle class anymore. Not without serious help. Not in this economy. Not with the way our politics are going. I'm running for Congress because I want to rebuild a country where that path still exists. Where you don't need a four-year degree to provide for your family. Where working people are respected and protected, not ignored and exploited. [**If that vision resonates with you and you believe in a country that honors hard work and gives every family a fair shot, then chip in today to help us build it.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAMxPNY8bBtRmuju7X9tfJouxHHYwfqLiXTc8ztPOFF8Ab_u0KxlHaVOTXze68774LlQBIcNblRk-AGCsqSvcoSxje4UVkK-AA7MkFwNaU4ObMrqBw1iZN1wlzbH1D5ixqg_hWP2zkMZVrjestYgrfMl3cwAYqGD1MD5aDUjsvJmFO38-mo8hhS2IsDHGzvzfxC4LL49a1rGJy0V5o4qSzO8gETMreaoKGdurFeMhmOeiklMs8kNZbi0wj9y2V-igq1iWMmYRW19KnkXpejeJKbKzldYKQ63E_ufW8V-4ofTgNkBuXS2dMueHCcnpCzlCM/4hd/_iIVGM77Tbi5zyGm888XtA/h2/h001.6B9UvoSBL0st2g13LxMi6tZ-iy8MLkk-mFQQ3NO5zIQ) But here's what keeps me up at night: I look at my kids and wonder what kind of country they'll grow up in. Will they have the same chance I had to build a life, find a job that pays the bills, and raise a family in dignity? Or will they be stuck in a country where fear wins, opportunity fades, and the very representatives we send to fight back... capitulate instead? Because that's what's happening right now. When my neighbors, including immigrant dads, are afraid they won't come home from work because our current representative keeps siding with MAGA lies about fentanyl and voter fraud, something is deeply wrong. When elected officials double down on policies that criminalize working parents instead of helping them, and then dismiss their own constituents as "elites" for asking hard questions, that's not just offensive. It's dangerous. **It tells our kids that some families matter and others don 't. That power is more important than truth. ** That playing nice with extremists is more important than protecting the future. And I refuse to accept that. Because being a dad means doing everything you can to give your kids a better world than the one you inherited. That's why I'm running. I don't want my kids, or anyone's kids, growing up in a country where leaders trade compassion for convenience, and working families are treated as expendable. We can do better. And we have to. [**If you 're with me, chip in today to help build a future our kids can count on.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAMxPNY8bBtRmuju7X9tfJouxHHYwfqLiXTc8ztPOFF8Ab_u0KxlHaVOTXze68774JblkKZmSKCQwCJKIMbwbDu-ToC2nDoF1a85_4a61rSiKYMDCNQ6frvl_03iBB-rD1akHBY6RKg6xenv7gpDp9f6edMBjjslLvYR8tMyVPCQZJtyFImQyHqeN4IRWe_vV6eK5w3BPZ2awf2ySdX-VqR2gwNPiu0621zrusSesInrI3l20v73fWfzkWaTQZWv7dHfbVtAzgoJmNVxRbiM-7u1LQVrt3pq19Ta26MUHusE2GgS6gq4IPJ1FUXC_eWZLQ/4hd/_iIVGM77Tbi5zyGm888XtA/h3/h001.5SwoOMQLFEne3APtRn6rrktYIW-8Y6QkI5t8lfZ5-Yk) Let's Heal Washington!

Brent

On Tuesday, June 17 we’re hosting an online meeting so you can learn more and get the tools to plug into the Safe Healthy Homes campaign and power our next big wins. Hey Peter, We recently won our first bill under the Safe Healthy Homes Act. The Right to Relocation bill passed unanimously thanks to our growing base of housing justice activists! name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Yesterday's assassination in Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friend,
Yesterday, Minnesota Speaker Emerita Melissa Hortman and her husband, Mark Hortman, were killed in a targeted and politically motivated shooting — an assassination.
Senator John Hoffman and his wife were also shot, and are in critical condition. We know the doctors and nurses will do everything they can, and are praying for their speedy recovery.
My family and I know the horror of a targeted shooting all too well. Attacks on lawmakers are attacks on our democracy itself. I am calling on all of our leaders to speak out and condemn the violent extremism threatening everything this country stands for.
Melissa was a partner and friend to GIFFORDS and to me. I was on the ground during the legislative session when Minnesota moved several gun safety measures through in 2023, and those measures passed because of her leadership.
I am heartbroken. But we will never be intimidated.
One of the most important ways we honor the ones we have lost is by ensuring tragedies like this never happen again. That is my mission, and the mission of GIFFORDS.
Please, keep Melissa, John, and their families in your thoughts and prayers.
Thank you,
Gabby Giffords
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250615-1-b&t=1&akid=10582%2E3935704%2Eu5mOjy)
* * *

Please, take a second to read this...
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
[**If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250615-1-b&t=2&akid=10582%2E3935704%2Eu5mOjy)
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/61677?c0=giffords-em-june25.V8EKg8&refcode=em250615-1-b&t=3&akid=10582%2E3935704%2Eu5mOjy)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=10582%2E3935704%2Eu5mOjy) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: DOGE Inquiry
subject: Donald Trump is doing it.
body:
**" We're considering giving 20% of the DOGE savings to American citizens and 20% to paying down the debt."**

\- Donald Trump

* John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act
* Protecting the Right to Organize Act
* Protecting Americans' Social Security Data Act
* IVF for Military Families Act

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Happy Father’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter –

Join me in celebrating all the fathers, step-fathers, grandfathers, brothers, uncles, and friends – past and present – that have helped shape the people that we are today. They have encouraged us, shown us unconditional love, and inspired us to be the best person we can.

Watching my two boys grow up into the men they are today, I know how important dads are in shaping our kids, and how our kids also teach us to learn, grow, and be better every day. Being a father is one of the most rewarding jobs I’ve ever had the honor of holding.

Happy Father’s Day to you and yours, Peter – to all the fathers and father-figures out there!

Mike Thompson
