name: Deb Haaland
subject: I carry my dad’s lessons with me every day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
When I was a little girl, my dad used to take us to watch the Marine Corps bands play in the parades on base.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2616%2E400544%2EJoBg-F)
When I was a little girl, my dad used to take us to watch the Marine Corps bands play in the parades on base.
**He was a drill instructor who served 30 years in the Marines — always sharp and serious in uniform, but on those weekends, he was just Dad.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250615_1_fathersday?amount=5&refcode=em20250615-2616&refcode2=2616_400544_JoBg-F&akid=2616%2E400544%2EJoBg-F)
Those memories are still with me. And today, on Father’s Day, I’m thinking about everything he passed down: his courage, his love for country, his care for family, and his love for the outdoors.
He also took me fishing and hiking when I was young, and it was on those trips that I learned what it means to be a steward of the Earth and to care for our natural resources, not just for ourselves, but for generations to come.
**Now, as I run to be the next governor of New Mexico, I carry my father’s lessons with me every day, and I’m proud to have the trust and endorsement from Common Defense and veterans from across New Mexico.**
**[If you believe, as I do, in leadership that's rooted in service, care, and responsibility to our communities, I hope you'll consider chipping in $5 to help power our grassroots campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250615_1_fathersday?amount=5&refcode=em20250615-2616&refcode2=2616_400544_JoBg-F&akid=2616%2E400544%2EJoBg-F)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250615_1_fathersday?amount=5&refcode=em20250615-2616&refcode2=2616_400544_JoBg-F&akid=2616%2E400544%2EJoBg-F)**
Thank you and Happy Father’s Day,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250615-1&t=2&refcode2=2616_400544_JoBg-F&akid=2616%2E400544%2EJoBg-F)**

name: INDems
subject: Hoosier Pride!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, **Happy Pride Month, Hoosiers!** This is a time to celebrate the important contributions that LGBTQ Hoosiers have made to our state and reaffirm our commitment to creating a state that is welcoming for all. Unfortunately, it is also a time that reminds us yet again of the backward priorities of the Republican supermajority in our state. **Shortly before Pride Month began, Lt. Governor Micah Beckwith made a long, homophobic post warning about the “rainbow beast”**. It was conduct that is below that of an elected official, and **a direct attack and insult on the thousands of LGBTQ Hoosiers who call Indiana home.** **[Will you stand with us and make a contribution of any size to the Indiana Democratic Party today? With your help, we can elect leaders for our state who will create a welcoming state for all Hoosiers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109643188/551762840/1764064610?refcode=250615pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzMzNDcyNy0xMDRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PcWXeOffdk7JxjIcHtXboCjjL2qgP7l50E7tpnoJPWc=)** LGBTQ Hoosiers are our family members, our neighbors, our coworkers, and our friends. **No one should feel unsafe or targeted in Indiana because of who they love.** **[If you agree, and want to elect more Democratic representatives who will fight for fairness, please donate to our rebuilding fund today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109643189/551762843/1764064610?refcode=250615pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzMzNDcyNy0xMDRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PcWXeOffdk7JxjIcHtXboCjjL2qgP7l50E7tpnoJPWc=)** Thanks,

Hi Peter, You’re invited to join OLCV’s summer book club! This year, for the first time ever, we’re inviting you to join all of our staff to discuss the following book: [_Love Your Mother_ by Mallory McDuff](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109643708/551764604/-997784446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkMDUzMDk0LTEyNGEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8igE3XFRe7wXp1UbLDiQYFzRGuLYZDeRR2-WKChWxUM=&emci=a1997fb9-e346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1d053094-124a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230). If you’d like to be a part of our book club, we invite you to [sign up](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109643709/551764605/122138657?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkMDUzMDk0LTEyNGEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8igE3XFRe7wXp1UbLDiQYFzRGuLYZDeRR2-WKChWxUM=&emci=a1997fb9-e346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1d053094-124a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230) and purchase the book soon!
---
[ **Sign up for our Book Club** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109643710/551764606/122138657?contactdata=RFm4GUH7wCauQbUf7To1zrR33WbWWhS+98bF6p7YRWtB7aAlfa3qNxN+24UnTJbOA5Kr1xWPm3uBprrPdRXYbB4QL9xmTNvzBI8SdzzLH6uOaB8EA3KoXNr/z3rgUC2e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkMDUzMDk0LTEyNGEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8igE3XFRe7wXp1UbLDiQYFzRGuLYZDeRR2-WKChWxUM=&emci=a1997fb9-e346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1d053094-124a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230)
---
OLCV’s staff and board are committed to creating a culture of justice, diversity, equity, and inclusion. In addition to our coalition and legislative work on intersectional issues, our staff work internally to learn and unlearn our history and biases. One way that our staff does this work is by meeting weekly to explore the intersections between our work and environmental and social justice. We read articles and books, listen to podcasts, watch informative documentaries and TV shows, and discuss how we can improve in our own work. We often have a theme for our learning each month. As part of this, every year, OLCV’s staff partake in an equity summer learning project-- something bigger like a podcast series, a book, or a docuseries. This year, we’ve chosen to read _Love Your Mother_ by Mallory McDuff and open the conservation up to any of our members! There will be more information on our meetings to come, but for now please get your hands on a copy of [_Love Your Mother_ by Mallory McDuff](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109643711/551764607/-997784446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkMDUzMDk0LTEyNGEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8igE3XFRe7wXp1UbLDiQYFzRGuLYZDeRR2-WKChWxUM=&emci=a1997fb9-e346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1d053094-124a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230) and be sure you’ve [signed up to join](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109643712/551764608/122138657?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkMDUzMDk0LTEyNGEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8igE3XFRe7wXp1UbLDiQYFzRGuLYZDeRR2-WKChWxUM=&emci=a1997fb9-e346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1d053094-124a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230).

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, You’re invited to join OLCV’s summer book club! This year, for the first time ever, we’re inviting you to join all of our staff to discuss the following book: . If you’d like to be a part of our book club, we invite you to and purchase the book soon! OLCV’s staff and board are committed to creating a culture of justice, diversity, equity, and inclusion. In addition to our coalition and legislative work on intersectional issues, our staff work internally to learn and unlearn our history and biases. One way that our staff does this work is by meeting weekly to explore the intersections between our work and environmental and social justice. We read articles and books, listen to podcasts, watch informative documentaries and TV shows, and discuss how we can improve in our own work. We often have a theme for our learning each month. As part of this, every year, OLCV’s staff partake in an equity summer learning project-- something bigger like a podcast series, a book, or a docuseries. This year, we’ve chosen to read Love Your Mother by Mallory McDuff and open the conservation up to any of our members! There will be more information on our meetings to come, but for now please get your hands on a copy of and be sure you’ve . Sincerely, Sarah Kline (she/they) OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Colleen Davis
subject: It’s been 35 years – 3 decades!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
Some of these stories are truly astonishing. But there’s still time to change the way they end. →| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109643729/551764631/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250615VAprimary_N_CD_90DO_10_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1MDUzMDk0LTEyNGEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VxYuo_5YlpaxIEPtxuWBq5rEdOA8cSuPudABfjRgxkk=)
---
Hi Peter,

As abortion bans swept the nation after the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ , there is only one remaining safe haven state for abortion access in the South: **Virginia.**

The Trump administration has already announced federal policies that put women’s lives and well-being in danger, so we will be looking to state governments to defend us. This year, all eyes are on Virginia’s elections as the state currently has an extremely slim 1-vote margin in favor of abortion access in its legislature. We’re writing today because **Virginia’s primary elections are happening THIS _TUESDAY._**

[**We need to move quickly: Help our qualified endorsed candidates reach as many voters as possible BEFORE THIS TUESDAY by rushing a split contribution of $20.25 or more today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-va/?refcode=EM_F_250615VAprimary_N_CD_90DO_10_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25) **Here is a look at our endorsed candidates who will be in the most consequential races on Tuesday:

✅ Lt. Gov. candidate Ghazala Hashmi** – Senator Hashmi helped draft Virginia’s constitutional amendment protecting safe and legal abortion, and served as a Chief Co-Patron for the legislation. **She is the _only woman_ in a seven-candidate primary, and is the most experienced legislator in the race.**

**✅ May Nivar** – Running for a seat that has been named the TOP pickup opportunity for securing a pro-choice majority in Virginia. Her opponent, the Republican incumbent, passed zero bills during his 2025 legislative session, and an independent analysis by the Virginia Public Access Project found him to be the least effective legislator in Virginia.

He has said he would like to see abortion become illegal in Virginia and has repeatedly voted against commonsense gun safety policies, paid medical leave, lower prescription drug costs, and more...

**✅ Shannon Jones** – Running for Commonwealth Attorney – Newport News, VA. It has been 35 years – more than 3 DECADES – since Shannon’s incumbent opponent has even had to campaign/appeal to voters. No one has run against him in 35 years! Shannon is highly qualified to take on his position, **and is the first woman to be listed as a candidate on the ballot for the job.**

With reproductive healthcare access under dire threat, a Republican frontrunner for Governor who wants to ELIMINATE abortion access in the state, and a 1-vote margin in the State Legislature, **_the stakes could not be higher._**

[**These candidates are facing competitive primaries on TUESDAY and, in many cases, are falling behind their male opponents in fundraising. Help ensure these candidates have the funds they’ll need to reach voters in these final hours by rushing a split donation immediately.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109643730/551764634/892077722?refcode=EM_F_250615VAprimary_N_CD_90DO_10_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1MDUzMDk0LTEyNGEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VxYuo_5YlpaxIEPtxuWBq5rEdOA8cSuPudABfjRgxkk=)

Together,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move
---

name: Caroline, Halina, and Anne Bennet
subject: Celebrating our dad (despite his dad jokes)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250615_fathersday_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250615_fathersday_act]
Hi friends,
It’s Caroline, Halina, and Anne, Michael Bennet’s daughters.
We wanted to come on here to wish our Dad and all the father figures out there a Happy Father’s Day. 💙
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250615_fathersday_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250615_fathersday_act]
We have the best dad. For our entire lives, he has made us feel loved, empowered, and like there is nothing we can’t achieve. He’s taught us the importance of family, public service, and working for something bigger than ourselves.
From his work as Superintendent to his time in the Senate, he has dedicated his career to uplifting kids across Colorado.
When he was Superintendent of the Denver Public Schools, he fought for some of the most significant educational initiatives in the country to dramatically improve outcomes for kids. As Senator, he worked nonstop to expand the Child Tax Credit, which cut childhood poverty in nearly half and represented one of the largest tax cuts for families in a generation.
If there is one thing we know about our dad, he truly believes in a better future for Colorado—and for every family and every child in our state.
We are thrilled to support our Dad in this campaign. Even though he cracks some of the worst dad jokes we’ve ever heard, we know all the good he will accomplish for Colorado will make up for it.
Friend, we’d be honored if you joined us to support our Dad, campaign for governor. Every dollar helps! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250615_fathersday_act]
Happy Father’s Day,
Caroline, Halina, and Anne

name: Loretta Hidalgo Whitesides
subject: When a Member of Congress serves, the whole family serves
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109644088/551765921/1606932672?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTVkZTZjYi0xMjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkmnaMeO8IdOjF9wKguD4lVPVYHIR7bSVmGUijw7tgw=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109644089/551765922/1606932672?refcode=em-6.15.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTVkZTZjYi0xMjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkmnaMeO8IdOjF9wKguD4lVPVYHIR7bSVmGUijw7tgw=)

Hi Peter, Loretta here. I’m George’s wife, mother of our two children, author, leadership trainer, and former astrobiologist.

Today is Father’s Day, and I wanted to take a moment to appreciate everything my husband George does – not only in Congress, but in the community, at home with our family and our whole extended family. (We've got the whole clan together this weekend!)

It’s not easy being in Congress and committed to parenting teenagers on a different coast, in a different time zone. I’ll admit, it has its challenges. But that is what we signed up for when George decided he was running for Congress.

It was a true joy to watch him shine on the campaign trail, and ultimately become one of just a few Democrats to flip a Republican-held seat back in November. Now, he’s commuting back and forth between the district and Washington with barely a moment’s time for himself (seriously).

I couldn’t be more proud. He’s always had our community’s best interests at heart – from leading hundreds of engineers and technicians in the AV with heart, to helping organize our community’s Covid response, to bringing people together to solve the wildfire crisis, and now representing us in Congress.

This Father's Day let's thank him by giving him a day off. If we raise enough money today maybe he won't have to spend as much time on the phone making sure he has raised enough money for the next election. (His seat is going to be extremely competitive once again.)

It also sends a message to anyone thinking of running against him.

We like George. Go try to out spend someone else.

**[Please join me in celebrating George today with a $3 donation to keep him in Congress fighting decency, dignity and for us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109644090/551765923/1606932672?refcode=em-6.15.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTVkZTZjYi0xMjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkmnaMeO8IdOjF9wKguD4lVPVYHIR7bSVmGUijw7tgw=)**

clean_body: | = = Hi Peter, Loretta here. I’m George’s wife, mother of our two children, author, leadership trainer, and former astrobiologist. Today is Father’s Day, and I wanted to take a moment to appreciate everything my husband George does – not only in Congress, but in the community, at home with our family and our whole extended family. (We've got the whole clan together this weekend!) It’s not easy being in Congress and committed to parenting teenagers on a different coast, in a different time zone. I’ll admit, it has its challenges. But that is what we signed up for when George decided he was running for Congress. It was a true joy to watch him shine on the campaign trail, and ultimately become one of just a few Democrats to flip a Republican-held seat back in November. Now, he’s commuting back and forth between the district and Washington with barely a moment’s time for himself (seriously). I couldn’t be more proud. He’s always had our community’s best interests at heart – from leading hundreds of engineers and technicians in the AV with heart, to helping organize our community’s Covid response, to bringing people together to solve the wildfire crisis, and now representing us in Congress. This Father's Day let's thank him by giving him a day off. If we raise enough money today maybe he won't have to spend as much time on the phone making sure he has raised enough money for the next election. (His seat is going to be extremely competitive once again.) It also sends a message to anyone thinking of running against him. We like George. Go try to out spend someone else. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you. Peace, love, space, Loretta | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Sarah McBride
subject: As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be times like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I’ve never felt alone because I have people like you standing with me.
| Hi friend, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride.

Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and yes, on me.

**As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues.**

I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day.

I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like you and the Voter Protection Project standing with me.

[If I can count on your support this Pride Month, split a donation of $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project today. Every donation helps me defend the LGBTQ+ community and keep up the fight for working families in Congress.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91110?t=6&akid=20202%2E878179%2EapOn6F) | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91110?t=7&akid=20202%2E878179%2EapOn6F)
---
Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me.

Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible. **Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it.**

That’s what Pride means to me. It's a call to action and a reminder that even in the face of hate, we have the power to fight back with love, with truth, and with unshakable resolve.

[So this Pride Month, if you’re ready to do your part to create a better future for all of us, please consider making a split donation of $10 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91110?t=8&akid=20202%2E878179%2EapOn6F)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sarah McBride and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91111?t=9&akid=20202%2E878179%2EapOn6F)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91112?t=10&akid=20202%2E878179%2EapOn6F)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91113?t=11&akid=20202%2E878179%2EapOn6F)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91114?t=12&akid=20202%2E878179%2EapOn6F)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91115?t=13&akid=20202%2E878179%2EapOn6F)
Thank you and Happy Pride!

Sarah
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91110?t=14&akid=20202%2E878179%2EapOn6F)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20202%2E878179%2EapOn6F). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20202%2E878179%2EapOn6F).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20202%2E878179%2EapOn6F) to request fewer emails. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: One more reason to believe America’s not done yet
body:
They couldn’t cancel this...
\- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c9b6fc783d1d48e0b4d6241f95c0294b&_e=MnC-i0qglEny3NxqAnXutqAQqIxAH1y42kuv4rCvIhrJX8tA0GxHQfBnTMLSO4oLysr9RSaDGbj-1u4E_LcuwfhO8BQLUk9hcI1TqlM0qZqeAs0ZIvyKOjEwbDniXJZEzR4MQZ0eZRJ10VtsBW9le_x9qowEgEhwavBaZAmM1hxpeVBww4cYVNtlkAdk7fvaSU77PxNypMwB4nFSPHJOJTv7UkCVjMOQajLj_kpDzwOg_d1jGqXDTfNUMtqRytUGdUTXhQsClwSrrb6fttDyK88pcc23Tjy64iDPxLWcqq-16oGp97UOEvfh8a8DSiSS)
---
Fellow Patriot, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this.Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: **THANK YOU.** I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._ while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour?**I did.** And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside...You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c9b6fc783d1d48e0b4d6241f95c0294b&_e=MnC-i0qglEny3NxqAnXutqAQqIxAH1y42kuv4rCvIhrJX8tA0GxHQfBnTMLSO4oLysr9RSaDGbj-1u4E_LcuwfhO8BQLUk9hcI1TqlM0qZqeAs0ZIvyKOjEwbDniXJZEzR4MQZ0eZRJ10VtsBW9le1XFsbw-6QmTMazgivHsuo5qOPMrbY38dooG37o3tXIyXOQyJDPZjRye9xMJ83C80gdGMoRcDc_I7oaKPyZOW1bWAuX6EgwDJofkpXfy-AJHT5nu7CqeF9vFjfb4n4xSqQXsWMwM0UXSN20wR9uACXfSe7rjTv5wSkH2XqAErnAa)
---
You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students...But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring:**Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history.** It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end.**And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California.** The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._ And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside.Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth.And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...”They ERUPTED.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c9b6fc783d1d48e0b4d6241f95c0294b&_e=MnC-i0qglEny3NxqAnXutqAQqIxAH1y42kuv4rCvIhrJX8tA0GxHQfBnTMLSO4oLysr9RSaDGbj-1u4E_LcuwfhO8BQLUk9hcI1TqlM0qZqeAs0ZIvyKOjEwbDniXJZEzR4MQZ0eZRJ10VtsBW9le2A52Tq82sHSF5DYrAgcMm4TZZI8pd4IiDoYfnXrY_ab4YPaaBLY-qFLoQgyKbY6igcrrT-tKWjkP7fd1swiofASQXD9lCXEt0XBwoo_VHBrmW895F7BYbiFZlWlXZj4z7JCt1KYt5mUWwVj4eNqVHbSbLwVqI6D0PJY3PrC1u-Y)
---
It wasn’t just another great tour stop... **It was a BREAKTHROUGH.** Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour.And each one was just as powerful...This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._ And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down...The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before._But let’s back up for a moment..._ Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago.**Back in January, when we were laying out the calendar... These were the goals: Go BIGGER. Go BOLDER. Go DEEPER into Leftist territory.** We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... _But the ones the Left claimed as their own._ And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did.**Let me give you the big picture:** ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... _wholesale._ Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... _finally heard one._ Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... _were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._ Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined._ There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message...**But just look at what we're accomplishing:**
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c9b6fc783d1d48e0b4d6241f95c0294b&_e=MnC-i0qglEny3NxqAnXutqAQqIxAH1y42kuv4rCvIhrJX8tA0GxHQfBnTMLSO4oLysr9RSaDGbj-1u4E_LcuwfhO8BQLUk9hcI1TqlM0qZqeAs0ZIvyKOjEwbDniXJZEzR4MQZ0eZRJ10VtsBW9le2zfBg8fqkvBk3sZe3oA3ToQNz1YjJPYkl_2Kz7AVuPqKw15t17UF1B1fZLUYIAgUe0cTwhb6A5nhjtL9pYb2Fyaj3h8_xAO63P0-6ZUDYvHNK770vodHMEpbysvLz7wJqsERSzImWvrPZ95UNO3P8iR1ABKe48v5nqZVcI4h3sE)
---
_Fellow Patriot, this is why we fight..._ Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students.**But for a generation-wide cultural reset — playing out in real time, in real places, in the hearts of real students.** This is why the American Comeback Tour matters.And I hope you know:**It wouldn’t exist without patriots like****YOU****.** Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible.Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most.**You weren’t just watching this tour... You were powering it.** Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._ The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring...But this summer?We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through.We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour.To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. **And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country. **_I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Fellow Patriot._ Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible...We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._ Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING.The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong.**I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today.****Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time.**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c9b6fc783d1d48e0b4d6241f95c0294b&_e=MnC-i0qglEny3NxqAnXutqAQqIxAH1y42kuv4rCvIhrJX8tA0GxHQfBnTMLSO4oLysr9RSaDGbj-1u4E_LcuwfhO8BQLUk9hcI1TqlM0qZqeAs0ZIvyKOjEwbDniXJZEzR4MQZ0eZRJ10VtsBW9le5jJ8KP1DU7OgsC2RlPoKQ6LGbIF4zPHrNASppf65tJ92BQBZ7nGt8b4_zjoUFlp-qmOVLY_Z1Y6B1gO9-xJxweINd57McGltjwJrSoRGQ4514ymuVcBG4lEGIbGnUuIb872vThh5L8Emo5g25fRpyfNACZLtTt6FAQA9UqP00uk)

**P.S.** I’ve been doing this for over a decade now, Fellow Patriot... **_But I’ve never seen momentum like THIS._** These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our ideas.This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL.**And the Left is terrified.** You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our students... But it’s not working anymore.**Because you and I are reaching the next generation — campus by campus, state by state, student by student.** **And that’s why I’m asking you to stand with us again today. Because every dollar you give today will be MATCHED.** That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And your impact? DOUBLED. _So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall..._ Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next.Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this country when it returns this fall... Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement...And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of America’s young people again. **[We’re not done. name: Wes Moore
subject: No greater title
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=174%2E1086043%2Eb_pBmp ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=174%2E1086043%2Eb_pBmp ]Wes Moore for Governor

I have no greater title than father,
Peter.

My kids, Mia and James, are my reason for being. It’s a blessing to watch
them grow to become who they are and, every day, they make me so proud to
be their dad.

[1]Wes and family

From my family to yours, I wish you a happy Father’s Day. I hope that you
get to spend some time with, talk to, or think of the father figures in
your life, and have a great rest of your weekend.

Elevate,

Wes

[2]Wes

# OHIO ADVOCATES FOR MEDICAL FREEDOM (OAMF):
CALL TO ACTION!
---
|
---
| **FROM OAMF:
"WE HAVE THE VOTES to get HB 12 “The Jeff, Dave, and Angie Right to Try Act” OUT of the HOUSE!"**
"This vital legislation has been in the works for two and a half years. We have made every reasonable accommodation for opposition without compromising the integrity of this critical legislation. It ensures your doctor has the final say on accessing the life-saving treatments you have consented to and protects their license from attacks for engaging in free speech and scientific debate over the risks and benefits of treatments and medical interventions, such as vaccines."

You can find OAMF's "Call To Action" by [**CLICKING HERE & FOLLOWING THE INSTRUCTIONS!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0e6d55bf1e&e=5c740fa3e2)

| |
# MARCELL STRBICH
FOR OHIO SECRETARY OF STATE
FIRST CAMPAIGN FILING DEADLINE:
**FAST APPROACHING!**
---
|
**MARCELL STRBICH IS RUNNING FOR
OHIO SECRETARY OF STATE
AS A REPUBLICAN POLITICAL OUTSIDER!**
[**strbichforohio.com**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ee0fd9f15e&e=5c740fa3e2)
Many across Ohio already know: Marcell is the right person for this job. He’s a combat veteran, devoted family man, God-fearing patriot, and a proven election integrity advocate. Marcell has been instrumental in drafting nearly every meaningful election integrity bill proposed in Ohio—legislation that’s been deliberately ignored by two consecutive General Assemblies.

Until we see real campaign finance reform, grassroots Ohioans are going to need to dig deep, open their wallets, and be willing to make a personal financial commitment.

_**"In politics, money talks, and campaign filings are how that message gets delivered—loud and clear."**_

It’s important for political candidates to show strong fundraising success in their required government filings because, WHETHER WE LIKE IT OR NOT, money signals momentum, viability, and power—both to insiders and voters. Here’s why it matters:
* Big fundraising numbers make a candidate look like a serious contender. Media, party leaders, donors, and voters all use these filings to gauge who’s competitive and worth taking seriously. Strong fundraising hauls get picked up in headlines: “Candidate Raises $250K in First Quarter”. This creates free publicity and positions the campaign as rising or dominant.
* Party insiders, elected officials, and political organizations often withhold endorsements until they see who can raise money and win. High fundraising can trigger snowball support from power brokers who want to back a winner. Strong numbers can scare off challengers, who may not want to go up against a financially strong opponent.
* Grassroots supporters want to feel they’re backing a campaign that has momentum and a path to victory. Public fundraising reports serve as a psychological boost to volunteers and potential new donors.
* Fundraising equals field operations, advertising, legal support, and more. A candidate who’s raising well is seen as having the infrastructure to compete.

Fundraising filings are more than compliance—they’re performance scorecards. They influence media, endorsements, donor psychology, and even the ballot itself.

**Marcell's first deadline is June 30th.** Shortly after that, his filings are due and the public, including potential donors & the media, will gauge Marcell's financial competitiveness.

**BECAUSE OHIO ONLY REQUIRES A JUNE 30TH AND DECEMBER 31ST FILINGS THIS YEAR, MARCELL WILL NOT HAVE THE OPPORTUNITY TO SHOW FUNDRAISING MUSCLE TO THE PUBLIC UNTIL 2026!**

**THIS IS WHY IT'S IMPORTANT THAT IF YOU'RE GOING TO DONATE YOU DO IT NOW, AND DONATE AS MUCH AS YOU CAN!**

Here's how to donate:

**DONATE ONLINE:**
[**https://secure.anedot.com/strbichforohio/donate**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b19c1345db&e=5c740fa3e2)

**DONATE BY CHECK:**
**Strbich for Ohio
PO Box 21174
Roanoke, VA 24018**

Please text 614-499-0599 if you need ACH or wire transfer information.

_**Maximum donation is $16,615.67.**_

**THANK YOU! **

|

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: I just got off the phone with my team…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
Hi there — it's Marcy.
I just got off the phone with my team. They told me that with less than a month until our quarterly fundraising deadline, we're on track to fall about $12,482 short of our online fundraising goal.
Friend, I'll be straight with you. This race won't be over if we can't close that gap, but with so much attention on our race already, any sign of weakness will open the door for even more dark money attacks.
So I'm humbly asking, friend: will you chip in any amount to help us get back on track? We've proven that a grassroots campaign can take on the special interests and win, but we need your support.
Here's the link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109646022/551772401/1039792322?refcode=250615_mk_midjune3_l1&ms=250615_mk_midjune3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGNhM2YyOC0xOTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=63YPGQom91entfirgsyfxkrTlmqgRdDOKeBBY-airOE=)**
Thank you so much.

name: Derek Tran
subject: My father’s story:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109646215/551773480/2039042026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGJlMTg3ZjctMWE0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aaGRa02oXrRfMXSTBShRZfV84q0w14F-DeEZnCGi7nE=)
This Father’s Day, I want to tell you about the man whose courage shaped everything I am today – my father.

Fifty years ago, after the Fall of Saigon, my father fled Vietnam by boat with his wife and children. That first escape ended in tragedy. The boat capsized. He lost his entire family.

**But he didn’t give up.**

He returned to Vietnam, met my mother, and together they made a second escape. They survived a perilous journey and a year in a refugee camp before finally landing in California in 1980.

They worked tirelessly. They opened a small corner market where I stocked shelves every day after school. They taught me what it means to serve, to work hard, and to never take freedom for granted.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109646217/551773484/2039042026?refcode=em-6.15.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGJlMTg3ZjctMWE0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aaGRa02oXrRfMXSTBShRZfV84q0w14F-DeEZnCGi7nE=)
At 18, I enlisted in the Army Reserve to give back to the country that gave my family a second chance. I became a lawyer to fight for the vulnerable. And now, I serve in Congress to protect the American Dream.

This story – my story – wouldn’t be possible without the promise of America. But that promise is under threat. And this Father’s Day, I’m asking for your help to protect it.

This is one of the most competitive House races in the country. With just weeks left until our critical end-of-quarter deadline, your support could make all the difference.

clean_body: | = This Father’s Day, I want to tell you about the man whose courage shaped everything I am today – my father. Fifty years ago, after the Fall of Saigon, my father fled Vietnam by boat with his wife and children. That first escape ended in tragedy. The boat capsized. He lost his entire family. But he didn’t give up. He returned to Vietnam, met my mother, and together they made a second escape. They survived a perilous journey and a year in a refugee camp before finally landing in California in 1980. They worked tirelessly. They opened a small corner market where I stocked shelves every day after school. They taught me what it means to serve, to work hard, and to never take freedom for granted. = At 18, I enlisted in the Army Reserve to give back to the country that gave my family a second chance. I became a lawyer to fight for the vulnerable. And now, I serve in Congress to protect the American Dream. This story – my story – wouldn’t be possible without the promise of America. But that promise is under threat. And this Father’s Day, I’m asking for your help to protect it. This is one of the most competitive House races in the country. With just weeks left until our critical end-of-quarter deadline, your support could make all the difference. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = My father’s story is not just one of survival – it’s one of resilience. It’s a story of hope and of the enduring power of freedom. Thank you for standing with me in this fight. And Happy Father’s Day to all the dads, grandfathers, and father figures. -Derek = | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Nothing beats being a dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109646555/551774369/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250615_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2U1ZjkxZC0xYjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X6e8TaILFRB_TEJUL02ICQQtum9XNO36szb02nXJpW0=)
---
Peter, Father's Day is a special time to celebrate the incredible joy that comes with being a dad. For me, nothing beats the laughter, the lessons, and all the cherished moments I share with Caroline and our kids, Prescott and Adeline — they're some of life's greatest treasures. Their curiosity and resilience inspire me daily to keep fighting for a future where every child gets the opportunities they deserve. I do my best to pass on the life lessons my dad taught me to my children: to be fearless and self-confident and how far resilience and dedication can take you. He showed me the vital role dads play in shaping not just our lives, but our entire communities. Fathers can empower us and future generations to reach our full potential and leave a positive mark on the world. Today, let’s honor the fathers and father figures who inspire us to be better, push us to reach our potential, and encourage us to contribute positively to our communities. To Adeline and Prescott, I’m so proud to be your dad. To all the dads out there, thanks for everything you do — the love, the hard work, and the dedication. Happy Father's Day! Wiley | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109646558/551774379/474294398?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250615_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2U1ZjkxZC0xYjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X6e8TaILFRB_TEJUL02ICQQtum9XNO36szb02nXJpW0=)

clean_body: | = Peter, Father's Day is a special time to celebrate the incredible joy that comes with being a dad. For me, nothing beats the laughter, the lessons, and all the cherished moments I share with Caroline and our kids, Prescott and Adeline — they're some of life's greatest treasures. Their curiosity and resilience inspire me daily to keep fighting for a future where every child gets the opportunities they deserve. I do my best to pass on the life lessons my dad taught me to my children: to be fearless and self-confident and how far resilience and dedication can take you. He showed me the vital role dads play in shaping not just our lives, but our entire communities. Fathers can empower us and future generations to reach our full potential and leave a positive mark on the world. Today, let’s honor the fathers and father figures who inspire us to be better, push us to reach our potential, and encourage us to contribute positively to our communities. To Adeline and Prescott, I’m so proud to be your dad. To all the dads out there, thanks for everything you do — the love, the hard work, and the dedication. Happy Father's Day! Wiley | = Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

To ensure we continue in the right direction...
Fellow Patriot,

At his first Address to the House and Senate earlier this year, President Trump proclaimed, **_["AMERICA IS BACK!"](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eb40fa4e768f4f92b1b1e2db43875f85&_e=GKc5mXluIyM_kij2L4uB8hzoQEF2iNc8O_wB70bOHDEc0cD5kVU5-MdAPFkIePkGyeraWRqoC1n3mquqWk2Jxc6AcjcOm46tpayIQbBbVefMo7lEGyEz1enOOzKm5g-xaPLDIy6VwTnA333oE0T8rQKEc1r5c2VieNnvDFKi149wftd6nF4pD0PLBdZjXgb0VdOQLzijWaYWdarFKYTu0C_YdbMmVp-afQQHFNBgbfex3CLpDFGYIvWq5UHckj9vPwIQMo2xJw-G8GLQwYIdmE1ptPwoikMTU1gHRCbnYK9DklPNPxwihOEJjoPHWTXGXY4mOMBFQeZ-zhw-y4gDWBhV3egI9vNyye6Dueiz29MyztQRjrQfpSc4enp1klN-2aSGIgWFRt_tMVmrK3DPwUHw5hLnLu9LdxRP3suL4ar8BeW6b57yVhVXseqX3JnvGOC5djZVJYYMYriK7m2iHW5IxrkO3AfdwxFHP04ptjY%3D)_**

_And now, for the FIRST TIME in Rasmussen polling history, a majority of Americans say that our country is on the right track._

America is forever turning a page on the disastrous Obama-Biden chapter and choosing the path to GREATNESS:
_**["The long Obama era is over" -The Guardian

"Obama world loses its shine in a changing, hurting Democratic Party" -NBC News

And as reported by Fox News, the Trump Senate Majority is _OUTPACING_ the Obama Senate Majority.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eb40fa4e768f4f92b1b1e2db43875f85&_e=GKc5mXluIyM_kij2L4uB8hzoQEF2iNc8O_wB70bOHDEc0cD5kVU5-MdAPFkIePkGyeraWRqoC1n3mquqWk2Jxc6AcjcOm46tpayIQbBbVefMo7lEGyEz1enOOzKm5g-xaPLDIy6VwTnA333oE0T8rQKEc1r5c2VieNnvDFKi149wftd6nF4pD0PLBdZjXgb0VdOQLzijWaYWdarFKYTu0C_YdbMmVp-afQQHFNBgbfex3CLpDFGYIvWq5UHckj9vPwIQMo2xJw-G8GLQwYIdmE1ptPwoikMTU1gHRCbnYK9DklPNPxwihOEJjoPHWTXGXY4mOMBFQeZ-zhw-y4gDWB_oQse9c-phcU9UB2xtarWpYDpnDYSUGyaiTAgCpvQ4i1otKIV55Z5wwGmdNp8vuxtKtqOlkvybg_MSfWTbCXy9exAQx3jp1L69JklBiIOOd6M7ZcdvdccW5se1YH8bqn9GNYQ2xhCTW10xob4BQcc%3D)**_
But we're not entirely in the clear just yet.

Despite being nearly halfway through 2025, our national GOP voter verification records still remain **[INCOMPLETE.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eb40fa4e768f4f92b1b1e2db43875f85&_e=GKc5mXluIyM_kij2L4uB8hzoQEF2iNc8O_wB70bOHDEc0cD5kVU5-MdAPFkIePkGyeraWRqoC1n3mquqWk2Jxc6AcjcOm46tpayIQbBbVefMo7lEGyEz1enOOzKm5g-xaPLDIy6VwTnA333oE0T8rQKEc1r5c2VieNnvDFKi149wftd6nF4pD0PLBdZjXgb0VdOQLzijWaYWdarFKYTu0C_YdbMmVp-afQQHFNBgbfex3CLpDFGYIvWq5UHckj9vPwIQMo2xJw-G8GLQwYIdmE1ptPwoikMTU1gHRCbnYK9DklPNPxwihOEJjoPHWTXGXY4mOMBFQeZ-zhw-y4gDWF62iMe6AgZq6z4zWD1R1y40MPqTxlR9hJDVeiR8Jprkb1_JE5enBrxvJxnlL6SATVE-VFOXL9iZTqpRhRPzZEtkHHh5fepuHcmXAmfvo4s0Rxoag0wasPSzsiTPUUrUlPMv51YLkVUpvIymx3jZI_k%3D)**

_We can have the best polls and the highest levels of enthusiasm, hope, and optimism in history, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we 'll lose to the Democrats._
_We just successfully buried the Obama legacy. We can 't let it come back to life!_

Peter, You know how much I hate asking for donations, especially on weekends. It’s honestly one of my least favorite parts of the job. But we have an FEC deadline coming up at the end of the month — and there are no do-overs or second chances with these. Everyone from National Republicans to right-wing billionaires are going to look at our fundraising report to judge the strength of our grassroots team — **and I want them to know that while they’re giving Trump a free pass to take health care away from millions of Americans to pay for their tax breaks for billionaires, we’re not. ** **[Let’s show them that we don’t just walk the walk, we talk the talk. But we have an FEC deadline coming up at the end of the month — and there are no do-overs or second chances with these. Everyone from National Republicans to right-wing billionaires are going to look at our fundraising report to judge the strength of our grassroots team — and I want them to know that while they’re giving Trump a free pass to take health care away from millions of Americans to pay for their tax breaks for billionaires, we’re not. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. name: Team Jones
subject: re: update on our Voter Turnout Fund ➡️
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other]
Hi friend,
The last day for Virginians to vote in the Democratic Primary Election is THIS TUESDAY , June 17!!
We are running a massive voter turnout operation this weekend to mobilize as many Virginia voters as possible ahead of next week’s election, especially young and minority voters.
Last week, I launched a Voter Turnout Fund with a goal of raising $50,000 in grassroots donations. Now, we're doubling down our efforts and increasing our goal to $65,000! Friend, will you make a donation right now to fund our voter turnout drive for these last few days? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?]
I’ve run for office in 4 elections. Every time, I’ve been proud to run a bottom-up campaign that puts the grassroots first. Every time, you — and so many other Virginians — have honored me by standing with me.
But we are going to need to do it again in this primary campaign in order to win.
By hitting our Voter Turnout Fund goal, we’ll have the resources to mobilize thousands of new voters and give us the best chance.
Friend, will you make a donation to our Voter Turnout Fund and help us hit our goal to supercharge our mobilization efforts this weekend? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?]
Thanks,
Jay

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

name: Senate Majority
subject: For the FIRST time in history?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
HUGE. HUGE. HUGE.
Fellow Patriot,

At his first Address to the House and Senate earlier this year, President Trump proclaimed, **_["AMERICA IS BACK!"](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=53a699b72a0040bb8c47640ba676b483&_e=0WaLpuAGUgKxEweeU8EA20XpzD8nzS6r473jNp8uXzdjYCVkYUEyjp92tcosYBBegwUcz_kxXm66cfb1BegHzSO3cnr_bc3Fmg7HClKMLk-WlWVkcGT92RCgUSLVv3p2UGNVKSMPzUeDZGRUHMJFftTyiSJEaL-HluaJRzRD_CUKnHciSas7Kak_casmUFllLcLkzGPhX9HOkVyjKlUCecPP3gBtRS1XWZn7IJ9qpKcAHG0mfInj_kncCaNAfVzn6W6SdY9P6_R5Zs-6hy3yNHaNvS1OluP7LX8O5V22EXDrm2xmy7BXSR3xD0__-EnXYsvs1jx-35NvOzh1bp8Q744C-QWeUv5oopf6hk82RhipvnXPaW6q05PWcmI_1AXpLGlDSpkyc0qfBTxDfS5uXvlclOPrDveJMhhoV22Qn9S41JPuo7z6KSW3S-alEq977XIeG9nbUB1GGB_PTWe0-jWpEJbCnADMHfufuZTbNphvCa-ylenP6Euio5dgCo68)_**

_And now, for the FIRST TIME in Rasmussen polling history, a majority of Americans say that our country is on the right track._

America is forever turning a page on the disastrous Obama-Biden chapter and choosing the path to GREATNESS:
_**["The long Obama era is over" -The Guardian

"Obama world loses its shine in a changing, hurting Democratic Party" -NBC News

# [Is America Ready for War?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=166007291&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2MDA3MjkxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTAwMjEwMTQsImV4cCI6MTc1MjYxMzAxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ASEhxnU__KttO5YOUhmcxRVY7JrqDua7uZ_WIJNgZYg)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e3d584cb-464b-44d8-9bab-8e4cf2bf65a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As the world watches the escalating conflict between Iran and Israel, a chilling question looms: Is America ready for war? With Israel calling on its staunchest ally, the United States, for support, and Iran likely leaning on its own allies, Russia and China, the specter of a global conflict feels uncomfortably close.
President Trump's recent military parade in Washington, D.C., with its display of martial might and his stark warning to adversaries--**["Your defeat will be certain, your demise will be final, and your downfall will be total and complete"](https://substack.com/redirect/4aa543dc-fd91-43e5-8270-86aeb4c035cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**--seemed to underscore the gravity of the moment. Yet, as synchronicity or coincidence aligns this display with the outbreak of hostilities in the Middle East, we must confront an uncomfortable truth: America's military readiness, and the cultural underpinnings that sustain it, may have faltered. While I firmly believe President Trump should exhaust every reasonable effort to avoid war, the question remains: If war is around the corner, are we prepared?
[Support PolitiBrawl](https://substack.com/redirect/e3d584cb-464b-44d8-9bab-8e4cf2bf65a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
America's military has long been a symbol of strength, but recent years have raised doubts about its readiness for a large-scale, sustained conflict. The Biden administration's focus on woke initiatives within the Pentagon--projects prioritizing diversity, equity, and inclusion over combat readiness--has drawn criticism for undermining the warrior ethos. Examples abound of resources diverted to programs that, while well-intentioned, do little to prepare soldiers for the brutal realities of war. The military is not a social experiment; it is a machine built to protect the nation through disciplined, lethal force. If soldiers are more concerned with "inclusive language" than mastering the instinct for protective violence, they may hesitate when faced with the visceral task of engaging the enemy. War demands a mindset that is unapologetically masculine--not in a gendered sense, but in the classical sense of courage, sacrifice, and unrelenting resolve. Have we, as a nation, lost the cultural fuel to sustain such a mindset?
Our recent history offers mixed signals. Veterans of Iraq and Afghanistan have proven their mettle, demonstrating that America still produces brave, honorable warriors capable of confronting adversaries. These men and women have faced insurgents, navigated complex battlefields, and returned with hard-won experience. Yet, a broader conflict--potentially requiring a draft to mobilize millions--would test a different demographic: the millennials and Gen Z, the 18-to-30-year-olds who would form the backbone of such a force. Can today's young men, raised in an era of relative comfort, match the grit of their grandparents who stormed Normandy's beaches or endured the jungles of Vietnam and Korea? The question is not just physical but cultural. Decades of prosperity, technological distraction, and shifting values have softened swaths of our youth. The masculine virtues--stoicism, physical toughness, and a willingness to confront evil head-on--have been eroded by a culture that often dismisses them as outdated or toxic.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Strand](https://substack.com/redirect/18819ff6-5193-45bb-bd29-9da2367b1407?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Have you seen what castor oil does to your liver?
Watch the shocking video below:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18819ff6-5193-45bb-bd29-9da2367b1407?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you're over 40 and struggle with...
Stubborn weight gain, digestive issues, low energy - then you need to[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/18819ff6-5193-45bb-bd29-9da2367b1407?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[watch this video](https://substack.com/redirect/18819ff6-5193-45bb-bd29-9da2367b1407?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** right now.
You're likely suffering from the same thing that 98+ million other Americans are, and that's a clogged liver that is stopping your body from breaking down fat.
But when you use castor oil in[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/18819ff6-5193-45bb-bd29-9da2367b1407?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[this weird way](https://substack.com/redirect/18819ff6-5193-45bb-bd29-9da2367b1407?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** each morning (not by drinking it)... Your liver becomes up to 80% more efficient - burning your stores of stubborn fat like jet fuel.

[Click To Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/18819ff6-5193-45bb-bd29-9da2367b1407?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
Contrast this with our potential adversaries. Russia, hardened by years of grueling conflict in Ukraine, has produced a generation of soldiers versed in the chaos of modern warfare. Their veterans know the cost of war and the necessity of inflicting pain to achieve victory. Iran, driven by a zealous commitment to its ideological goals, has spent decades preparing for conflict with Israel. Its fighters are ready to sacrifice everything for their cause, a fervor rooted in centuries of cultural and religious conviction. Meanwhile, in America, the myth of exceptionalism--once a rallying cry for heroism and patriotism--has been dimmed by postmodern cynicism, leftism, and a rejection of traditional values. The cultural fuel that once powered our military dominance feels tapped out, leaving us to wonder if we can muster the resolve for a fight that demands total commitment.
This is not to say America lacks strengths. Our technological edge--drones, cyber capabilities, and advanced weaponry--remains unmatched. Our military budget dwarfs those of our rivals, and our logistics networks are unparalleled. But wars are not won by technology alone. They require men and women who can endure the psychological and physical toll of combat, who can face death and deliver it without hesitation. The draft, if reinstated, would reveal the state of our young men. Many are physically unfit--obesity rates among American youth hover around 20%, and mental health challenges are rampant. Social media and gaming, while not inherently evil, have replaced the rough-and-tumble experiences that once forged resilience. The "wokefication" of culture, with its emphasis on sensitivity over strength, has left many young men unprepared for the harsh realities of war. If called to shove a bayonet into an enemy, would they flinch?
[Support PolitiBrawl](https://substack.com/redirect/e3d584cb-464b-44d8-9bab-8e4cf2bf65a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Yet, there is hope. America has always found ways to rise to the occasion. The same generation that seems soft has produced outliers--athletes, entrepreneurs, and volunteers--who embody discipline and grit. The cultural pendulum is swinging back, with figures like President Trump emphasizing strength and national pride. His parade, a celebration of military might, was a reminder that America can still project power. But projection is not enough; we must cultivate a culture that values the virtues war demands. This means prioritizing physical fitness, mental toughness, and a sense of duty in our youth. It means rejecting the notion that masculinity or martial values are inherently toxic. It means teaching young men that protecting their nation is a noble calling, not a relic of a bygone era.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e3d584cb-464b-44d8-9bab-8e4cf2bf65a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
To be clear, I am not advocating for war. The forever wars of the past two decades drained our resources and resolve, and reigniting global conflict would be catastrophic. President Trump's focus on diplomacy and deterrence is the right path. But readiness is non-negotiable. Every nation must reaffirm its right to exist through its ability to defend itself. If America is to maintain its dominance on the world stage, we must replenish the cultural fuel that powers our military. This starts with education that celebrates our history, not vilifies it. It continues with policies that prioritize combat readiness over social engineering. And it demands a societal shift that honors the warrior spirit--because if war comes, we will need killers, not complainers.
Are we ready? Perhaps, not yet. Our technology and core of seasoned veterans give us a foundation, but a larger conflict would expose our cultural weaknesses. The good news is that America has reinvented itself before. We can do so again by fostering a generation that is physically fit, mentally resilient, and unapologetically patriotic. The alternative--entering a global conflict with a softened, divided society--is a gamble we cannot afford. Let us hope President Trump's words remain a warning, not a prophecy, and that we act now to ensure our readiness for whatever lies ahead.
[Support PolitiBrawl](https://substack.com/redirect/e3d584cb-464b-44d8-9bab-8e4cf2bf65a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

(Continued) Contrast this with our potential adversaries. Russia, hardened by years of grueling conflict in Ukraine, has produced a generation of soldiers versed in the chaos of modern warfare. Their veterans know the cost of war and the necessity of inflicting pain to achieve victory. Iran, driven by a zealous commitment to its ideological goals, has spent decades preparing for conflict with Israel. Its fighters are ready to sacrifice everything for their cause, a fervor rooted in centuries of cultural and religious conviction. Meanwhile, in America, the myth of exceptionalism--once a rallying cry for heroism and patriotism--has been dimmed by postmodern cynicism, leftism, and a rejection of traditional values. The cultural fuel that once powered our military dominance feels tapped out, leaving us to wonder if we can muster the resolve for a fight that demands total commitment. This is not to say America lacks strengths. Our technological edge--drones, cyber capabilities, and advanced weaponry--remains unmatched. Our military budget dwarfs those of our rivals, and our logistics networks are unparalleled. But wars are not won by technology alone. They require men and women who can endure the psychological and physical toll of combat, who can face death and deliver it without hesitation. The draft, if reinstated, would reveal the state of our young men. Many are physically unfit--obesity rates among American youth hover around 20%, and mental health challenges are rampant. Social media and gaming, while not inherently evil, have replaced the rough-and-tumble experiences that once forged resilience. The "wokefication" of culture, with its emphasis on sensitivity over strength, has left many young men unprepared for the harsh realities of war. If called to shove a bayonet into an enemy, would they flinch? Yet, there is hope. America has always found ways to rise to the occasion. The same generation that seems soft has produced outliers--athletes, entrepreneurs, and volunteers--who embody discipline and grit. The cultural pendulum is swinging back, with figures like President Trump emphasizing strength and national pride. His parade, a celebration of military might, was a reminder that America can still project power. But projection is not enough; we must cultivate a culture that values the virtues war demands. This means prioritizing physical fitness, mental toughness, and a sense of duty in our youth. It means rejecting the notion that masculinity or martial values are inherently toxic. It means teaching young men that protecting their nation is a noble calling, not a relic of a bygone era. | | ---|---|--- To be clear, I am not advocating for war. The forever wars of the past two decades drained our resources and resolve, and reigniting global conflict would be catastrophic. President Trump's focus on diplomacy and deterrence is the right path. But readiness is non-negotiable. Every nation must reaffirm its right to exist through its ability to defend itself. If America is to maintain its dominance on the world stage, we must replenish the cultural fuel that powers our military. This starts with education that celebrates our history, not vilifies it. It continues with policies that prioritize combat readiness over social engineering. And it demands a societal shift that honors the warrior spirit--because if war comes, we will need killers, not complainers. Are we ready? Perhaps, not yet. Our technology and core of seasoned veterans give us a foundation, but a larger conflict would expose our cultural weaknesses. The good news is that America has reinvented itself before. We can do so again by fostering a generation that is physically fit, mentally resilient, and unapologetically patriotic. The alternative--entering a global conflict with a softened, divided society--is a gamble we cannot afford. Let us hope President Trump's words remain a warning, not a prophecy, and that we act now to ensure our readiness for whatever lies ahead. | | POLL Is America ready for war? | ? ? name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The Big Ugly Bill’s attack on the CFPB
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
This is yet another outrageous attempt to attack American consumers and hand a huge giveaway to Trump’s billionaire donors.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR)
---
That Big Ugly Bill that the GOP is fast-tracking right now has a whole lot of stuff in it that has nothing to do with lowering costs for the American people. **I want to talk about the latest sneak attack they’re pushing with their billionaire budget proposal: Dismantling the CFPB.** Remember when Elon Musk and his DOGE goons tried and failed to break the CFPB by firing nearly 90 percent of its staff? That blatantly illegal attack was stopped by a court order. But now, House Republicans are trying to finish the job for Musk — by completely cutting the CFPB’s funding in this legislation. This is another outrageous attempt to put an end to oversight that holds corporations accountable and protects American consumers. It’s another obvious giveaway in this plan to help billionaires make more billions. It’s another reason Republicans are rushing this Big Ugly Bill through — hoping we won’t notice all the sneaky tricks they’ve packed in to hurt working people and help billionaires. **I won’t stand by as they attempt to destroy the CFPB. I’m challenging the process Senate Republicans are using to pass this bill to strip away any measures unrelated to the budget — like this attack on the CFPB.** [**Will you support our fight to defend the CFPB and working people? Our movement of grassroots supporters is what allows me to stand up and fight back against corrupt Republicans who are in the pockets of billionaires like Bezos and Zuckerberg.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3024?t=8&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3024?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3024?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3024?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3024?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3024?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3024?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR)
---

---
Now, why would Republicans and Trump — that guy who ran on promises he’d lower costs “on Day One” — want to get rid of the CFPB, the agency that helps lower costs for Americans? It could be because of the CFPB’s track record:
* Putting around $20 billion back in the pockets of people who got cheated by financial institutions
* Taking on the types of shady lenders that were tricking and trapping people with complicated mortgages and eventually crashed our economy in 2008 — costing millions of people their homes
* Stopping Wells Fargo from unlawfully repossessing people’s cars after the bank had piled on fees that consumers didn’t owe or charged them the wrong interest rate
* Tackling aggressive junk fees that make price comparisons impossible
* Beating back predators that tricked service members and veterans into paying interest rates that surged up to 200 percent on pawn loans
* Pushing back when some medical debt collector companies were double billing patients or even charging patients for services they never received

Put simply: If you’ve got a checking account, a credit card, a mortgage, or a student loan — the CFPB is looking out for you to keep you from getting cheated by corporations. And corporate billionaires aren’t happy about that. Dismantling the CFPB is a craven way for Republicans to reward their rich and powerful friends who profit off of cheating consumers. It’s a way for them to get rid of the cop on the beat who could stand in the way of their own financial interests. And it’s a way for them to make it easier for Big Banks and corporate CEOs to trick, trap, and scam you. **I’m exposing Republicans’ blatant attempts to shut down our consumer watchdog agency. This agency has been attacked left and right, but our fight to get our government on the side of the working class can prevail — and I’ll keep fighting my heart out to make sure that we win.** [**If you’re in a position to give, chip in to fund our fight to protect working Americans from getting tricked, trapped, or scammed by billionaires and corporations. Your donation fuels my fight to stop this Big Ugly Bill and raise the alarm about the attacks on working people coming from the White House and Republicans.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3024?t=14&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3024?t=12&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR)
---
| [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=4&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=5&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=6&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=7&akid=2568%2E4032634%2E-p6DYR)

name: All On The Line
subject: The tl;dr in Texas:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Our affiliate is in court. Support our work to fight for fair maps.
|
---

The outcome of the case could force the state to redraw its map, and we need to be ready to keep lawmakers accountable in that process.

Let’s jump into the details of this case in Texas:
**• Texas’s congressional maps violate the Voting Rights Act** by diluting the power of communities of color.
**•** Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), is supporting a group that is **challenging the maps.**
**•** The NRF is demanding that the Texas court order a fair congressional map that includes **two additional Latino opportunity districts.**
**•** Whites and Latinos were about equal in population size when the 2020 maps were drawn. The state drew 23 white-majority districts out of 38 total congressional districts. **Latino voters made up majorities in only seven.**
• **The current unfair maps deprive Latino communities of their voice** in deciding the direction of their state and the country.
**• Now, the Trump White House is pressuring Texas lawmakers to further gerrymander the congressional map** — another example of Trump trying to suppress votes in order to hold onto power.
**Here’s the bottom line in Texas and in any state with unfair maps:** We will fight so communities can have true representation in Congress.
**Your support of All On The Line helps root out gerrymandering and safeguards our democracy.[Chip in now to support grassroots efforts to stop unfair maps in Texas and beyond that stop the will of the majority.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109649004/551782988/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_TXExplain_email_20250615-AOTL-Tier1-TXExplain_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250615-AOTL-Tier1-TXExplain_&utm_campaign=TXExplain&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwMGUzN2JiLTJiNGEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EsfJEWx_RfgNBVaPy2wI_lNuzmASTlVqckir1rrIvbY=)**

clean_body: Our affiliate is in court. Support our work to fight for fair maps. | Peter, here’s the tl;dr: Our affiliate is in court right now fighting to secure fair representation for communities of color in multiple Texas congressional districts. The outcome of the case could force the state to redraw its map, and we need to be ready to keep lawmakers accountable in that process. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Let’s jump into the details of this case in Texas: • Texas’s congressional maps violate the Voting Rights Act by diluting the power of communities of color. • Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), is supporting a group that is challenging the maps. • The NRF is demanding that the Texas court order a fair congressional map that includes two additional Latino opportunity districts. • Whites and Latinos were about equal in population size when the 2020 maps were drawn. The state drew 23 white-majority districts out of 38 total congressional districts. Latino voters made up majorities in only seven. • The current unfair maps deprive Latino communities of their voice in deciding the direction of their state and the country. • Now, the Trump White House is pressuring Texas lawmakers to further gerrymander the congressional map — another example of Trump trying to suppress votes in order to hold onto power. Here’s the bottom line in Texas and in any state with unfair maps: We will fight so communities can have true representation in Congress. Your support of All On The Line helps root out gerrymandering and safeguards our democracy.= = Thank you for being a part of this work, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end.
