body:
You need to read this
| **Justice Sotomayor just issued a dire warning about where our country is headed:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91108?t=6&akid=20201%2E878179%2ErodBzG) Sonia Sotomayor has been on the frontlines of the fight against Trump — from SLAMMING the immunity decision to standing up for reproductive rights!

[**As one of the few defenders of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. ONLY 30 SPOTS LEFT: SIGN YOUR NAME NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91108?t=7&akid=20201%2E878179%2ErodBzG) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91108?t=8&akid=20201%2E878179%2ErodBzG)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s increasingly extremist agenda and unconstitutional power grab.**

Your scathing dissent against the MAGA Justices’ immunity decision was historic, and you haven’t backed down even a little bit since then.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91108?t=9&akid=20201%2E878179%2ErodBzG) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91109?t=10&akid=20201%2E878179%2ErodBzG)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20201%2E878179%2ErodBzG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20201%2E878179%2ErodBzG).**

name: Tobias Read
subject: RESPONSE REQUESTED: Ban phones in public schools?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250615em-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250615em-rs]
As Oregon’s Secretary of State and a member of the State Board of Education, I take our state’s K-12 education system extremely seriously.
As parents and educators become increasingly aware of the impact of social media and cell phone usage on students, conversations about the potential need to ban cell phone use in schools have gained momentum.
That’s why I’m reaching out today. I wanted to get your input on this critical question for the future of education and the raising of our kids. Your input is very important to me.
So let me know: Do YOU support banning cell phones in public schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
The work to build a world-class education system for Oregon’s kids is never done.
There will always be more for us to do when it comes to building a public school system Oregon can be proud of — and I’m ready to dig in.
However, with such divisive questions facing our state over the next few years, I wanted to solicit your input on some of the most pressing issues.
So please, spare just a few seconds to let me know where you stand on the issue of cell phones in the classroom. Do you support banning them from our schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State

I saw a picture today of Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth and his seven kids. I admit, my reaction was: what lunatic has seven kids in this day and age? ## What Happened at the 2025 Southern Baptist Convention
The Southern Baptist Convention held its annual conference this week, and delegates narrowly voted against eliminating the public policy arm, which has been accused of advancing left-wing ideology. Delegates, which the SBC calls “messengers,” gathered in Dallas, Texas from June 8-11 for the annual meeting. clean_body: | | On ‘No Kings Day’ We Saw More Behavior That Was On the Level of Jesters – RedState Saturday we saw “No Kings Day” protests spring up across the country, and my apathy was such that I decided to take action myself. I staged something of a counter-protest – for lunch I ordered some Whoppers at Burger King. My resistance was just as trenchant and effective as anything seen on display, so [...] | | The Smithsonian Institution Audit Is Only the Start The Smithsonian Institution’s Board of Regents may have to get used to meetings where accountability is expected. At this week’s much-anticipated one, members yielded to President Donald Trump’s demand for an audit of politicized content. Alas, they also circled the wagons around Smithsonian Institution Secretary Lonnie Bunch. The Wall Street Journal reports that, according to a document that [...] | | Ignoring improper payments requirements ... costs Americans! WorldNetDaily by Jeremy Portnoy, Real Clear Wire Topline: The Environmental Protection Agency, Department of Defense and Office of Personnel Management violated the Payment Integrity Information Act by publishing inaccurate estimates of their improper payments last year, according to recent federal audits. Key facts: Improper payments — sent to the wrong person, for the wrong amount or the wrong reason — cost the [...] | | I Saw a Picture of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and His 7 Kids, and I Have Father’s Day Thoughts – RedState I saw a picture today of Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth and his seven kids. I admit, my reaction was: what lunatic has seven kids in this day and age? clean_body: Help me hold the Trump administration accountable. | | | = Peter, my mid-month deadline is tonight, and right now, I really need your help to hit my $20,000 goal. If you know me, you know that asking for money is my least favorite part of running a campaign. But you also know that I never back down from a fight. Right now – as our rights, our economy, and our very democracy are all being threatened by the dark forces ruling our nation – your support is more important than ever. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = It's important you understand that all throughout my career, all throughout my life, I've taken on bullies. I've taken on individuals who seek to separate us and who espouse hate – and the bad actors powering this administration are no different. Whether I'm going up against far-right extremists in our government, unelected billionaires like Elon Musk, or corrupt corporations trying to put their bottom lines ahead of hardworking families, I have one message for them: Bring it on. But I would be lying if I said these fights are going to be easy, Peter. These powerful forces will do anything to push their dangerous agendas. That's why I need top supporters like you to join this team with your donation right now.= | | = Thank you for fighting by my side. – Letitia James | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

Today, I’m especially thankful to have my husband, Mark, by my side.

Hi, I know we send you a lot of emails about my campaign and what I’m working on in Congress, but today I want to email you about someone I’m especially thankful to have by my side: my husband, Mark. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109649563/551784993/-629675555?refcode=email_061525_fathersday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGUxNGEyYmYtMzA0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qOvWfITxIfEwKVoP_CXL8vlx8o-2NQ79v_41ZKfbeRA=) Mark and I have built an incredible family and are proud to be raising our four amazing children here in Oregon. Together, we’ve watched our kids grow into talented, thoughtful people. In addition to seeing Mark thrive as a father, I’ve also seen him excel as a business owner. We’ve worked together operating our businesses and learned how to take on new challenges and responsibilities together. Mark’s always supported me in everything I’ve done — including running for Congress. Thanks to his support, I was one of the only Democrats in the country last year to flip a House seat blue, and I’ve been able to take our fight for Oregonians all the way to Washington. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Thinking of my dad today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Hey Peter, I’d like to wish a Happy Father’s Day to all the dads out there! And to those of you who are missing your dad today, I’m right there with you. As with every Father’s Day, I’ve been thinking a lot about my dad today. He died of brain cancer when I was 13, but the impact he made on my life has been indelible — including my decision to become a prosecutor and enter public service. My dad was an assistant United States attorney in Washington, D.C. He approached his work with humility and a sense of service to others, always striving to lead with generosity, kindness, and empathy. Those are the same values he instilled in my siblings and me. He taught me from a very young age that we have a responsibility to look out for others and ensure that everyone is treated equally and fairly under the law. I’ve carried his lessons with me every day of my life — from my own time as a federal prosecutor to my work as Democrats’ lead counsel during Trump’s first impeachment to my service now as a member of the U.S. House of Representatives. My dad was also someone who cared deeply about making sure everyone had the opportunity to create a better future for themselves and their families. I’ve followed in his footsteps by working to do the same during my time in Congress. That’s why I helped found the Congressional Dads Caucus to fight for better policies to support working families. My dad meant a lot to me, Peter. And I carry his values with me every day, trying to pass them on to my own kids. Today, I’m especially thinking of all those out there whose dad is not around, and I’m hoping that we can all draw strength from their memories. Happy Father’s Day, and I hope your day is filled with love! — Dan | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109649746/551785783/916437137?refcode=AU_DSG_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250615_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzVkZWQ3ZC0zMjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyWt3yESqhrSJuuLDH_vqIN8DIqqtP10U0LCYvJfvs0=)

subject: a goal we can’t afford to miss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
but we’re still falling short, Derek.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109649828/551786070/2026934182?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM3_250615_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZThhOTBiMS0zMzRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNkC7NQ7vG4p3IaDKqhlkEuTMsMN5I_wBDUJ0J172gQ=) Jenny here, Derek, Mark Warner’s finance director.

I’m going to be direct and ask you to [_**pitch in ahead of our fundraising deadline tonight at midnight**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109649829/551786071/2026934182?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM3_250615_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZThhOTBiMS0zMzRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNkC7NQ7vG4p3IaDKqhlkEuTMsMN5I_wBDUJ0J172gQ=), but first, I want to tell you the 3 reasons why this particular deadline is so important.

1\. At the end of the month, we’ll file a public report with the Federal Election Commission, who will then make our numbers **public**. If we can’t show that we have the resources we need to win, Republicans will see it as an opportunity to spend big in Virginia to defeat Senator Warner and expand their foothold of power.

2\. For the past six months, Mark has been _the_ leading voice in Washington calling out the Trump administration’s corruption every step of the way. And he’s also not afraid to call out his Republican colleagues who continue to stay silent while Trump completely dismantles our federal government. That means his seat could be a top Republican target in next year's election. We need to be prepared for one or more billionaire Republicans to sweep in with a massive super PAC against Mark.

3\. We fell short of our projections last month, and we’re still playing catch up. If we fall short again, we’re at risk of not being able to push back against whatever dark money ads are coming our way.

[_**So I need to ask: if you can, will you chip in right now? If we can’t show that we have the resources we need to win, Republicans will see it as an opportunity to spend big in Virginia to defeat Senator Warner and expand their foothold of power. 2\. And he’s also not afraid to call out his Republican colleagues who continue to stay silent while Trump completely dismantles our federal government. That means his seat could be a top Republican target in next year's election. We need to be prepared for one or more billionaire Republicans to sweep in with a massive super PAC against Mark. 3\. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: the false attacks have already started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This is the first big test of the general election.
Peter — I’ll get right to the point.
**The general election just started, and already, our opponent’s MAGA allies in Washington, D.C., are launching false attacks across New Jersey to try to mislead voters about my record.**
We knew going in that Donald Trump and national Republicans were DETERMINED to flip New Jersey red this year. And we knew this race — one of only two governor’s seats up for grabs in 2025 — would be the most competitive and expensive New Jersey governor’s race on record.
**[But in an election this competitive, with so much on the line, we can’t stand by and do nothing when we face false attacks. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots and help me get the truth out far and wide about my record and where I stand?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89770?refcode=em20250615-9011&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9011%2E614464%2EBxauTd)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89770?refcode=em20250615-9011&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9011%2E614464%2EBxauTd)**
Peter, it’s no secret why Donald Trump and his allies are working so hard to defeat me — because my Republican opponent has promised to bring even the most disastrous elements of the MAGA agenda here to New Jersey.
Trump and his extremist allies think that if they behave like bullies long enough, they’ll wear us all down — so that they can exercise unchecked power without consequences.
**But one thing I’ll never do is back down to a bully. This election is our first chance to put the Trump administration — and all their enablers — on notice that their actions have consequences, and we reject the destructive path they have taken our nation down since taking office.**
**[If we’re going to send that message, then we need to stand up and fight back at moments like this one. If you’re with me, anything you can split between my campaign and Heartland Patriots will help me share the facts about who I am and what I stand for with the people of New Jersey — because that’s how we win this race, Peter.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89770?refcode=em20250615-9011&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9011%2E614464%2EBxauTd)**
Thanks for all your help,
Mikie

clean_body: | | = Team—it’s LaMonica McIver. Last month, the Trump administration brought charges against me because I was doing my job as a member of Congress. Now, I’ve been officially indicted. Let me be clear: under the law, members of Congress are explicitly authorized to conduct oversight at ICE facilities. I was there to do my job and make sure that this administration isn’t abusing people’s rights. And I was charged and now indicted. The administration’s attacks are baseless and the facts are on my side, but that’s not stopping them from going after me.So I need you on my side, today. These charges hold no factual merit. But there’s a reason they brought them: the Trump administration thinks they can intimidate me and scare me out of doing the job I was elected to do. They’re wrong. I need your help to send an unmistakable message: Americans won’t stand for this. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Reps. LaMonica McIver and Jahana Hayes will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = We set a goal of 5,000 new grassroots donors to stand with us before our 11:59pm deadline TONIGHT. If we stand together we can amass the resources to mount a legal defense against this baseless indictment and show the Trump administration that the people who oppose his cruel agenda won’t be intimidated into silence. This is far bigger than one person. The rule of law is under attack, and what we do next matters. = We’re in this together, Rep. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: You never know where life is going to lead you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
The values I grew up with are the values I took to the Senate
| | |
---
Friend,
This month, I’ve been thinking a lot about how you never know where life is going to lead you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109650402/551788003/1086012512?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5536-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjYwM2E4MS0zNTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KGppYZcxFtxkE0WdUKUZUXeHiB1z-4wwg2JxhDU25os=)
When my grandparents immigrated from modern-day Ukraine to escape the pogroms, they never could have imagined their granddaughter would one day be a U.S. Senator standing in support of Ukraine’s defense against a brutal and unprovoked invasion.
When I used to talk to my parents about working as a cocktail and banquet waitress to help pay for college and make ends meet, they never could have imagined their daughter would one day pass legislation through the U.S. Senate to help millions of working class Americans by removing taxes on tips.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109650403/551788004/1086012512?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5536-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjYwM2E4MS0zNTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KGppYZcxFtxkE0WdUKUZUXeHiB1z-4wwg2JxhDU25os=)
When my Jewish faith helped guide me into public service, I never could have imagined I would be leading efforts against the surge of antisemitism in our country and writing new laws to fund Holocaust education in our schools.
Nobody knows where life is going to lead them, friend – but the values my loved ones taught me growing up are still the values I hold dear today. That’s why I fight so hard in the Senate for a better future for our country and all Americans.
Meanwhile, President Trump and his GOP allies are showing us that the only values _they_ hold dear are to make the ultra-rich even richer at the expense of everyone else. That's why we must do everything we can to take back the Senate for Democrats and put a stop to their reckless agenda.
**But to flip the Senate, we need to raise the resources to win in critical battleground races across the country. And right now, my team is still falling $2,382 short of our mid-month goal ahead of the deadline at midnight tonight:** [**Please, can I count on you to chip in $5 or more now to help Democrats flip the Senate blue, finally stop Trump, and ensure a better future in the lives of all Americans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109650404/551788005/1086012512?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5536-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjYwM2E4MS0zNTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KGppYZcxFtxkE0WdUKUZUXeHiB1z-4wwg2JxhDU25os=)

clean_body: The values I grew up with are the values I took to the Senate | | | Friend, This month, I’ve been thinking a lot about how you never know where life is going to lead you. = When my grandparents immigrated from modern-day Ukraine to escape the pogroms, they never could have imagined their granddaughter would one day be a U.S. Senator standing in support of Ukraine’s defense against a brutal and unprovoked invasion. When I used to talk to my parents about working as a cocktail and banquet waitress to help pay for college and make ends meet, they never could have imagined their daughter would one day pass legislation through the U.S. Senate to help millions of working class Americans by removing taxes on tips. = When my Jewish faith helped guide me into public service, I never could have imagined I would be leading efforts against the surge of antisemitism in our country and writing new laws to fund Holocaust education in our schools. Nobody knows where life is going to lead them, friend – but the values my loved ones taught me growing up are still the values I hold dear today. That’s why I fight so hard in the Senate for a better future for our country and all Americans. Meanwhile, President Trump and his GOP allies are showing us that the only values they hold dear are to make the ultra-rich even richer at the expense of everyone else. That's why we must do everything we can to take back the Senate for Democrats and put a stop to their reckless agenda. But to flip the Senate, we need to raise the resources to win in critical battleground races across the country. And right now, my team is still falling $2,382 short of our mid-month goal ahead of the deadline at midnight tonight: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you. Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen: Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most. Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP. = You can also =** to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help._

1️⃣ **_Oklahoma:_ DLCC Spotlight Candidate wins special elections 🎉 **
DLCC Spotlight Candidate Amanda Clinton stunned Oklahoma and the country with a 50-point overperformance in her special election – [a massive win that’s just the latest in a string of victories for state Democrats this year → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pAF1xqtXklvWov51wqLy6wcOS463CcDnEgE_9EMr2zTFHFvByZUgIsu0ycTnpQyW1vlyFMsdulpoeD-rLF1I-t0v-Wc-fp7vMhGd8KAui12l_rY3HjpE8FkhHqELTYMqIYN6woCTzmtD87ExEnULfp3cnzNcufNz6W4XuSM4T2e3qxSdCVWMP2NjqMBgDuWMq7-SDg279BKFktD73ZheJcbmQ-Awqq2QXHUepzmaSggI_Cqfm-90Czb49Xm81kKHRWNu5OrKOsaM4sM2VYgHP3NCiU15GszFh0I1W2w6KfqYue2sGPeIT7T0xTotKrc1TC-Tt1WCftXElCqacp5RRp1FQljP_erJvYlsD5SRSRy3wtR4lJtR8EjJAcb_RJY6-VTs0-grCmCawJRo0avaw_AfDiijOUn_P8NIPkjnITRy5VAMdo6g0yO-vWJ_eXrGCf1994xKcHhChza8trRqMTQUJpiQ43N2_9EwuswvncSo3oQps2LatYX8wmLP14S1stCocVE-UVS1-R0B-LJ7FqNB5XtiyWYETAmouiMVni0jIc_acGGJsa2XSKuqmrhsvI/4hd/N_JqVUD8TKWAeFgwgH1QyQ/h1/h001.zJ8QvuADtF-60duiJPLdhX1GrwIQapVn23xRJ8gokBs)
2️⃣ **_Pennsylvania:_ Dems pass tiered minimum wage increase legislation **
In a straight party-line vote, the Pennsylvania House passed minimum wage increase legislation that raises the wage to $15 per hour for some counties and $12 for the remainder. [Learn more here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdC492frRvevUF0wMVvph8Pov64kUzYJEWu71pRnLGSYJbejyQnGVWAXhyrYjl0wJWNvYSwrd-UsxEV8CuuwqDiTzGDjbELfhTjOPy6rQ8KCjjbWr2atkQyJDzUpb06Tdn87pETLlDU43FNE6rLstIr6mT6YzEFwe6BR2FyjYqYquw8_ztceU_DQg0g6ucCm29lWigFB9PGBv6Z6L3ZsWj3-dfvmDO6LGgXdH0IPgNOraDDhE89RE6yTm4K7qASxVEeLOfVUQSUprhFcF7Tj8M_gaaVV_OLmk8VhdfFwIB7FTNxReOXbYFHBGsLiteS-SA_ZmXHLaDdkVdRXHjeNs4TVY_38S42m00vViiBDmzIagmiK8WNPw-iKgs-dGppUo9quYNa0lEOKdhOScAxdLCWIMQ5l20Z_2sEP_xhPvSRFoBKuQuDykVBnVGsewRClH5kvFYaEOqsIsX3Ajo42PXhXDlaDnZby7bozx8ljFYf5BBUJiUJLidH1GpGUaPKwt8bSGNzAIoQqSgxF2Nxo_oVeR79w5W1P9fboz5-MZDNEWRDY3bTTOaWvvK5yCHReBLGmmc5XvmtFhmIRpEs9CqEg89uO9yYF02GTmHckAEsa/4hd/N_JqVUD8TKWAeFgwgH1QyQ/h2/h001.tvcnvSpaPwODOCnwdwAnkGrNpjf_zzlZbrgSRLKquE4)
👀 **_Watch:_ The DLCC hosts the first in our “States of Play” press conference series **
The DLCC hosted a press conference with state legislators on the disastrous impact Republicans’ proposed Medicaid cuts will have on the ground for 13.7 million people who will be kicked off their health care coverage. [Watch the press conference → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvCXmb6eJRihSYu_qAXsCitXm_jjDrSzzKIXgkuEu0pOEPOqp_H9dZSAgKtrlZWRlwpYhUaJTvyacPWXH3UECGEptnc_jZ92eK33QMUPkqTsDt7ngzF9x96O8aw4cEwJP1HCiJfRi2qYdSqU74XOpf82hd4IwrIM8XSqQJQsjpYfu1Ni8ZFbDqZ3V9bJIL4f0efadrS62pwsbDnM-F0ZgR3mPx40k39wP47XCetCRnjC-EUgbDwhEb2i9xsPNWTzsk072cBODe041-scC5RWAM6ZoZFiZkc72S6ESiK0eI1H741oVOTEb4n_sA96eWsK_YNeGD-0fagSv10C3HXo7wM6kvk9CsN7uFTsWxCDTHq6sKkhEmYyUPH6Dw0FNC6WeXO0U277f9r2jR7sv-EmF2n9p2m3vr6Q34ijRuyUD3ljfinNP2VzV4QeSAQHrDL8GE7nqobTnb8QgmjNjC9GlOLJ9iyNH0iXvNu4YCkoEUYWEV1N9vXimVtjm1jGI22oKNcQw5W2Bv7trqLv4L8_iHr_/4hd/N_JqVUD8TKWAeFgwgH1QyQ/h3/h001.YOfa3lTKowK-UbEl_9AKp1_wtd5czfEs1S60VXZXIbA)
📖 **_Read:_ Democrats need to stop acting like they’re holding a losing hand **
MSNBC’s Symone Sanders highlighted state Democrats’ impactful leadership and the wins they are notching in her latest op-ed. Democrats in state legislatures are not only winning and overperforming this year, but they’re also standing up for their communities and fighting against the devastating cuts progressing in Congress. [Read the op-ed → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMUwP7fqWAEQc6iWOGuuUYAVBT05lo_LuE3zc3xEnvYS9XkT4qGetXyEMGU2q-zcNHIZpkWwMByV5FZPhJLmB_X-uM24Sz05d7PU_S6eYQLuYlQDB-JGQ9pRcxyeDdbDiyw9-_0hRfXeA1o1s2Ss5wi3mNp8_Aptix9XRcWM0KwN6K6c0pCGNl8dz_mfVurTaV9B-tC9h2WYUm4IkUVNfn5FLOwCUrCF8zmZbwwRI659Rdq7W7SSs_2MvKkV5B-FAEOYYmqg6uD9fgsnr1Z-eDyMu2Li42e4eQK3wn7dGe1PwfRrjVI1xZToUB-jGqo35XZrCZgCh8B2ulBYMbup6kkBSonLq6mjiaeD0f2HL66KI_nzD4g8rT59ZSI9pscOWkq6YPt6tNRxRWNLgQUpIJs4pe2zGNRSeka8N4cv2Suc3282H2vvIujHK9lzf20oLEPTknmVicznBJSmCAgIo2kMz3T8CZlBi7JnGZ9LKImW_KjQcBgRikGQSXul94TgbFpfyYCOLuEMxbujAml1fqxcqly7BVeAfdNKpNpOvXYlg1n8q54yNIw-CeEVpm1Fj5jGBLCuDCM4zDkJl5VUkzICSJx1r5zvabda6n69Qhr1Q/4hd/N_JqVUD8TKWAeFgwgH1QyQ/h4/h001.HP1N61flH_5DfUC18wap8TOtVp5I2gxrgpDglbeiChU)
🛡️** _You’re Invited:_ Down Ballot Defenders Summit **
Team DLCC is hosting our first-ever virtual Down Ballot Defenders Summit on July 9th. DLCC President Heather Williams and state legislators from around the country will be answering your questions and firing up supporters for our work ahead. [**RSVP today →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9u_GU3djC_YxH5oogoQ6ZbSl3vMLEmr-mlYZ8yiqR8zVMZXl7W2JhVmaKJu-Hy2NZWHYeqxfxXaeeZYjl9bgaAafMbEapZgzbtJHxpMgJKPRziTvyQecgk-2OD6V10vOZTiCUSeeYa5qncOt8ocCmA83NqZ8J7qseFp5YXiDlLF3Ol3HUGxQcIKS5vXPRdvToKjPrQHPQLhd85YvV51ruTM6EzA_sxtzAp2SrPNglSv8oc5T0aeQphcgIoKgJwss4TgwlXcNJEVppnkQS5bBvKxGJclIaQoyP1j9WBgxWuRaWP4nillcBiRli1LhZDXZ0jVcfHWXlgjrR9_d4H-dx1zNh9oftehjnTUNOFErFdbQ-cNj0cnHG-obgik_LTaF1Sb7LH5US9diQlsh-zf2O82NScSqtBgxIcYMkxFrA8Pm8YgvAF5Nl_o_whSKtVVp-Wn8AKQnxahKM9CG-FURwK47G-U_0-8zZ-j-PuJ0JIXxkTwBJECspulhtin8saN1Q/4hd/N_JqVUD8TKWAeFgwgH1QyQ/h5/h001.2Iyuox0wJa-EBBDJqPejOY7OQl207gmAa0UFeht-ZN4)

If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. [**Join our team today →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDu3dxGzlBB9YjsCEOc4FOGL2qIqa78zmdNqDgId1SGnFHbGVJq5iBMpx2xNtYeP51srWcYPwG2NUI1cEoo8q6IWNRFih0SZ8YVoASHD0PaSakHFutZyQPOjhGJ0hvotDiIfLT8IT79pZepUrnCQroy5LSDa0rGmpqH5xs2fYX3CuqY6Ugk6WNGXlgcqXfTasUNGMthuVW7VHoNm8RZI3wp7s4H4v0NlW7hwFhslis5qmLB_yOylYpQK9DkLWVcv1KOJkgFrcMnHyabhesHoDivOF-ruT7oS-8LEbPxSFIy9a7eECvZJyqrrsdxbtI37ViMlWNRP6_f483A-Ll-6ZiFzINMAfoSyFtzKbPw0C0aTbmOwmYAfVU6gq-6nAR-86tECQH2z3LI7YUzxSjHwAq4Sin8APMRWRhQzo84-U__D_6ImQ334j8XVavUsflIRINyP7Lc6jD7aVpj-GG3nibuReEPbEPcihiXizoAJwKnuz2LOG_apT2UqVFOqTk3y-M2PKlo8AxO_yHvGzgBINFzg/4hd/N_JqVUD8TKWAeFgwgH1QyQ/h6/h001.5FOWdhqzWGepRiC1VQADHiRQT4tZCQTkRCI5d4jqdlA)
**🗳️ _Upcoming elections:_ Democrats work to build progressive power **
State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, June 15th, 2025. | | | | | | 1️⃣ Oklahoma: DLCC Spotlight Candidate wins special elections 🎉 DLCC Spotlight Candidate Amanda Clinton stunned Oklahoma and the country with a 50-point overperformance in her special election – 2️⃣ Pennsylvania: Dems pass tiered minimum wage increase legislation In a straight party-line vote, the Pennsylvania House passed minimum wage increase legislation that raises the wage to $15 per hour for some counties and $12 for the remainder. 👀 Watch: The DLCC hosts the first in our “States of Play” press conference series The DLCC hosted a press conference with state legislators on the disastrous impact Republicans’ proposed Medicaid cuts will have on the ground for 13.7 million people who will be kicked off their health care coverage. 📖 Read: Democrats need to stop acting like they’re holding a losing hand MSNBC’s Symone Sanders highlighted state Democrats’ impactful leadership and the wins they are notching in her latest op-ed. Democrats in state legislatures are not only winning and overperforming this year, but they’re also standing up for their communities and fighting against the devastating cuts progressing in Congress. 🛡️ You’re Invited: Down Ballot Defenders Summit Team DLCC is hosting our first-ever virtual Down Ballot Defenders Summit on July 9th. DLCC President Heather Williams and state legislators from around the country will be answering your questions and firing up supporters for our work ahead. 🫏 Join our movement: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Peter, I really need you to read this email in full — Georgia is on the precipice of a crisis. After declining to run for Senate, Marjorie Taylor Greene is now publicly flirting with a bid for Governor. Since she burst onto the scene, Marjorie Taylor Greene has done nothing but enable the worst instincts of the Republican Party — backing Trump’s reckless agenda and stoking division in the House to grab more attention for herself. She thrives on chaos and conspiracy, and now she wants to bring that destructive energy to the Governor’s Mansion. **We can’t let that happen.** Georgia deserves leaders who unite us, not tear us apart. Leaders who fight for working families, not for Donald Trump and his divisive agenda. This is a moment where every single one of us must come together and fight back. But we’re running out of time to build the war chest we need to go toe-to-toe with MTG and MAGA and flip the Governor’s seat blue. [We need to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight to build enough momentum to send MTG packing — for good. body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39795%2E3422442%2EHqt6Ko)
Derek, no BS—here’s the deal:
**[We’re reaching out to you with only a few hours to go to ask if you’ll donate $5 ahead of our mid-month deadline at midnight? More below on why this is important:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250615_2_ak?refcode=em20250615-39795&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39795_3422442_Hqt6Ko&akid=39795%2E3422442%2EHqt6Ko)**
$5 might not seem like a lot compared to the big checks that PACs write to bankroll candidates. But, when thousands of people come together and donate what they can afford, it all adds up to power our campaign.
Katie has never taken a dime from corporate PACs. She’s running to stand up to Donald Trump and his cronies, tackle California’s affordability crisis, and fight for our environment. To win, we need your help.
At the end of the month, we’ll have to report our fundraising numbers and everyone including our opponents, Super PACs, and reporters will be able to see how much we’ve raised. Super PACs could start boosting other candidates based on what our public fundraising report shows.
To stay on track for our June goal, we need to raise $35,000 by midnight tonight. That’s just hours away.
→ So what do you say, Derek? **[Will you pitch in a few dollars right now? Here's a personalized link where you can donate:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250615_2_ak?refcode=em20250615-39795&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39795_3422442_Hqt6Ko&akid=39795%2E3422442%2EHqt6Ko)**

Thanks for reading,
Team Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250615-39795&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39795_3422442_Hqt6Ko&akid=39795%2E3422442%2EHqt6Ko)**

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: I'm a doctor. I'm scared. And I'm running for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109650774/551789386/-1591572682?refcode=250612_MFC_Annie_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTRmZjcyOS0zODRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0u61IoGvNZgHs8z1XbOu8r-rpLgzmGnX7ay4JOuU6PI=) Friend, **I'm a pediatrician. I’m pissed. I’m scared. And I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham in the U.S. Senate >>** I’m not the “monsters-under-the-bed” kind of scared. I’m the “I’ve watched children suffer from preventable illness and injury while politicians do absolutely nothing” kind of scared. I’ve treated kids who’ve been shot. Kids whose families struggle to afford their medications. Kids who live with mold that causes asthma attacks, miss school for climate disasters, and watch politicians use them as political pawns. And now? Trump is causing chaos and Lindsey Graham is right by his side. And Medicaid — the program that keeps half our pediatric patients insured, healthy, and...alive — is on the chopping block to pay for tax breaks for billionaires. So yeah, I never planned to run for Senate. _**But I’m scared. I’m pissed. I’m motivated. And I’m 100% in.**_ [**I’m running for Senate in South Carolina to defeat Lindsey Graham and to fight for the kids no one in D.C. seems to be thinking about. So I need you with me on day one. We need to hit 10,000 donations before midnight to prove that this campaign can go the distance. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109650775/551789387/-1591572682?refcode=250612_MFC_Annie_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTRmZjcyOS0zODRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0u61IoGvNZgHs8z1XbOu8r-rpLgzmGnX7ay4JOuU6PI=) I’m running because the Republican Party, led by people like Lindsey Graham, is dismantling the very systems that keep our kids safe here in South Carolina. I’m running because the issues I care about — children’s healthcare, vaccines, gun violence, public education, Social Security, Medicaid and Medicare — are under direct attack right now. And I’m running because I consider it my professional duty as a pediatrician — to give children a strong voice at the national level. Too many are comfortable on the sidelines. That won’t work for me. We need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to fight. I’m ready. Even though the path will be hard, I know Lindsey Graham must be held accountable. He certainly doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years. [**That’s why I’m running for US Senate. To defeat Trump’s lapdog and fight for everyday Americans. But, I need your support today. Can you rush a split donation of $15 (or whatever you can spare) between Seth Moulton and me to become a Founding Donor to my campaign? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109650776/551789388/-1591572682?refcode=250612_MFC_Annie_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTRmZjcyOS0zODRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0u61IoGvNZgHs8z1XbOu8r-rpLgzmGnX7ay4JOuU6PI=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109650777/551789389/-1591572682?refcode=250612_MFC_Annie_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTRmZjcyOS0zODRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0u61IoGvNZgHs8z1XbOu8r-rpLgzmGnX7ay4JOuU6PI=) Thank you for believing in this campaign, Dr. Annie Andrews

subject: All eyes will be on Michigan in 2026

body:
It’s never been more important to elect Democrats in Michigan. Here’s why...
#

**_— Information for Democrats about Michigan in 2026 —_** Donald Trump barely eked out a win in Michigan in 2024. But in 2026, Democrats have their sights set on highly competitive races for Senate and Governor in Michigan. **[If you’re already on board to elect Democrats in these critical elections, please make a donation now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89910?refcode=em20250615-9016&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9016%2E614464%2EYpQeYj) Otherwise, keep reading for everything you need to know ↓** **[DONATE NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89910?refcode=em20250615-9016&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9016%2E614464%2EYpQeYj)**
---

**_— Michigan’s U.S. Senate Race —_** Michigan’s senior senator, Gary Peters, is retiring next year. _This the most important OPEN Senate seat of the cycle._ Cook Political Report currently rates this race as a **TOSS UP.** Sabato’s Crystal Ball currently rates this race as a **TOSS UP.** **Democrats MUST hold onto this seat in order to flip the Senate in 2026.** If we lose this Senate seat in Michigan, any prospect of taking back a majority in the Senate is completely doomed. **[SUPPORT DEMOCRATS: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89910?refcode=em20250615-9016&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9016%2E614464%2EYpQeYj)**
---

**_— Michigan’s Race for Governor —_** Michigan’s governor, Gretchen Whitmer, has reached her term limit. _That leaves the race for governor completely OPEN._ Cook Political Report currently rates this race as a **TOSS UP.** Sabato’s Crystal Ball currently rates this race as a **TOSS UP.** **Democratic governors are an important line of defense against the GOP attacks on the American people.** With more and more threats to our freedoms happening every day, we need the next governor of Michigan to continue Governor Whitmer’s legacy of standing up for everyday people. **[SUPPORT DEMOCRATS: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89910?refcode=em20250615-9016&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9016%2E614464%2EYpQeYj)**
---

From: Laura Gillen Campaign Team
Subject: Our path to victory and what we need to stay competitive

Peter,

We wanted to take a moment to give you an important update on the state of the race and [_**why your support is more crucial than ever.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109650975/551789966/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-06-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWU1MWFkNy0zOTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=615IGWpZCcufRrDPFcp2CUohsJeQjwAvoIgEFWYAf-k=)

As you know, this district is one of the **most competitive** in the country. We flipped it blue in 2024 by a razor-thin margin. Now, Republicans are already targeting us with attack ads and throwing money into this race to take it back.

With **Republicans controlling the House, Senate, and the White House** , this fight is about more than just one seat. It’s about ensuring we can block their MAGA agenda and hold them accountable for their attacks on working families, health care and our democracy.

Here’s the reality:
* **Election experts are calling this race a toss-up** — the only one in New York.
* **National Republicans are pouring in money** to flip this seat red.
* **We’re already facing attack ads** from their super PACs.
* If we **don’t meet our June FEC fundraising goal** we risk looking weak, opening the door for extremists who want to strip away progress and push dangerous policies.

_Our campaign needs**funding** to stay competitive. It’s that simple._

Every dollar you contribute helps us:
* **Counter the GOP attacks** with ads, outreach and digital campaigns.
* **Build the infrastructure** we need to mobilize voters and stay ahead in this race.
* **Ensure we have the resources** to get out the vote and defend this district.

[_**Can Laura count on you to contribute today to keep us on track to defend this seat and take back the House?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109650976/551789967/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-06-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWU1MWFkNy0zOTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=615IGWpZCcufRrDPFcp2CUohsJeQjwAvoIgEFWYAf-k=)

Peter, I’m sorry to bother you on a Sunday evening, so I’ll keep this quick.

We’re just a few hours away from midnight, and we’re still falling short. We need your support to make sure we hit our goal and send a clear message to Trump that we’re coming prepared in 2026.

It’s no secret that we’re living in divided times. Donald Trump is back in office, Republicans hold majorities in the House and Senate, and extreme, hateful rhetoric permeates our politics and everyday life.

Congresswoman Foushee is fighting back. But in order to restore checks and balances to our government, we must retake the House – and that starts with meeting every goal between now and election day.

So Peter, will you pitch in any amount to fuel our campaign ahead of tonight’s deadline? Here’s a personal link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-vf-em-fr-june25?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109651002/551790051/-1306430819?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_061525_MM_180DO_D4_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODQyZjA5Yy0zYTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDvF9taGvL86sK3Vm9lFxV8TAhXUFN0PBQIFBAHj90Q=)

Emma

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, I’m sorry to bother you on a Sunday evening, so I’ll keep this quick. We’re just a few hours away from midnight, and we’re still falling short. We need your support to make sure we hit our goal and send a clear message to Trump that we’re coming prepared in 2026. It’s no secret that we’re living in divided times. Donald Trump is back in office, Republicans hold majorities in the House and Senate, and extreme, hateful rhetoric permeates our politics and everyday life. Congresswoman Foushee is fighting back. But in order to restore checks and balances to our government, we must retake the House – and that starts with meeting every goal between now and election day. So Peter, will you pitch in any amount to fuel our campaign ahead of tonight’s deadline? Here’s a personal link: = Thank you for your support, Emma Campaign Manager Team Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. name: Marlene
subject: Happy Father’s Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109651316/551791461/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.15_Fathers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZlMTllYjctM2M0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zs03EoMJEtoqltwJpU0nw3L-6W1_LoCJxlHS4vmbmsk=)
---
I have the privilege of knowing two great fathers: Grant, my late husband to our five kids. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109651317/551791462/-141334335?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.15_Fathers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZlMTllYjctM2M0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zs03EoMJEtoqltwJpU0nw3L-6W1_LoCJxlHS4vmbmsk=) And my own dad, Carlos. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109651318/551791463/-141334335?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.15_Fathers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZlMTllYjctM2M0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zs03EoMJEtoqltwJpU0nw3L-6W1_LoCJxlHS4vmbmsk=) **Grant was an amazing dad.** He was a public servant, a role model to our kids, and the absolute love of my life. I could not have asked for a better partner to raise our family. He is known for his successful legal career, but he was also an author, a songwriter, and a playwright. He loved the arts and the ability to inspire others. Grant was a man of strong character and never compromised on his principles. My kids and I miss him every day, but his compassion for others and his dedication to justice live on in all of us. **My dad also understood the importance of leading a family.** Just before my parents made the courageous decision to leave Cuba, my dad dreamed of becoming a lawyer. But he recognized the dangers of living under an authoritarian regime, so he and my mom packed what they could and moved to the United States. When I was a child, my dad would often work two jobs to make ends meet. Life wasn’t easy, but I know with all certainty that he never regretted leaving Cuba and always cherished being an American citizen. Growing up, the values and lessons were crystal clear: work hard, be kind, and family is everything. The love from my husband and the resilience of my father are the foundation of who I am today. Without the sacrifices of my parents and the generosity of Grant, I wouldn’t have had the strength to become a broadcast journalist holding the corrupt and powerful accountable. I definitely wouldn’t have gathered the courage to run to represent families of all different backgrounds here in Arizona’s 1st Congressional District. So, on this Father’s Day, I want to wish my father, Carlos, my amazing late husband Grant, and all the dads out there a happy Father’s Day. — Marlene **[**__P.S. A donation goes a long way in fueling our fight to represent the true values of AZ-01. If it makes sense to you, please consider donating whatever you can to help send Marlene, a leader with integrity, to Washington.__**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109651319/551791464/-141334335?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.15_Fathers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZlMTllYjctM2M0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zs03EoMJEtoqltwJpU0nw3L-6W1_LoCJxlHS4vmbmsk=)**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109651320/551791465/1082828941?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.15_Fathers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZlMTllYjctM2M0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zs03EoMJEtoqltwJpU0nw3L-6W1_LoCJxlHS4vmbmsk=&emci=21e6afaa-9047-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=dfe19eb7-3c4a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=626985) To learn more about Marlene, visit: [MarleneForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109651323/551791468/-718111328?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.15_Fathers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZlMTllYjctM2M0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zs03EoMJEtoqltwJpU0nw3L-6W1_LoCJxlHS4vmbmsk=&emci=21e6afaa-9047-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=dfe19eb7-3c4a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=626985)

I hope you can understand why we’re working so hard to meet tonight’s fundraising goal

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109651386/551791763/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRhODBjNi0zYzRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZt8v4HpFeHoYVaa2BFgi6ZWXM5NjrIEgpgZLhSGdwQ=) I’ll get right to it. The truth is, the outcome of next year’s election here in KS-03 could very well determine the priorities of Congress.
If we win here and flip the House blue, we can focus on meeting the needs of the American people, not the desires of Donald Trump. body:
MAGA Republicans are targeting her seat. We're not backing down. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109651410/551791820/-298050158?refcode=WUEFH627_20250614_HayesSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056384&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWMyYzhkYi0zYzRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bD0hvbEeiEslGK3tN2laagT2TmkxTzv8uUmGeYQ0SrY=) Peter,

When it's time to stand up to Trump’s MAGA allies and hold extremist Republicans accountable, **Rep. Jahana Hayes (CT-05)** shows up and delivers.

Whether she's in Washington, D.C. or back home in Connecticut, Jahana brings her community with her — and reminds us what public service _should_ look like.

That's exactly why Republicans are targeting her.

****[**Split a donation between Jahana Hayes' campaign and EMILYs List today to help defend this critical U.S. House seat:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109651411/551791821/-298050158?refcode=WUEFH627_20250614_HayesSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056384&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWMyYzhkYi0zYzRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bD0hvbEeiEslGK3tN2laagT2TmkxTzv8uUmGeYQ0SrY=)**** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109651412/551791822/-298050158?refcode=WUEFH627_20250614_HayesSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056384&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWMyYzhkYi0zYzRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bD0hvbEeiEslGK3tN2laagT2TmkxTzv8uUmGeYQ0SrY=)
---

A former National Teacher of the Year, Jahana knows firsthand what students, educators, and families need — and she's not afraid to speak up.
* When the Trump administration tried to gut the Department of Education, Jahana called it out — **directly confronting the secretary** for failing to support students and teachers.

* She's sounding the alarm on **House Republicans giving Trump a free pass** to profit from shady cryptocurrency schemes, with no oversight and no accountability.
* And when the secretary of labor couldn't explain how the department would protect young people in Job Corps programs, **Jahana raised the alarm** about dangerous data-sharing practices with zero transparency.

This is what leadership looks like. And it's why Republicans are eyeing her seat in 2026 — hoping to replace her with a rubber-stamp MAGA extremist.

We can't let it happen. Not in CT-05. Not anywhere.

****[**Will you split a donation between Jahana Hayes and EMILYs List today to help keep this seat — and others like it — in Democratic pro-choice hands?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109651413/551791823/-298050158?refcode=WUEFH627_20250614_HayesSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056384&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWMyYzhkYi0zYzRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bD0hvbEeiEslGK3tN2laagT2TmkxTzv8uUmGeYQ0SrY=)****

clean_body: MAGA Republicans are targeting her seat. We're not backing down. | = Peter, When it's time to stand up to Trump’s MAGA allies and hold extremist Republicans accountable, Rep. Jahana Hayes (CT-05) shows up and delivers. Whether she's in Washington, D.C. or back home in Connecticut, Jahana brings her community with her — and reminds us what public service should look like. That's exactly why Republicans are targeting her. **= | = A former National Teacher of the Year, Jahana knows firsthand what students, educators, and families need — and she's not afraid to speak up. When the Trump administration tried to gut the Department of Education, Jahana called it out — directly confronting the secretary for failing to support students and teachers. She's sounding the alarm on House Republicans giving Trump a free pass to profit from shady cryptocurrency schemes, with no oversight and no accountability. And when the secretary of labor couldn't explain how the department would protect young people in Job Corps programs, Jahana raised the alarm about dangerous data-sharing practices with zero transparency. This is what leadership looks like. And it's why Republicans are eyeing her seat in 2026 — hoping to replace her with a rubber-stamp MAGA extremist. We can't let it happen. Not in CT-05. Not anywhere. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We're not just holding the line. We're sending a message: Women who lead with truth, compassion, and strength belong in Congress, and we're going to fight like hell to keep them there. name: Randy Villegas
subject: priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
#
Folks, You hear a lot about what Democrats are fighting _against_ – and there’s plenty. Greedy corporations, politicians who’ve forgotten who they represent, and a system rigged against working families. But today, I want to tell you what I’m fighting _for_.
* **I’m fighting for affordable education** \- whether that means lowering the cost of a four-year degree or expanding access to trade and vocational programs. No one should be forced into lifelong debt just to chase their dreams.
* **I’m fighting for accessible healthcare** \- no one should have to choose between paying rent and seeing a doctor
* **And I’m fighting for an economy that actually works for working people,** not just billionaires - that means good paying jobs, support for small businesses, and dignity in the workplace.

This campaign isn’t about chasing titles or climbing the political ladder. It’s about standing up for the families who keep this Valley running – the ones too often left out of the conversation. [**They say it takes a village, but we know it takes a valley. If you believe in a campaign that’s powered by people, I’m asking you to chip in $3 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109651520/551792162/701031030?refcode=em-6.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTQ5MDZiMzEtM2Q0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6Gx7DRe-y1eHJfqixeElNvn6IUEZ_z74h0sECK5eWEA=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109651521/551792163/701031030?refcode=em-6.15.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTQ5MDZiMzEtM2Q0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6Gx7DRe-y1eHJfqixeElNvn6IUEZ_z74h0sECK5eWEA=)

clean_body: | Folks, You hear a lot about what Democrats are fighting against – and there’s plenty. Greedy corporations, politicians who’ve forgotten who they represent, and a system rigged against working families. But today, I want to tell you what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting for affordable education \- whether that means lowering the cost of a four-year degree or expanding access to trade and vocational programs. No one should be forced into lifelong debt just to chase their dreams. I’m fighting for accessible healthcare \- no one should have to choose between paying rent and seeing a doctor And I’m fighting for an economy that actually works for working people,** not just billionaires - that means good paying jobs, support for small businesses, and dignity in the workplace. This campaign isn’t about chasing titles or climbing the political ladder. It’s about standing up for the families who keep this Valley running – the ones too often left out of the conversation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Randy | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Boca Eddie
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8685%2E5257348%2Ezp0DrE ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Happy Father’s Day,
Derek —

Today, we honor our fathers and other figures who shaped us into who we
are today.

I want to take this moment to honor my greatest role model, my father, Ed
Schiff, aka “Boca Eddie.” He passed away last year at age 96, and I’m
missing him a lot today.

I want to tell you about my dad — because he is one of my greatest role
models. And I hope you’ll read along.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250615_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8685%2E5257348%2Ezp0DrE ]Adam and his parents

Originally from Boston, my father left high school early to join the Army
at the end of World War II. After his service, he used the GI Bill to
attend the University of Alabama but left early to get started in
business.

He chose the schmata — or clothing — business. Later, he got out of the
schmata business and bought a lumber yard, where he put me to work in the
summers.

My father taught me so much. When my dad was raising my brother Dan and
me, he taught us to believe that even when times are tough, you always
make sure to give back to your community.

He taught us to be good fathers, not by lecturing to us, but by showing us
how.

And he taught us to stand up to bullies. He taught us to never back down
from a fight when the cause is just — even when facing the toughest of
challenges.

These ideas have guided me throughout my life.

I found myself reflecting on his guidance a lot during the new Trump
administration, reminding myself not to yield to intimidation. Ultimately,
I realized that bullies are, in fact, cowards.

With my dad’s good advice always front of my mind, I’m able to take on
Donald Trump and hold him accountable for his abuses of power.

I’d like to think he’s proud of me. Just like I’m so, so proud of my
children, and the paths and lives that they’ve chosen for themselves.

I’m working hard in the Senate to make sure everyone has a roof over their
head. And that all Americans can put food on the table and afford
medication. And that no one should live in fear of their rights and
freedoms being stripped away.

My commitment to you is to keep up the fight for regular families just
like the one I grew up in. To uphold the great lessons my father taught me
— to do what I do best.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q22025_abs_em.PyXMxO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8685%2E5257348%2Ezp0DrE ]Now that you’ve learned about my father and how he’s motivated me, I
hope you will donate to my campaign to continue to fight for these values
in the Senate.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q22025_abs_em.WLH6yo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1006&akid=8685%2E5257348%2Ezp0DrE ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q22025_abs_em.WLH6yo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1007&akid=8685%2E5257348%2Ezp0DrE ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q22025_abs_em.WLH6yo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1008&akid=8685%2E5257348%2Ezp0DrE ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q22025_abs_em.WLH6yo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1009&akid=8685%2E5257348%2Ezp0DrE ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q22025_abs_em.WLH6yo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1010&akid=8685%2E5257348%2Ezp0DrE ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8685%2E5257348%2Ezp0DrE ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Spending Father’s Day without my dad is not easy, and I think of him and
my mom often. Sharing stories about them with you helps me remember the
good and spread the values he taught me growing up. I’m holding a special
place in my thoughts for him and for those who have lost their parents.

And I'm wishing you all a very Happy Father’s Day.

Thank you.

— Adam

name: Team Kelly
subject: To ALL of Mark Kelly’s supporters: Please, don’t click away
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When Mark Kelly thinks about his most important supporters, it isn't the people that write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#

When Mark Kelly thinks about his most important supporters, it isn't the people that write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you.
---

Your support has been critical in helping Mark combat MAGA extremism.
Because of you, Mark is serving in the United States Senate — holding the line against President Trump, standing in the breach against the worst that this administration is trying to do.
---

But here’s something we thought you should know: Out of all the people who read these emails, less than 25% of them have made a donation to support his work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that important group.
---

Mark’s average online donation is around $30. Most people chip in much less than that. But with President Trump pushing our democracy to the brink, all that matters is that you are supporting Mark at a time he needs it most.
We’ll put it right to work not just in Arizona, but around the country. Mark is on the frontlines of this fight, and he is not going to back down.
---

[**If that sounds good to you, please: We’re humbly asking that you chip in $3 before midnight tonight.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june25.0e_cTw&refcode=em250615-2-f&t=1&akid=6095%2E6688874%2E6vye8Q)

---

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-june25.vmY1_B&refcode=em250615-2-f&t=22&akid=6095%2E6688874%2E6vye8Q)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-june25.iCpLoH&refcode=em250615-2-f&t=23&akid=6095%2E6688874%2E6vye8Q)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-june25.pfo7eN&refcode=em250615-2-f&t=24&akid=6095%2E6688874%2E6vye8Q)**
---
****

---
****

It is absolutely critical that this team stays united. That’s how we’ll fight back, and that’s how we’ll get through this.
Together.
Thank you,
Team Kelly
---

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

subject: Calling all Cresco Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
I’m reaching out with a personal request for you!

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109652010/551793493/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGY4ODFhZi00MDRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5in75v45zjyi8XmH917CZvoKdXkKSyM6gUwGk55RpY=)
---
Peter, I’m reaching out with a personal request for you, and this is the last time you’ll hear from me about it:

[Can you pitch in just $3 to help us hit tonight’s $15,000 mid-month goal? If just 4 people in Cresco chip in, we’ll stay on track. Every cent helps keep me fighting for our Democracy in Congress. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109652011/551793494/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250615_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGY4ODFhZi00MDRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5in75v45zjyi8XmH917CZvoKdXkKSyM6gUwGk55RpY=) | **[4 Cresco DONATIONS NEEDED: CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109652012/551793495/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250615_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGY4ODFhZi00MDRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5in75v45zjyi8XmH917CZvoKdXkKSyM6gUwGk55RpY=)**
---
I’ll be honest with you, Peter: My top priority is fighting to help people in the Bronx struggling to make ends meet, people scraping by on minimum wage to provide for their families, _like I once did._

But I don’t do a minute of call time, Peter — i.e. _spending hours on the phone begging donors for big checks._ **This is a campaign by and for the people, and I need your grassroots support to keep it that way.**

body:
After June is over, we'll have to report all of our fundraising for the quarter.
Hi Peter, it's Pramila.
I’m reaching out one last time before midnight because our mid-month deadline is just a few hours away, and this one is critical.
After June is over, we'll have to report all of our fundraising for the quarter, and with everything the Trump administration is doing to crack down on our rights and undermine our democracy, we need to show the strength of this grassroots movement.

body:
Tomorrow’s the big day!

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinmullinforcongress/big-news-i-was-just-appointed-to-the-house-energy-commerce-committee-9133142?e=292fde286a)

| Dear Peter,I’m excited to invite you to a special celebration in honor of my birthday tommorrow evening! We'll be gathering on Monday, June 16th at 5 pm in Redwood City to celebrate with family, friends, and supporters. See additional details below.**If you’re unable to attend tomorrow’s event, but still want to contribute **\- click the link below and select the _‘Donate my ticket to someone else’_ option on the right hand side of the RSVP page.** Using our lottery system, we’ll surprise someone on our waitlist with your kind gesture! **
---

| | | | | | | | | | | I truly value your ongoing support over the years and would be deeply grateful if you were able to help make this event successful by RSVPing today. **Event Details:****Date:** Monday, June 16th
**Time:** 5:00 pm
**Location:** _Redwood City address will be shared via email 24 hours prior to event_ As you know, winning back the House in 2026 is critical—and the stakes truly couldn’t be higher. I’m focused on a strong Primary win and helping elect Democrats in key swing districts throughout California and beyond. **Any help you can provide will make a meaningful impact. Can I count on your support?** I hope you’ll join us for an evening of celebration, conversation, and community.Thank you,
Rep. Kevin MullinCongressman, CA-15
